name: Alex Padilla (via Democrats.org)
subject: What happened last week:
body:
---
Derek, Last week, I was physically and aggressively forced out of Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem’s press conference for trying to ask a question. By now, you may have seen the video. Before I even asked my question, I was pushed and pulled, and struggled to maintain my balance. I was forced to the ground first on my knees and then flat on my chest, and as I was handcuffed and marched down a hallway, I repeatedly asked, “Why am I being detained?” I went to that press conference because I was doing my job as a United States Senator — to provide oversight and accountability of the Trump administration. But if you watched what unfolded last week and thought that was about one politician or one press conference, then you’re missing the point. If that’s how this administration responds to a United States senator with a question, what will they do to hardworking Americans raising their voices in California and around the country? If our elected officials become too afraid to speak up, how can we expect any other American to do the same? **Right now, Donald Trump would love nothing more than for all of us to just cower away and say nothing, and let him continue to abuse his power.** I won’t do that. And I hope you won’t either. **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and the DNC. It is more important than ever that we come together and stand against Trump and his allies’ abuse of power. Your donation helps us send that message:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-padilla-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250620_3769_fr&refcode2=3769_22930333_xPSPeo&akid=3769%2E22930333%2ExPSPeo) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-padilla-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250620_3769_fr&refcode2=3769_22930333_xPSPeo&akid=3769%2E22930333%2ExPSPeo)**

clean_body: Derek, Last week, I was physically and aggressively forced out of Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem’s press conference for trying to ask a question. By now, you may have seen the video. Before I even asked my question, I was pushed and pulled, and struggled to maintain my balance. I was forced to the ground first on my knees and then flat on my chest, and as I was handcuffed and marched down a hallway, I repeatedly asked, “Why am I being detained?” I went to that press conference because I was doing my job as a United States Senator — to provide oversight and accountability of the Trump administration. But if you watched what unfolded last week and thought that was about one politician or one press conference, then you’re missing the point. If that’s how this administration responds to a United States senator with a question, what will they do to hardworking Americans raising their voices in California and around the country? If our elected officials become too afraid to speak up, how can we expect any other American to do the same? Right now, Donald Trump would love nothing more than for all of us to just cower away and say nothing, and let him continue to abuse his power. I won’t do that. And I hope you won’t either. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and the Democratic National Committee instantly: | | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you for everything, Alex Padilla U.S. Senator, California If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

I’m counting on you, Congressman Andy Harris, M.D. House Freedom Caucus Chairman | | | Paid for by Andy Harris for Congress | | PO Box 6, Cambridge, MD 21613 | ]()

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: To: Senate Democrats | From: Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
While the GOP attacks everything from health coverage to food assistance, THANK YOU for standing up for everyday American families.
#

Peter — Republicans in the U.S. Senate attacked American families this week by proposing even deeper cuts to Medicaid, the program that provides health coverage for millions of the most vulnerable people in our country. **Luckily, Senate Democrats have been standing up to the GOP’s attacks.** They’re fighting to protect health care, food assistance, and every other necessary program working families across the nation need just to survive. So today, we’re asking you to join us in thanking them:
---

**FROM:** Peter
**TO:** Senate Democrats
_As Donald Trump + the GOP threaten everything from health care to food assistance in their “big, beautiful bill,” I’m joining State Democrats Committee in saying THANK YOU for actually standing up for everyday American families!_
**[ADD YOUR NAME TODAY](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250619?t=1&akid=9030%2E614464%2E10SNnb)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20250620-9030-footer&t=2&refcode2=9030_614464_10SNnb&akid=9030%2E614464%2E10SNnb)**
---
Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=3&akid=9030%2E614464%2E10SNnb).

name: Tom Fitton
subject: FBI Cover-Up In Court!
body:
USAID BRIBERY!

[INSIDE JW]

FBI STILL HIDING BIDEN TWITTER CENSORSHIP RECORDS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35510&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj0wU3VYeGZ5UXVJQSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=96a409cecbc2eb22d6a1b5dad05c2590fb3a196ffa17f0a763293156d227135f]

We were in court this week for a hearing ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35482&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItaGVhcmluZy1vcmRlci0wMTE2My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ed2a5493b1d1bcc6623ddcfa747ade701d0024ed575e87610457f440ee3f2da6]
by U.S. District Judge Sparkle L. Sooknanan in our FOIA lawsuit
against the U.S. Department of Justice for “Twitter Files
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35483&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9tdGFpYmJpL3N0YXR1cy8xNTk4ODIyOTU5ODY2NjgzMzk0XeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=251e7a2df0259ca95dc069740d4c048a3ad088c7d0c5ff73a3e4d1f497cbdff8
records
concerning Hunter Biden’s laptop
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35484&F=T&&hash=12fb06e91209a2137b05dc537609ec324a5f7d6e6317ae0104982aa72bcd25c7]
and other censorship. The only issue remaining in the lawsuit is the
FBI’s continued hiding of records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35485&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItcmVjb3Jkcy0wMTE2My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f0bda94bca329953ea74122e2a836c745ad637654e432e09bb0832778ea3e263]
documenting two meetings between Twitter and the Biden FBI.

We filed the April 2023 lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=30116&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1kb2ovP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cf7a6756b66b2fbae68d1a53123d889ace6eafecd61d3b7375fd5372b5a2ba6c]
against the
Justice Department, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the
Office of the Director of National Intelligence after the FBI failed
to respond to a December 2022 FOIA request for the records of any FBI
official and key Twitter employees between June 2020 and December 2022
(_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=30093&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1kbmktdHdpdHRlci1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDExNjMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=57189a9a54aea3ad4cb7b6529d6f9874dccce04b48fc2c6cd96cd380b050e806]
(No. 1:23-cv-01163)).

The lawsuit references Yoel Roth, Vijaya Gadde, and Jim Baker, who
were prominent in internal discussions at Twitter about censoring the
_New York Post’s_ Hunter Biden laptop story, as journalist Matt
Taibbi revealed in the December 2022 release of the “Twitter Files
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35486&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9tdGFpYmJpL3N0YXR1cy8xNTk4ODIyOTU5ODY2NjgzMzk0XS7igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2d59e35653e0b1d95f63fe0b5a33635f1bf64e1d017e8e5fbce5066ad4572897

It is frustrating beyond belief for us to have to go to federal court
for basic information on Biden’s abuse of the FBI, using Twitter to
censor and monitor Americans.

Earlier this year, FBI Director Kash Patel committed the FBI
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35487&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9LYXNoX1BhdGVsL3N0YXR1cy8xODk1MjUyNzcxMzcwMzQ0NTkwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4efc19250f6e95b6834b4f12bffa73d7dbf5971cdeef63fba62208a32b330982]
to a “new
era” of transparency:

> The FBI is entering a new era—one that will be defined by
> integrity, accountability, and the unwavering pursuit of justice.
> There will be no cover-ups, no missing documents, and no stone left
> unturned — and anyone from the prior or current Bureau who
> undermines this will be swiftly pursued. If there are gaps, we will
> find them. If records have been hidden, we will uncover them. And we
> will bring everything we find to the DOJ to be fully assessed and
> transparently disseminated to the American people as it should be.
> The oath we take is to the Constitution, and under my leadership,
> that promise will be upheld without compromise.

Through FOIA and other direct litigation, we continue to investigate
and litigate the broad range of censorship that had been imposed upon
tens of millions of Americans.

In November 2024, we uncovered records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=34007&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ292dC1jZW5zb3JzaGlwLW9mLWNvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bfc61c256d7dc74852b593785b7c7d483a54c8c749b8f41cc1dd4fe2e8e27636]
from
the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive
effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor
social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election.

In June 2024, heavily redacted Homeland Security records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=32749&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc29yc2hpcC1jb29yZGluYXRpb24tZWxlY3Rpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8901eebf48027d46cdef6cbf6f9dfbf855b7b67d83143c355d12ab75b3d7d0f1]
from
a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed state election officials in the
days before and after the 2020 election flagging online content deemed
“misinformation” and sending it to the Center for Internet
Security (CIS), a DHS-funded nonprofit, the Cybersecurity and
Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), which is a division of DHS, the
Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), which was created to flag online
election content for censorship and suppression, and others.

In December 2023, Homeland Security records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=30856&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdHMtZHVyaW5nLTIwMjAtZWxlY3Rpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7b00ee1b8a7a5fe5c3c269675c53a7f2b374b864527862dd947e87634908ef8f]
from the
same lawsuit showed a close collaboration between its Cybersecurity
and Information Security Agency (CISA) and the leftist Election
Integrity Partnership (EIP) to engage in “real-time narrative
tracking” on all major social media platforms in the days leading up
to the 2020 election.

In November 2023, we uncovered Homeland Security records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=30685&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjAyMC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kaXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2562328abf89c31844e2dc1562a13597c1191d41bbde2c5c32afbb98b49970b0]
that
showed the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)
communicating during the 2020 election campaign with the Election
Integrity Partnership (EIP). The CISA records showed government
involvement in the EIP pressure on Google, Twitter, Facebook, TikTok,
Pinterest, Reddit and other platforms to censor “disinformation.”

In September 2022, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=28208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jYS1zZWNzdGF0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6fa3975c85a4012821379a48ab42de01329defb81b41cc8b4afaae659b6bea6f]
the
Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube
censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In March 2025,
Judicial Watch asked the Supreme Court of the United States to review
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=34732&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcveW91dHViZS1lbGVjdGlvbi1pbnRlZ3JpdHktdmlkZW8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f4dc4d9999b94814bec0dc9979b9506876649b13a67621cf22b05c37e9e271fd]
the
case.

In July 2021, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=28511&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2RjLWZhY2Vib29rLWNvdmlkLW1lc3NhZ2dpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7822828922ed560538daa8aefb5fef8084c8fff162dbed6f3a57fd0bbd89937e]
records
from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which
revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the
Covid narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in
free advertising was given to the CDC by social media companies.

In May 2021, we revealed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=27925&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlnLXRlY2gtaW93YS1vZmZpY2lhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b262969311086b503d2f7d72a47c6c12fa6184f4bd3c40666f9f3905b062de22]
documents

CHARGES: BRIBED USAID OFFICIAL HELPS MINORITY BUSINESSES GET $550
MILLION IN CONTRACTS

The United States Agency for International Development has been in the
news lately as President Trump’s administration exposes its use as a
cash cow for the Left. Now there’s news of outright bribery at the
agency, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reveals
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35499&F=T&&hash=261d7a56b8f9aaabac5ba9877b7a59614552d7b54187522e5858d1f8df51dc62].

> In yet another case that demonstrates the deep-rooted corruption at
> the dismantled United States Agency for International Development
> (USAID) , a contracting officer at the scandal-plagued State
> Department offshoot has pleaded guilty to bribery of a public
> official
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35512&F=T&&hash=22968890ac95a327d23e3cf6eca7c1db715c5cb84620db023915b2ec3f883a2d]
> for running a decade-long scheme involving over half a billion
> dollars in contracts. The criminal operation was facilitated by a
> government program that helps socially and economically
> disadvantaged businesses by giving them lucrative federal
> contracting opportunities through “set-asides and solo-source”
> contracts exclusively available to minorities and women without a
> competitive bidding process. All the parties involved in this
> criminal enterprise, including the veteran USAID employee, are
> minorities.
>
> It is important to note that the mainstream media, which
> collectively expressed outrage when President Trump dismantled
> USAID, has failed to report on the pervasive fraud that has long
> gripped the foreign aid agency and still ignores cases like this
> that support the administration’s move. Only a few local Maryland
> news outlets covered this huge bribery operation because the
> perpetrators were from the Baltimore area. The corrupt USAID
> contracting officer, Roderick Watson, is from Woodstock, which is
> just west of Baltimore. Federal prosecutors say he received over a
> million dollars in bribes in exchange for using his position as a
> trusted overseer of taxpayer money to direct 14 prime federal
> contracts to his three buddies, Walter Barnes, a certified Small
> Business Administration (SBA) minority business owner, Darryl Britt
> another minority business owner and Paul Young, a subcontractor of
> the men’s companies. Barnes has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to
> commit bribery of a public official and securities fraud. Britt has
> pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit bribery of a public official
> and Young has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit bribery of a
> public official.
>
> “The defendants sought to enrich themselves at the expense of
> American taxpayers through bribery and fraud,” said Matthew R.
> Galeotti, head of the Department of Justice (DOJ) criminal division.
> “Their scheme violated the public trust by corrupting the federal
> government’s procurement process. Anybody who cares about good and
> effective government should be concerned about the waste, fraud, and
> abuse in government agencies, including USAID.” Galeotti added
> that those who engage in bribery schemes to exploit the U.S. Small
> Business Administration’s vital economic programs for small
> businesses— whether individuals or corporations acting through
> them—will be held to account. The U.S. Attorney for the District
> of Maryland, where the case is being tried, emphasized that Watson
> was entrusted to serve the interests of the American people and his
> criminal actions for his own personal gain undermine the integrity
> of public institutions. “Public trust is the hallmark of our
> nation’s values, so corruption within a federal government agency
> is intolerable” the U.S. Attorney, Kelly O. Hayes, said.
>
> The elaborate scheme began in 2013 when Watson, while a USAID
> contracting officer, made a deal with Britt to steer government
> contracts his way in exchange for bribes. Britt’s company, Apprio,
> benefitted from the special minority exception and therefore did not
> receive much scrutiny but when it graduated from the program and was
> no longer eligible to be a prime business for new contracts with
> USAID under the initiative, they brought Barnes onboard. His
> minority-owned company, Vistant, shifted to the prime contractor
> that cashed in thanks to Watson’s influence between 2018 and 2022.
> Britt and Barnes concealed the bribes—cash, computers, cellular
> phones, jobs for relatives, down payments on two residential
> mortgages—by passing them through Young, the president of another
> subcontractor to the men’s businesses. Watson helped his
> accomplices by manipulating the procurement process at USAID by,
> among other things, recommending their companies to other agency
> decisionmakers for noncompetitive contracts, disclosing sensitive
> procurement information, providing positive performance evaluations,
> and approving increased funding and security clearances. “Watson
> exploited his position at USAID to line his pockets with bribes in
> exchange for more than $550 million in contracts,” according to
> Guy Ficco, chief of the Internal Revenue Service Criminal
> Investigation (IRS-CI). “While he helped three company owners and
> presidents bypass the fair bidding process, he was showered with
> cash and lavish gifts.”
>
> Judicial Watch has for years exposed inherent fraud, waste, and
> corruption at USAID. Most recently, we sued
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=33905&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjdtLWdyYW50cy1nYXphLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=927f82836adaf7405926f2aa6734646115d3e589dfcd2646ffd24ae9ae0e3483]
the agency for
> records involving $27 million in Gaza grants that went to
> “Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees.” The Biden administration
> claimed the recipients could not be disclosed because the agency’s
> workers could be put at risk by Israel. The involvement of
> employees
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74775&L=35513&F=T&&hash=8bd190d17970dd91b45e563c1a7a29cfb1e5ac3e1a16be9cde2431d2fca54f67
> the U.S.-backed United Nations Relief and Works Agency for
> Palestinian Refugees (UNRWA) in the Oct. 7, 2023, Hamas attack on
> Israel underscores the importance of transparency in who receives
> American taxpayer dollars and how the money is spent.

Until next week,

clean_body: USAID BRIBERY! [INSIDE JW] FBI STILL HIDING BIDEN TWITTER CENSORSHIP RECORDS [] We were in court this week for a hearing ordered [] by U.S. District Judge Sparkle L. Sooknanan in our FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for “Twitter Files [ records concerning Hunter Biden’s laptop [] and other censorship. The only issue remaining in the lawsuit is the FBI’s continued hiding of records [] documenting two meetings between Twitter and the Biden FBI. We filed the April 2023 lawsuit [] against the Justice Department, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence after the FBI failed to respond to a December 2022 FOIA request for the records of any FBI official and key Twitter employees between June 2020 and December 2022 (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-01163)). The lawsuit references Yoel Roth, Vijaya Gadde, and Jim Baker, who were prominent in internal discussions at Twitter about censoring the New York Post’s Hunter Biden laptop story, as journalist Matt Taibbi revealed in the December 2022 release of the “Twitter Files [ It is frustrating beyond belief for us to have to go to federal court for basic information on Biden’s abuse of the FBI, using Twitter to censor and monitor Americans. Earlier this year, FBI Director Kash Patel committed the FBI [] to a “new era” of transparency: The FBI is entering a new era—one that will be defined by integrity, accountability, and the unwavering pursuit of justice. There will be no cover-ups, no missing documents, and no stone left unturned — and anyone from the prior or current Bureau who undermines this will be swiftly pursued. If there are gaps, we will find them. If records have been hidden, we will uncover them. And we will bring everything we find to the DOJ to be fully assessed and transparently disseminated to the American people as it should be. The oath we take is to the Constitution, and under my leadership, that promise will be upheld without compromise. Through FOIA and other direct litigation, we continue to investigate and litigate the broad range of censorship that had been imposed upon tens of millions of Americans. In November 2024, we uncovered records [] from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election. In June 2024, heavily redacted Homeland Security records [] from a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed state election officials in the days before and after the 2020 election flagging online content deemed “misinformation” and sending it to the Center for Internet Security (CIS), a DHS-funded nonprofit, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), which is a division of DHS, the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), which was created to flag online election content for censorship and suppression, and others. In December 2023, Homeland Security records [] from the same lawsuit showed a close collaboration between its Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA) and the leftist Election Integrity Partnership (EIP) to engage in “real-time narrative tracking” on all major social media platforms in the days leading up to the 2020 election. In November 2023, we uncovered Homeland Security records [] that showed the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) communicating during the 2020 election campaign with the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP). The CISA records showed government involvement in the EIP pressure on Google, Twitter, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, Reddit and other platforms to censor “disinformation.” In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In March 2025, Judicial Watch asked the Supreme Court of the United States to review [] the case. In July 2021, we uncovered [] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the Covid narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising was given to the CDC by social media companies. In May 2021, we revealed [] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. In April 2021, records [] from the Office of the Secretary of State of California revealed how state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. Included in these records were “misinformation briefings” emails that were compiled by communications firm SKDK, which lists [] Biden for President as their top [ [] of 2020. The records show how the state agency successfully pressured YouTube to censor a Judicial Watch video concerning mail-in voting and a Judicial Watch lawsuit settlement about California voter roll clean up. CHARGES: BRIBED USAID OFFICIAL HELPS MINORITY BUSINESSES GET $550 MILLION IN CONTRACTS The United States Agency for International Development has been in the news lately as President Trump’s administration exposes its use as a cash cow for the Left. Now there’s news of outright bribery at the agency, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reveals []. In yet another case that demonstrates the deep-rooted corruption at the dismantled United States Agency for International Development (USAID) , a contracting officer at the scandal-plagued State Department offshoot has pleaded guilty to bribery of a public official [] for running a decade-long scheme involving over half a billion dollars in contracts. The criminal operation was facilitated by a government program that helps socially and economically disadvantaged businesses by giving them lucrative federal contracting opportunities through “set-asides and solo-source” contracts exclusively available to minorities and women without a competitive bidding process. All the parties involved in this criminal enterprise, including the veteran USAID employee, are minorities. It is important to note that the mainstream media, which collectively expressed outrage when President Trump dismantled USAID, has failed to report on the pervasive fraud that has long gripped the foreign aid agency and still ignores cases like this that support the administration’s move. Only a few local Maryland news outlets covered this huge bribery operation because the perpetrators were from the Baltimore area. Barnes has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit bribery of a public official and securities fraud. Britt has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit bribery of a public official and Young has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit bribery of a public official. “The defendants sought to enrich themselves at the expense of American taxpayers through bribery and fraud,” said Matthew R. Galeotti, head of the Department of Justice (DOJ) criminal division. “Their scheme violated the public trust by corrupting the federal government’s procurement process. Anybody who cares about good and effective government should be concerned about the waste, fraud, and abuse in government agencies, including USAID.” Galeotti added that those who engage in bribery schemes to exploit the U.S. Small Business Administration’s vital economic programs for small businesses— whether individuals or corporations acting through them—will be held to account. The U.S. Attorney for the District of Maryland, where the case is being tried, emphasized that Watson was entrusted to serve the interests of the American people and his criminal actions for his own personal gain undermine the integrity of public institutions. “Public trust is the hallmark of our nation’s values, so corruption within a federal government agency is intolerable” the U.S. Attorney, Kelly O. Hayes, said. The elaborate scheme began in 2013 when Watson, while a USAID contracting officer, made a deal with Britt to steer government contracts his way in exchange for bribes. Britt’s company, Apprio, benefitted from the special minority exception and therefore did not receive much scrutiny but when it graduated from the program and was no longer eligible to be a prime business for new contracts with USAID under the initiative, they brought Barnes onboard. His minority-owned company, Vistant, shifted to the prime contractor that cashed in thanks to Watson’s influence between 2018 and 2022. Britt and Barnes concealed the bribes—cash, computers, cellular phones, jobs for relatives, down payments on two residential mortgages—by passing them through Young, the president of another subcontractor to the men’s businesses. Watson helped his accomplices by manipulating the procurement process at USAID by, among other things, recommending their companies to other agency decisionmakers for noncompetitive contracts, disclosing sensitive procurement information, providing positive performance evaluations, and approving increased funding and security clearances. “Watson exploited his position at USAID to line his pockets with bribes in exchange for more than $550 million in contracts,” according to Guy Ficco, chief of the Internal Revenue Service Criminal Investigation (IRS-CI). “While he helped three company owners and presidents bypass the fair bidding process, he was showered with cash and lavish gifts.” Judicial Watch has for years exposed inherent fraud, waste, and corruption at USAID. Most recently, we sued [] the agency for records involving $27 million in Gaza grants that went to “Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees.” The Biden administration claimed the recipients could not be disclosed because the agency’s workers could be put at risk by Israel. The involvement of employees [ the U.S.-backed United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestinian Refugees (UNRWA) in the Oct. 7, 2023, Hamas attack on Israel underscores the importance of transparency in who receives American taxpayer dollars and how the money is spent. name: Powered By People
subject: Tyler, Beaumont, San Antonio, and Laredo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Powered by People just announced that we’ll be hosting four town halls in Tyler, Beaumont, San Antonio, and Laredo at the end of June!
[**Will you chip in $3 today to help get Beto back on the road, hosting town halls and building long-term political organizing power?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250620.MfIu77&refcode=ema20250620-240170&t=1&akid=240170%2E444211%2EWGKHVR)
****
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250620.MfIu77&refcode=ema20250620-240170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=240170%2E444211%2EWGKHVR)**
We are at a real moment of truth for our country and state. We have got to fight for the future—Beto is committed to doing everything he can to bring people together, answer questions, and help folks share their collective experiences at our town halls.
And he doesn’t take a salary from Powered by People—your donation will go towards helping to put gas in the tank, renting event space, and organizing our thousands of volunteers to register Texans.
[**Please donate $3 or whatever you can afford today to help us host even more town halls across Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250620.MfIu77&refcode=ema20250620-240170&t=21&akid=240170%2E444211%2EWGKHVR)
More soon,
Team Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250620-240170-footer&t=22&refcode2=240170_444211_WGKHVR&akid=240170%2E444211%2EWGKHVR)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240170%2E444211%2EWGKHVR), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=240170%2E444211%2EWGKHVR).

name: Steve Scalise
subject: POLITICAL AMBUSH against DHS Sec. Kristi Noem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I know Secretary Noem well.
I served with her in Congress. She was my right hand on the GOP Whip Team. So it felt personal to see the Left's COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH play out in real-time.
FIRST: Liberal activists unleashed chaos in Los Angeles and 1,500 other cities nationwide - reports show this is the largest rally of Trump-hating radicals in American history!
THEN: Liberal CA Senator Alex Padilla cheered on these lawless rioters, barged into Kristi Noem's press conference, and even FUNDRAISED off of it
NOW: Democrat Eric Swalwell just called for Secretary Kristi Noem to RESIGN for enforcing mass deportations and cracking down on the rioters
Liberal activists across the country are pulling out all the stops to undermine President Trump, Kristi Noem, and the entire Administration.
So don't be fooled:
This isn't really about Kristi Noem or the job she's doing. She's being targeted by Congressional Democrats for carrying out the President's agenda - for doing exactly what the American People elected him to do.
They want to BLOCK deportations, DISRUPT the important work of ICE, SABOTAGE everything Trump is doing to save America, and INTIMIDATE you into giving up your public support of MAGA.
But we can't legitimize their political showmanship with our silence!
[These Trump-hating radicals are receiving wall-to-wall news coverage as we speak so it’ll take a massive response to cut through the noise. So I just set a goal of raising $500,000 between now and 6/30/2025 to make sure Conservatives have the resources needed to hold the line.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/wXCZZ0N7INLvFkmoYI6C-_kCbctQ8AVdkxMQ8hB64bMSt1SPSNoAdZGqdTbzkJMrUYRSv1Xi96HNIakXVuI5HyjeaDUU-DhB9yqU-wFZ2xY2T8I-5GtfSsHN2J1IJfLAMRqbnXRf6wjrZFxwt6WkY3R3G1pDosvhDvku0Vu-UUTowS8iTt3jzOJcMD_CvjW6jBYg6TtLsau5O_vunZbrQnKWguNNblBVHtl-3b099iKS0xsRkK_hWz4zI8j0kaGAhNaa0WQkvA9H3gwGsU7z5RbLAgiWsBtl9kVaU3A8sKeEE-3Ks9QkLBDqP5hLNqa3Fs32uyc3q_E_oJlNFv__ONoceIDezSivXBoUygLi8tVBuw4tpYn0m8lszp7KRfoq1u2G-be6EOigIxm_4dETfeLsx6GVZl45M0L16OW1IhhZRUn5UGf33O5IcmTV9o0Q9afUxvmXj4kYf1njtx7nfAN1jaz8JEvDdGQlaNIPfrAk-9uY1OhRh9cV-9BybYpzntTTkKom7KI5j9l-Tc2ytFJej0rWgpRdwISMaQU1WfYcymUqJ0t_0ZsS5MO5y2vZdDCW5k5VqD0L43UEGEOhl39ahadPu1w3drnAklsLhzwcNNjBQmtlD5Eeo81-q0MNsylvyosPY_PJaJpOSN-8aByS_MiLH6ETHS7fJfX2gbQGppfPKfmk7paqxkPzxCoZTUS2i2feAwpGhOICXzBVFHwAt23PrT8rjc_JGvSTh7r19AtyNKlUcmjNFH44Z3bN-FGOJ2nDjbl-WQ8w9XMJtFaWXpTWm8k86KHwoyhCfnqmisNhk97awdd3RAZzCaO7cDtpAlAOxy2qpkA4tw/yfmway-uxFgiug7PDigltpYwiDANMe1p/10)
I know it's ambitious..
But every dollar collected from this email will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and defend President Trump and his closest allies.
If we fail to reach this goal, the consequences could be dire: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials - including Kristi Noem and the President himself.
NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So I'm asking for your immediate support. Not next week, not next month...

clean_body: I know Secretary Noem well. I served with her in Congress. She was my right hand on the GOP Whip Team. So it felt personal to see the Left's COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH play out in real-time. FIRST: Liberal activists unleashed chaos in Los Angeles and 1,500 other cities nationwide - reports show this is the largest rally of Trump-hating radicals in American history! THEN: Liberal CA Senator Alex Padilla cheered on these lawless rioters, barged into Kristi Noem's press conference, and even FUNDRAISED off of it NOW: Democrat Eric Swalwell just called for Secretary Kristi Noem to RESIGN for enforcing mass deportations and cracking down on the rioters Liberal activists across the country are pulling out all the stops to undermine President Trump, Kristi Noem, and the entire Administration. So don't be fooled: This isn't really about Kristi Noem or the job she's doing. She's being targeted by Congressional Democrats for carrying out the President's agenda - for doing exactly what the American People elected him to do. They want to BLOCK deportations, DISRUPT the important work of ICE, SABOTAGE everything Trump is doing to save America, and INTIMIDATE you into giving up your public support of MAGA. But we can't legitimize their political showmanship with our silence! I know it's ambitious.. But every dollar collected from this email will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and defend President Trump and his closest allies. If we fail to reach this goal, the consequences could be dire: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials - including Kristi Noem and the President himself. NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So I'm asking for your immediate support. Not next week, not next month... subject: I’m really worried

body:
an update about our end-of-quarter goal
#
I’ll get right to the point, Peter.
**Our big end-of-quarter deadline is on June 30 — just over a week away — and we’re not even close to reaching the $30,000 goal Lucas emailed you about over the weekend.**
_Honestly, I’m getting really worried about whether or not we’ll be able to hit it at all._
If everyone reading this email chipped in even just $3 today, we could knock this goal out in no time at all. But not everyone will, so I’m asking YOU directly, Peter:
**[Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can toward our $30,000 end-of-quarter goal today? We’re on a mission to elect warriors for working families up and down the ballot and your support will give us the resources to do exactly that.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90113?refcode=em20250620-9036&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9036%2E614464%2EApQomR)**

We need to make this our best month yet, Peter, and I’m glad we can count on supporters like you to help us make it happen.
Thank you for everything,
Emma
Team Heartland Patriots

Today I joined journalist Don Lemon on the [Don Lemon](https://open.substack.com/users/143409218-don-lemon?utm_source=mentions) Show to discuss a series of legal rulings _against_ the Trump regime. Namely:
* A Federal court ruled that Mahmoud Khalil must be released from prison, where he has unjustly languished since March 8.
* Another Federal court overturned Trump's ban on foreign students at Harvard University--undoing a decision that banned more than 7000 students.
* Yet another Federal court blocked Louisiana's requirement to post the 10 Commandments in public schools.

Watch the interview below, subscribe, share, and let me know what you think in the comments!

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2lhnsukobl40eirnsrpmbs63q7oav8dqb43b9dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o31c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7oarj1mplnv2dtb5pd1839a319jg8rvtuccfm58_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o31c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvmta3u5lbl67sm9b06mjogfonqauhdiip45es3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o31c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgj138lr7j2p004cvo42ii84jat10l42iuu69h9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o31c5h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3mqge70jvk54rvf01hvt0hiq531q817ssm2lad0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o31c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I Won in Court—Help Me Keep Fighting for Truth
body:
This isn’t just my win—it’s a win for free speech. Project Veritas tried to block me, claiming I intimidate witnesses. The judge rejected that, calling it irrational and affirming my right to uncover the truth.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7936c2e2m2oe9q31iourhmab8e2jn2ht36s6se8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtjbsmt1gtt1m197cuon3g24fm2rtpqlullh09o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is James O'Keefe, and for 14 years, I've been an investigative journalist exposing corruption--from ACORN to Pfizer. But today, I'm writing to you about a personal fight that could end my career [**unless people like you step up**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znhk0urf9c0rkreotk5t5bks0bt50dkvppoejb08_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs).

I founded Project Veritas and built it into a force for truth.

After our biggest investigation yet, the board I appointed ousted me. Now, they're suing me in federal court to stop my new organization, OMG, and silence my reporting. But this week, I scored a **major victory** : the judge ruled in my favor, allowing me to continue deposing witnesses and extending the deadline to August 15th.

This isn't just my win--it's a **win for free speech**. Project Veritas tried to block me, claiming I intimidate witnesses. The judge rejected that, calling it irrational and affirming my right to uncover the truth. But with **eight depositions left** , costing a minimum of **$61,375** , [**I can 't do it alone.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd1dni187t3t3e03uhtup1k1quhpa1u9e8rncac8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)

Here's why this matters: my work has changed the game, exposing corruption that powerful people want hidden. This lawsuit is their final attack to shut me down. [**Will you help me raise**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4c1to7g8977mgn795oqdaq05q215763v6rpe8d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)**[**$61,375**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8fnsn9ssammae3s78f3n47ufgsoq393t8bqomko_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)**[**to finish these depositions and keep fighting?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z90unmd5nfd31c4sbpdvs3u2ofpda2ceoq80off8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)

[**Please, help me in get through this battle by donating today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z66kcdvavan092pvpm3s6vvajljhbue37daqjv7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)

The stakes are high. In court, we revealed threats like "chew on my heart and eat it" from a former board member and violent insults from their lawyer. The judge was shocked--but I'm not surprised. This is what truth-tellers face.

[**Your support through Liberty Guard can defend me and the journalism that holds power accountable.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zce99jcekjrhr69v5a6tcgelmfabr25t0c6cg1d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)

Thank you for considering this. Together, we can protect the truth.

Respectfully,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have until **August 15th** to raise **$61,375**. [**Please donate today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj6fkes1mosv238i8m00qre6l9ajgnu19r0j6q78_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o32c5h2bs)

body:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgb4mbjbi11fc2t11vvk5cbanegbqvvh7mti0no8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o33cjh2bs)

No strings attached, just make a donation of ANY amount to Turning Point USA today so that we can reach even more young people and fuel our unstoppable movement.

---
This isn’t just a book. **It’s what the Left never wanted you to read.** Why? Because it lays out — in brutal detail — how they hijacked our culture... And how we can flip it BACK, one campus, one student, one bold conversation at a time. **There’s no better time than NOW for you to join us... Because we’re seeing it** **in “Red” states and “Blue” states:** 🔥 Students standing tall for this country
🔥 Overflowing crowds shouting that they’re “PROUD to be an American!”🔥 Hands in the air to get their own “47” and “MAGA” hats
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhv40d7l7ddcvcc3f21lvqaouohol3dq225q6hag_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60o33cjh2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I Won in Court—Help Me Keep Fighting for Truth
body:
This isn’t just my win—it’s a win for free speech. Project Veritas tried to block me, claiming I intimidate witnesses. The judge rejected that, calling it irrational and affirming my right to uncover the truth.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zttc7ohk4sv5oo86f25mhn4bhl40p6rlaa00ku8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5mt79s3c5n8g51o0nkmoelnq47tkjtjnqjtkfq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is James O'Keefe, and for 14 years, I've been an investigative journalist exposing corruption--from ACORN to Pfizer. But today, I'm writing to you about a personal fight that could end my career [**unless people like you step up**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zob1qa2g8840c10fulphc2ph6ndp6hkgrgiapi9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs).

I founded Project Veritas and built it into a force for truth.

After our biggest investigation yet, the board I appointed ousted me. Now, they're suing me in federal court to stop my new organization, OMG, and silence my reporting. But this week, I scored a **major victory** : the judge ruled in my favor, allowing me to continue deposing witnesses and extending the deadline to August 15th.

This isn't just my win--it's a **win for free speech**. Project Veritas tried to block me, claiming I intimidate witnesses. The judge rejected that, calling it irrational and affirming my right to uncover the truth. But with **eight depositions left** , costing a minimum of **$61,375** , [**I can 't do it alone.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zura6fnjl7mg0pqmtlg17n37rr25l2j1hpddt7cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)

Here's why this matters: my work has changed the game, exposing corruption that powerful people want hidden. This lawsuit is their final attack to shut me down. [**Will you help me raise**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg014q2v3vghu80cstb87k0bqpi98md19fanqcb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)**[**$61,375**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5kkb90628t6sok8kqmqqr5jsnbmet79qpjs87n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)**[**to finish these depositions and keep fighting?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm92hmptc20h7acfppvhr2u6pu19shokc604ola0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)

[**Please, help me in get through this battle by donating today.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zud8re9ij7kbe9ha1f35cd665v01sa1crc81i0pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)

The stakes are high. In court, we revealed threats like "chew on my heart and eat it" from a former board member and violent insults from their lawyer. The judge was shocked--but I'm not surprised. This is what truth-tellers face.

[**Your support through Liberty Guard can defend me and the journalism that holds power accountable.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z861uq062l6atdsj2lsapapoc5uhshl4v7vi84k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)

Thank you for considering this. Together, we can protect the truth.

Respectfully,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have until **August 15th** to raise **$61,375**. [**Please donate today!**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7mjictvq8i5ulvvlo2iatdv4s85goo54d4fss80_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c9h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu3bbhditvfcl4q0aeni89bmph23nfvq2b0lpldg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn5ekv5vpbsmh59tab1ntsck362tnkqvtvpphra0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c1h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgalmfm4sgapfll031som89b7hik7ia7rpsvd83g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c1h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2k8vbhg56olruhiu84vb4d69vu6fu18tnkiqhug_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c1h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztk5sl422e303s84o8qt5mh86j78dqrghp6nqvf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg60p76c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.

Hillsdale College

name: JAG
subject: One of these things is not like the others
body:
Right now, there are three statues in Duffy Square, the northern triangle of Times Square in New York City.

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdvue82nvpt6cp9415rpkodqn2bq99eqojoj4kv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs) Friend,

Right now, there are three statues in Duffy Square, the northern triangle of Times Square in New York City.

One depicts Father Francis Duffy, a priest and World War 1 war hero for whom Duffy Square is named.

The next one depicts playwright George M. Cohan, the founding “father of the modern Broadway musical."

However, the most recently installed statue, entitled _Grounded in the Stars_ , is a 12-foot statue of an anonymous black woman (it’s not even a depiction of a real person) standing with her hands on her hips in frumpy jeans and a t-shirt.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z75cfsukrppj3csae40r6l4d8sj67rosjvges558_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)
This comes at a time when New York has already removed statues of critically influential historical figures like Thomas Jefferson and Teddy Roosevelt.

Don’t get me wrong... I’m a fan of art.

Ayn Rand herself even called art _“the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_ But what _moral_ _ideal_ is this statue, _Grounded in the Stars_ , meant to communicate? An elevation of the average, the ordinary, or (in the woke world) the “oppressed”?

Truly great art historically has elevated the extraordinary, the beautiful, spiritually inspiring in men a moral ambition to reach for a better version of themselves. In _The Fountainhead_ , Ayn Rand captured how envy and nihilism drive artists and intellectuals to subvert art to destroy man’s moral ambition.

In the words of the novel’s villain, Marxist architecture critic Ellsworth Toohey: “Kill man’s sense of values. Kill his capacity to recognize greatness or to achieve it... Make man feel small. Make him feel guilty.”

If we want the next generation to _**aspire**_ to greatness, then we need to _**inspire**_ the next generation with art that communicates _noble_ moral ideals, like reason, individualism, benevolence, productivity, and achievement!

The Atlas Society uses _real_ art to make Ayn Rand’s masterpieces come to life in visually dramatic ways for the next generation.

[If you agree with Ayn Rand’s belief in the boundless potential of the human spirit, please donate today to help us counter those who twist art to debase humanity.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziptfudu6clmr1on1a5l504bgr9vpb6fl56cav00_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8a07mt4jkj702kj3dumh23fhopjo1gdcmd1mnbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)
Another reason we lean into art at The Atlas Society: Fifty years ago, 70% of young people read books every day for fun. Today, that number has fallen to only 12%!

_So, how can we make the ideas in Ayn Rand’s books accessible to the next generation?_

**The Atlas Society blends art and technology to market Ayn Rand’s ideas to new audiences through various vehicles.**

We pioneered cutting-edge technology to create proprietary AI models that transform live action with actors into anime for productions like our book trailer for _Atlas Shrugged_ , featuring Dagny Taggart on a hunt to find the mysterious destroyer of the world.

**That one video alone attracted 12 MILLION views and doubled book sales of the novel!** This success inspired us to invest in similar animated trailers for _The Fountainhead_ and _ANTHEM_ , along with videos about the philosophy of Objectivism.

And, while reading may be on the decline, the popularity of graphic novels among young people is soaring.

**That’s why The Atlas Society developed a plan to capitalize on this growing graphic novel market...**

We recruited an award-winning Marvel Comics illustrator to create graphic novel versions of _ANTHEM_ , _Red Pawn_ , and _TOP SECRET_ by blending philosophically rich content with dynamic visuals and compelling narratives to present these ideas in a format that speaks directly to young readers.

**With your support, we can continue to innovate new, artistic ways to reach _even more_ young people with Ayn Rand’s ideas and inspire them to embrace a life of achievement.** [Donate $10 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znr6r6fh4gqtf64naa7oteoip81n534p8phsph7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z64nrl6tdvdsefqk31m5b83mv7sadeae6an8jc70_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4m8eakemhmma7m10dcnr78rd41mbn42bvecnfkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z83p2btscb3r8cu7kb03ml87d2u7r1k6j08uq140_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z32bt83i7okc15pcrhnmqatued7doamo051g4q10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zra1norqt6vs6576ncabq1gjuprfq5og662br9r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zefketv2v4eekjktvmm42bfl80qgegealg2ol0qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zorms110698tbc5k7g2nvas52ctf6nufk3orbd98_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)
Every generation needs art that speaks to them.

But whether that art inspires them to rise up and meet the challenges of our time with reason, courage, and ambition or causes them to shrink from greatness, seduced by the false promises of collectivism, victimhood, and moral relativism, depends on what they are shown.

The _Grounded in the Stars_ statue certainly embodies a worldview...
A worldview of mediocrity devoid of meaning. Nothing about that sculpture challenges viewers to aspire to a noble pursuit or overcome their circumstances.

**At The Atlas Society, we believe young people are capable of greatness, and we take every opportunity to present them with art that challenges them to maximize their potential, challenge perceived limitations, and break free from the victim mentality.**

That’s why we’re introducing the next generation to the ideas of Ayn Rand through powerful stories, stunning artwork, and unflinching moral clarity.

But we can’t do it without your help.

**Will you make a tax-deductible donation today to help us inspire the next generation to live with purpose and pursue greatness?**
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9loh4gs0ch1k79c1hcnimn7pm8sfm7udfnb0n40_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6cor6chh2bs)
With gratitude,

Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
CEO , The Atlas Society

__The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.__

clean_body: Right now, there are three statues in Duffy Square, the northern triangle of Times Square in New York City. | | | Friend, Right now, there are three statues in Duffy Square, the northern triangle of Times Square in New York City. One depicts Father Francis Duffy, a priest and World War 1 war hero for whom Duffy Square is named. The next one depicts playwright George M. Cohan, the founding “father of the modern Broadway musical." However, the most recently installed statue, entitled Grounded in the Stars , is a 12-foot statue of an anonymous black woman (it’s not even a depiction of a real person) standing with her hands on her hips in frumpy jeans and a t-shirt. This comes at a time when New York has already removed statues of critically influential historical figures like Thomas Jefferson and Teddy Roosevelt. Don’t get me wrong... I’m a fan of art. Ayn Rand herself even called art “the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.” But what moral ideal is this statue, Grounded in the Stars , meant to communicate? An elevation of the average, the ordinary, or (in the woke world) the “oppressed”? Truly great art historically has elevated the extraordinary, the beautiful, spiritually inspiring in men a moral ambition to reach for a better version of themselves. In The Fountainhead , Ayn Rand captured how envy and nihilism drive artists and intellectuals to subvert art to destroy man’s moral ambition. In the words of the novel’s villain, Marxist architecture critic Ellsworth Toohey: “Kill man’s sense of values. Kill his capacity to recognize greatness or to achieve it... Make man feel small. Make him feel guilty.” If we want the next generation to aspire to greatness, then we need to inspire the next generation with art that communicates noble moral ideals, like reason, individualism, benevolence, productivity, and achievement! The Atlas Society uses real art to make Ayn Rand’s masterpieces come to life in visually dramatic ways for the next generation. Another reason we lean into art at The Atlas Society: Fifty years ago, 70% of young people read books every day for fun. Today, that number has fallen to only 12%! So, how can we make the ideas in Ayn Rand’s books accessible to the next generation? The Atlas Society blends art and technology to market Ayn Rand’s ideas to new audiences through various vehicles. We pioneered cutting-edge technology to create proprietary AI models that transform live action with actors into anime for productions like our book trailer for Atlas Shrugged , featuring Dagny Taggart on a hunt to find the mysterious destroyer of the world. That one video alone attracted 12 MILLION views and doubled book sales of the novel! This success inspired us to invest in similar animated trailers for The Fountainhead and ANTHEM , along with videos about the philosophy of Objectivism. And, while reading may be on the decline, the popularity of graphic novels among young people is soaring. That’s why The Atlas Society developed a plan to capitalize on this growing graphic novel market... We recruited an award-winning Marvel Comics illustrator to create graphic novel versions of ANTHEM , Red Pawn , and TOP SECRET by blending philosophically rich content with dynamic visuals and compelling narratives to present these ideas in a format that speaks directly to young readers. With your support, we can continue to innovate new, artistic ways to reach even more young people with Ayn Rand’s ideas and inspire them to embrace a life of achievement. Every generation needs art that speaks to them. But whether that art inspires them to rise up and meet the challenges of our time with reason, courage, and ambition or causes them to shrink from greatness, seduced by the false promises of collectivism, victimhood, and moral relativism, depends on what they are shown. The Grounded in the Stars statue certainly embodies a worldview... A worldview of mediocrity devoid of meaning. Nothing about that sculpture challenges viewers to aspire to a noble pursuit or overcome their circumstances. At The Atlas Society, we believe young people are capable of greatness, and we take every opportunity to present them with art that challenges them to maximize their potential, challenge perceived limitations, and break free from the victim mentality. That’s why we’re introducing the next generation to the ideas of Ayn Rand through powerful stories, stunning artwork, and unflinching moral clarity. But we can’t do it without your help. Will you make a tax-deductible donation today to help us inspire the next generation to live with purpose and pursue greatness? With gratitude, Jennifer Grossman (JAG) CEO , The Atlas Society The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. name: JAG
subject: One of these things is not like the others
body:
Right now, there are three statues in Duffy Square, the northern triangle of Times Square in New York City.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6189923fmm6t4fles5g6689p4ju2i0iu35hrdf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs) Friend,

Right now, there are three statues in Duffy Square, the northern triangle of Times Square in New York City.

One depicts Father Francis Duffy, a priest and World War 1 war hero for whom Duffy Square is named.

The next one depicts playwright George M. Cohan, the founding “father of the modern Broadway musical."

However, the most recently installed statue, entitled _Grounded in the Stars_ , is a 12-foot statue of an anonymous black woman (it’s not even a depiction of a real person) standing with her hands on her hips in frumpy jeans and a t-shirt.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvr125uttfc1f6sq1nelc9i0r4gfm2frk7j5ih10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)
This comes at a time when New York has already removed statues of critically influential historical figures like Thomas Jefferson and Teddy Roosevelt.

Don’t get me wrong... I’m a fan of art.

Ayn Rand herself even called art _“the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_ But what _moral_ _ideal_ is this statue, _Grounded in the Stars_ , meant to communicate? An elevation of the average, the ordinary, or (in the woke world) the “oppressed”?

Truly great art historically has elevated the extraordinary, the beautiful, spiritually inspiring in men a moral ambition to reach for a better version of themselves. In _The Fountainhead_ , Ayn Rand captured how envy and nihilism drive artists and intellectuals to subvert art to destroy man’s moral ambition.

In the words of the novel’s villain, Marxist architecture critic Ellsworth Toohey: “Kill man’s sense of values. Kill his capacity to recognize greatness or to achieve it... Make man feel small. Make him feel guilty.”

If we want the next generation to _**aspire**_ to greatness, then we need to _**inspire**_ the next generation with art that communicates _noble_ moral ideals, like reason, individualism, benevolence, productivity, and achievement!

The Atlas Society uses _real_ art to make Ayn Rand’s masterpieces come to life in visually dramatic ways for the next generation.

[If you agree with Ayn Rand’s belief in the boundless potential of the human spirit, please donate today to help us counter those who twist art to debase humanity.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv0va2jssre6orohr723r6ca1pjfgfq53thpbico_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlfm2mglffkl7g55tv73ouu8ffe4bgg2n5i61ha8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)
Another reason we lean into art at The Atlas Society: Fifty years ago, 70% of young people read books every day for fun. Today, that number has fallen to only 12%!

_So, how can we make the ideas in Ayn Rand’s books accessible to the next generation?_

**The Atlas Society blends art and technology to market Ayn Rand’s ideas to new audiences through various vehicles.**

We pioneered cutting-edge technology to create proprietary AI models that transform live action with actors into anime for productions like our book trailer for _Atlas Shrugged_ , featuring Dagny Taggart on a hunt to find the mysterious destroyer of the world.

**That one video alone attracted 12 MILLION views and doubled book sales of the novel!** This success inspired us to invest in similar animated trailers for _The Fountainhead_ and _ANTHEM_ , along with videos about the philosophy of Objectivism.

And, while reading may be on the decline, the popularity of graphic novels among young people is soaring.

**That’s why The Atlas Society developed a plan to capitalize on this growing graphic novel market...**

We recruited an award-winning Marvel Comics illustrator to create graphic novel versions of _ANTHEM_ , _Red Pawn_ , and _TOP SECRET_ by blending philosophically rich content with dynamic visuals and compelling narratives to present these ideas in a format that speaks directly to young readers.

**With your support, we can continue to innovate new, artistic ways to reach _even more_ young people with Ayn Rand’s ideas and inspire them to embrace a life of achievement.** [Donate $10 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeotb84k6bhegio1tgic3op7fbk70qgoa1mhs5j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu9qs3lg3v5e0brgtbjl5tkgp6385uiert83cktg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv18giltc71mhpdlu4690otsv0fgn8mml9l0n9k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb4kp8jk638q8bav81mc7olbm59k0mmalea50qe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zribr9odcfo8tedub2tpjmo5o53si19ljlvqab7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlsltdfouvje1gaimmbkm4ve9ll1d8b14kcrgivg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsdjni2l59oen5h6ubhl187spkpij8hveujp0n30_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z219b9lugvvsvtnoc8c7bp95f2hadpj461depfpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)
Every generation needs art that speaks to them.

But whether that art inspires them to rise up and meet the challenges of our time with reason, courage, and ambition or causes them to shrink from greatness, seduced by the false promises of collectivism, victimhood, and moral relativism, depends on what they are shown.

The _Grounded in the Stars_ statue certainly embodies a worldview...
A worldview of mediocrity devoid of meaning. Nothing about that sculpture challenges viewers to aspire to a noble pursuit or overcome their circumstances.

**At The Atlas Society, we believe young people are capable of greatness, and we take every opportunity to present them with art that challenges them to maximize their potential, challenge perceived limitations, and break free from the victim mentality.**

That’s why we’re introducing the next generation to the ideas of Ayn Rand through powerful stories, stunning artwork, and unflinching moral clarity.

But we can’t do it without your help.

**Will you make a tax-deductible donation today to help us inspire the next generation to live with purpose and pursue greatness?**
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z08dr3f1he1iuqifnae05t5t9i75h0b794iaahkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6aob2c5h2bs)
With gratitude,

Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
CEO , The Atlas Society

__The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.__

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The “pardon-proof” witch hunt to jail me for life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me.

I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z83f7ar3c2a1nflmgub4582anq3df7np5cbh806g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6eoj5cjh2bs)
---
My God, Friend...
---
_Has it really come to this?_
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my good friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
But what the radical Democrats and the Deep State are trying to do to those of us who’ve _REFUSED_ to surrender to tyranny will destroy our once free Republic forever.
---
**Today, all due to bogus state-level charges schemed up by a Democrat Attorney General in Arizona, I'm staring down the possibility of spending the rest of my years in PRISON!**
---
My crime? Helping to defend Donald J. Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_And on top of it all, because the Democrats concocted these sham criminal charges at the _state level_ , President Trump won’t even be able to issue a federal pardon to save me. _
---
But rest assured, while things may look bleak, I will **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER**!
---
My whole life, I’ve always been known as a fighter. And at 80 years old, I’m _still_ fighting back against these Deep State goons!
---
**And while the President cannot save me from the Democrats’ vindictive scheme, there is _ONE_ thing that still can... **
---
**_...The collective voice of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU._**
---
That’s why today, I’m asking you to ADD YOUR NAME to the [**“Rudy Giuliani Freedom Petition: DROP ALL CHARGES!”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjiaica7utrvighthcke45glgq9rqromhfq6tf58_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6eoj5cjh2bs)

__
---

Friend, the leftist thugs who had me unjustly booked in one of the most violent jails in America filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757**.
---
_So, how fitting would it be to collect**2,313,757** petition signatures from true America patriots like you demanding they DROP ALL CHARGES? _
---
[**Please help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to the “Rudy Giuliani Freedom Petition: DROP ALL CHARGES!”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgh29ajuv1mtqqee27qkm71dofqbt0pn68e2qd4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clg6eoj5cjh2bs)

Thank you and God bless you,
---

# Saturday, June 21, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1997, the WNBA played its first official basketball game, pitting the Los Angeles Sparks against the New York Liberty at Great Western Forum, home of the Lakers. You can [see a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwQ5zuQI6BcXf2M3fbmlQLsosikFGM2-_cV9h25MvJyfn6zk8bYhhm__blUzxadjoOiKVQnko-b3u732h6KYUI810pRzdQQMCKg6aoxicDfEzyMoZT4TUVGREq0ABoFbVYrzTY9NZKRoaXQfKWmU7ob1F2bQCRBXM3QYahQCQKGto1NTIUanW4vhoFZNALpSU61cKW1nIx086KddTWqtollL2gzX_GPYM--u6am8nGlP6vsEdbaNl2J_BUToY9q_3RhwFF49Hy8tC_Abch3wUPtuVOJ2UGfZdK6BD3ekOtdCSYV9l4_YrxBgO3TIJ82pD_J1R_vTdafAnAAD__zcSf80).

Are you a jigsaw puzzle fan? If so, don’t miss our story below about what archaeologists are calling the “world’s most difficult” puzzle—the fitting together of thousands of pieces of a 2,000-year-old Roman fresco. Take a look at[ the puzzle-making process here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1ugzAUBeCnMVvQ9cWGZPDQhS1dOyL_XIKrS4yME4s-fUVfoduRjvRJ53zdp7uNHJ-PT7uSKXOanlR3plIoTyW_1u21LcTBJ2Z6UE2Zw04TAuoL9BeUU7CRj0k1wcxESF1DRg4aNAD2ulkMSbLU3bxzs5Od10QeVA96tlfytscmmlODHqUEUKha6LTvlNN6sOhugxYKKMSScvud4rMsNPOR3pRbn9aGzVLKtovuQ-AocKy1ts75sxM4nmMEjjaX6JnO6PWhq-Twcw2pySZsNTLHvR-EgsdqI_-p5V9XvA3-BgAA__9Mq3Mr).

## Court Backs Trump Use of National Guard
A federal appeals court [ruled unanimously Thursday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOiNjbAiFi2vocu2VyOAFHC1eZG_C5e9P5BeuHs1o3vu5j3cXMMT12-1geaExwpkRmCGNnJ778Tw2QD8TIqxwUkKfYVRSGSFboerRu4DvUZfeLgAKmhJs3RlppFStKTfrtfF9raVvfWuWm2t6tUytX-puuvXNpMtgrzXZqrqWUitdycbMjZ6M6Zya-s4UWoIPTKl6UIi8wYJvekGqZtpLtBvzkYvmq1BDoYbzPKuFfi-KKy_UcBAGDnMu1PABEnmmBFns7kFJnCEKt7oQM4urRLuYHDOCiI4DRYdifbrkxUyRE2GZrD_OgBhy2xVarrsL-HnC_9L3suovAAD___76h6c) that President Trump had made a lawful decision to send the California National Guard to Los Angeles and could keep control of the operation.

The ruling by the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals blocked a lower court ruling that ordered command of the Guard be turned over to California Gov. Gavin Newsom. Trump’s lawyers said the president took over California's National Guard to restore order and to protect Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents as they conducted raids across Los Angeles. The three-judge panel said [Trump was within his rights](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFutDAQBOCnMd2h9WLj-wsXf0N3aVMiYy_gaMHI-M65t4_IK6QbaaRPmvl8jA8XOe7Lh9vIljmNO9WTqRTKY8nP7XgeK3HwiZkWqilzOGlEQH2D_oZyDC7ye1RNsDMRUteQlUaDBsBeN6tVRhrnXC-VUR563c1zh_dw95rC7ICaaC8NepQSQKFqodO-U5PWxuH0z2ihgEIsKbdfKe5lpZnf6UW59Wlr2K6lHKfo_gscBA611naa_NUJHK4xAgeXS_RMV_SSwOzBfEuTmmzDUSNzPHsjFCybi_yrlj9d8bL4EwAA__876HG7) to order the troops into service to "protect federal personnel" and property. Trump called it a "big win."
## Record Travel Expected for July 4 Holiday
A record [72 million Americans ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOtCAQhJ8Gb5imBc0cOPwXb_Nf92gQ2pFNIwYZzbz9xn2FvVXyVapS9fWcni5y3F7_XSJblzxtdB1MtVKZanmn_b2vxMFnZnrRlQuHgyYENBJ6iWoKLvJn0k2wCxFS15BVgwEDgL1pVqvRGxf8opVbQGMAjUrNBA9Qjxm6uYn2ToMelQLQqFvojO_0bMzgcH4MRmigEGsu7XeOW11p4U8-qbQ-p4btWut-iO6fwFHgeF1X6-fjXnFzgeMtBY7HOyUqshZ3EkvnnBxQpsgc8yZdohK9225jU2zYrxsc_SA0vJKL_NtV_3TQafEnAAD__6sTemE)are expected to hit the road for the upcoming July 4 holiday weekend, with new highs predicted for both drivers and air travelers.

One key reason: July 4 falls on a Friday, creating the opportunity for a nine-day Independence Day holiday period, from June 28-July 6, potentially covering two weekends.

AAA is forecasting that [61.6 million people will travel by car](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOgzAQheHTmC5oGGxIChfb0GXbLa3BHgdHQ4yMkyi3X7FX2P7p09P_c3VXSpIet29a2daY3YPfu3CtXFwtz3V7bgtL8FmEb_zORcLODgHNCYYTdi5Qko_TTbCRGblv2HajAQOAg2kWG8JMbDyf6TLHGIHHQEF7TzwynM--SfbQYMCuA9CoW-iN7_VszEg4X0ajNHBINZf2ntOjLhzlk19cWp_XRuxS67ar_kvhpHA67pec15aIjoHC6eAVTjAonO5P-eiYC3vaq8KpKTZs7ySS9mFUGm4rJfmD679qvCz-BgAA___i9XPT), a 2.2% increase over last year, and the highest volume on record. The association expects 5.84 million travelers will fly to their destinations, a 1.4% increase over the previous record.
## Lists: Best and Worst College Degrees
