name: Total Bowel Release
subject: Flush 12-15lbs of poop (MUST SEE)
body:
It can result in an instantly flatter, more attractive belly...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21586/6374453/6599f726de33f593d53eb7e7357ddd4209fd2755/e365bf74ca44bdd79607894b0f3ac02ac4d6e3a3)
---
| | |
---
_June 21st, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | Stop dieting.

No, seriously, do not ever try another diet again.

If you want to look and feel thinner almost instantly, just flush out the stuck poop the been building up in your gut.

No I am NOT talking about a colon cleanse!

Studies from recent ER visits show the average person is carrying around 12 to 17lbs of poop that's clinging to the walls of their gut and bowels...

And in some extreme cases up to a horrifying 25lbs of stuck poop in their gut...

Forming a giant “poop log” in the gut.

So even if you poop 2-3x per week, poop gradually clings to the walls of the guy and bowels causing your belly to stick out...

Adding pounds to the scale...

And causing gas, smelly farts and bloating.

ER doctor, Dr. Joseph Feuerstein was frustrated his patients couldn’t lose weight.

Plus diets and exercise weren’t working for many people and in some cases they even GAINED weight from diet and exercise.

Desperate for a solution, he found a hidden cause of weight gain and big belly related to poop buildup in the gut.

Working nights and weekends, he developed a powerful yet gentle **[“blue poo” tonic](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21586/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/e365bf74ca44bdd79607894b0f3ac02ac4d6e3a3)** that can flush your bowels clean...

Leading to satisfying relief...

And the release of 12-17 pounds of stuck poop.

NO this does not involve a colon cleanse, fiber, laxatives or stool softeners.

This is something completely new and wasn’t even available in the USA until late 2023.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21586/6374453/6599f726de33f593d53eb7e7357ddd4209fd2755/e365bf74ca44bdd79607894b0f3ac02ac4d6e3a3)
---
Yet it can result in an instantly flatter, more attractive belly...

Free from gas, bloating, indigestion...

And of course...

The newfound ability to fully empty your bowels every time you need to go to the bathroom.

Many people were SHOCKED at what this tonic caused to come out of their body...

But at the same time...

Happy with their instantly-flatter belly...

And the ability to enjoy activity and intimacy with their partners again without discomfort, gas, or bloating.

The best part?

Because this blue poo tonic normalizes your bowel movements...

You can enjoy any and all of your favorite foods... like pizza, cheeseburgers and shakes.

And STILL maintain a flatter belly – free of stuck poop!

Like Mildred from Orlando, Florida who said:

“I’d been dealing with stuck stool on and off for the last five years, this blue poo method helped me get back to the smooth, natural daily bowel movements I love and no more camping out on the toilet!”

==> [Click here to see how to get a flatter belly overnight by eliminating stuck poop!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21586/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/e365bf74ca44bdd79607894b0f3ac02ac4d6e3a3)

The best part is...

This tonic is 100% natural...

And you can mix it from the comfort of your own home!

Ivy League doctors are stunned at how well this works better than any mainstream constipation solution.

Simply click [here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21586/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/e365bf74ca44bdd79607894b0f3ac02ac4d6e3a3) to get the recipe now.

# Saturday, June 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1902, trial lawyer [Percy Eugene Foreman](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQQOHTmA40_gHjwkUauk2bEo3XA1gx9sp4F_b2UXKFXOA96fu6zTcMMaT1E3ey9VrynOg8ItVKZXa5eConxrg8kw9ppevKyT3DLED0LQyt4LPHEN-zarx14A1vyHLdQw9Sg2o2a8iAXsSoR-nNqJwC1Ih8NE4BDAhNsL8xGATnHLjUneyNGKQbpVEwSFyYAvKh5tLVjSpdeCzxnV9Uunvem2i3Wh8Hkx9MTExM53l29dgwpxgSdbmsTEwbJu9y_mZiolRLoIOJacmFdkztg8r93dJzpURNsf5xhhjDMWimYN0xxL9P_Z_Oy4qfAAAA__94JXn-) was born in Bold Springs. Among his most famous clients were James Earl Ray, assassin of Martin Luther King Jr., and Charles Harrelson, father of actors Brett and Woody. Nothing says summer like a move to the desert. If that's your vibe, check out [this dome home](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OqzAURldjOpD_HQoXr6HLa6dEJr7GVzI2Y0xCdj_KbGG6r_h0jnS-7vPdYcK8_ncb2HaFMmd4HQlagzovpXqoL5dSOLPHvMJ1lbycOHPKVU91z9nsHab3LDtvF-pH1oFlRlFFhaGyi3ZRPigjpOGjEU7R0QsDgmoN_LawEDq0HxjVnDFGmTCDUCPXYrmJUVItXCCSgsdW6tAiNLjcEdK7PKEOj7J1ycbW9oOIf4RPhE9HLPuOeR3eLpbyuRA-udrwkYDw6cz4fULvywb9Ed0Ovo-fvZUzN4e5Z4orKYyQQ2xb6qr1-wtTwkMbIum6OUy_3va3Wk_LfwIAAP__8pN-ng) in the Hueco Tanks area recently listed for $600,000. We’ve got a special first-time sponsor today: [**Tecovas**.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQANDT2F2sYcAmFBS_SZe0v0TgGSessImAOM7tV7tX2As86f2_uquPKW73m1_ZtmPJbuN3TdwaFxdyIS5vn9Ly2ihudz6OvIVXdAg4nmA6oXDkY_o41ZMNQEb0bIUeYQSpQfUPS2qhMJEmPUOgM2qhFJvgvR8JZwx9tD8YTCiEACH1IEeDkwxnaRRM0i-dAqbYchnagxsfvi7pk3cuw5zXPtlHa8_ayX8dXjq8NJ7z7utQv_Yh5g4vN7N-zN4XS893TCnWSXcK7quP6Rdof2vvFr8DAAD__9CebHA) You probably already know the name, but now’s the perfect time to refresh your summer wardrobe with some of their timeless western wear staples. What you might not know: _The Texas Flyover_ founder and several of our team swear by their Tecovas boots. They’re comfortable, sharp, and built to last. [Do us (and your closet) a favor—check them out today. You won’t regret it.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQANDT2F2sYcAmFBS_SZe0v0TgGSessImAOM7tV7tX2As86f2_uquPKW73m1_ZtmPJbuN3TdwaFxdyIS5vn9Ly2ihudz6OvIVXdAg4nmA6oXDkY_o41ZMNQEb0bIUeYQSpQfUPS2qhMJEmPUOgM2qhFJvgvR8JZwx9tD8YTCiEACH1IEeDkwxnaRRM0i-dAqbYchnagxsfvi7pk3cuw5zXPtlHa8_ayX8dXjq8NJ7z7utQv_Yh5g4vN7N-zN4XS893TCnWSXcK7quP6Rdof2vvFr8DAAD__9CebHA)

## Texas Halts New Funding for Border Wall
The Texas Legislature voted in the final hours of its session to stop any new funding for the construction of the [border wall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSsyAUBeCn0Q4HLghaUPxNuvztlg6Eq7mzKBkkwbz9jtlH2P7ec-Y7X9fp6ijStvx3K9pyzGnasO4RS8E8-ZQD5upinJ9boG3B40ibf9IEHHrGNQMxBUfxPak2WM_DKFq0wvS859Jw1d7tTYJScpw9GBMG4cD0vTbDqG-owyhUS_YM4xqEEFxI08l-BC39IEfFtXRzozgGKil35Y4FD7fP8Z1emLtbWtto76U89kb-a-DSwKXW2p2Eivh9HjRw-fywgCdiZ78odqoYrSst2RVKG1syLsx5n0phwAcDgrfZhkelGGnXplF8WR3FT2v521YvCz8BAAD__wDPfk4), leaving about 740 miles of the planned 806-mile wall incomplete. Lawmakers approved a [$3.4 billion budget](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOqL12hi7cHFNulx7JbLxQlYyODJOQt7-RP5H-MvRaGb0zb_bePOceFv--pVcPeY8bvTeE9VKZQy5RCpvn9L83CJvCx1H3sKTRwTsO9AdijF6Tp9RtdEFiFa05MTQQw9yANXenZmCmKepN4gKNEgj7GBBUkBF3hjfsjvLQKMQAoQcLrK3qGUw0irQ0s-NAopcc7nUO1U6_D6nT35RuUx5bZO71_rYG_mnwWuDV_84AU7rFKXylKjB6zfX_QB1J1HH68pL8ZXz1gVjbfBaKmP1PEjlCW2P0yRENELE0BYXH29OiXc9NAqW1XP6ztffnfZy-D8AAP__mfN_Tw) for border security with little debate, but no funds were allocated for border wall construction. The majority of funding is headed to the Department of Public Safety and the Texas National Guard. Gov. Abbott said in a statement this week that border wall construction would continue on [active contracts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO5CAQRb8GZ7SgeNkBwSbOZtMNLR6FG4mGEabbPX-_8qz2CyYqla50dM_987F9uFxy3X-7B9rxTm2reB4Fx8C--dYj9tOVkp415rrj-92qf-YNGCjKNAW-RZfL1yanaD2LC5_QcqOYYsIwOd2tElEthsugTGCLATAeeUTNvAvSJDVle8GYBs4548LchFpACz-LRTItXCKSYcyj9du448C3O1L5ai_st9AeU7H3MT4PIn4RWAms53nezuTcFRJYXzliI7BeVgTW0oIrBNZvzP9L_3nSS5SGVo_Rn2HkVq9n5PrEg-4dd-q8b2MQWGE2lAehNcySgvSGyhiQujQjnRMzPsnoUbGp2_h55lLyoQ2RbH-4XL5rj5-N_bLwNwAA___OcZKm).
## Paul Mitchell Parent Company Moving to Texas
Hair care giant John Paul Mitchell Systems—parent company for Paul Mitchell, Tea Tree, and Neuro—is [relocating its headquarters](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuunDAQxvGngc7IF66FizR0J21KNODxMtFgb2xzYN8-2u1Sp__r00_fr6_lC4gpPH7CgbbcPi4Br8xYCqZljclhuoDZn8FReOB9x7CetGipOyF7odXigPi1tLWzq3STqtGqoZOdNINs6936YcRR-W70ZpUAk95cL8EBeFxHg31N9j0me62UksoMjekm3Zt1NFMrewO-aiU6KjE1ZceCN2TPr_iNqdniUbPdS3nmyvyo9Fzp-bquxsd7PTMFzPndVHpOWIC40vPvuAfxhJPFQWXbkVnkVy54ZJGQ4wYFxY7g_pyQCqYsfIqH2IDJxxQIxAfwT1In654XMVPuh6qVjwOIP7byf49-W_03AAD__wI5kG4) from California to North Texas, bringing a $12 million investment and adding 80 new jobs. To sweeten the deal, Texas awarded the company a $640,000 grant as Gov. Greg Abbott celebrated the move, saying, _"Texas is the headquarters of headquarters."_ The new corporate headquarters and a product distribution center will be located in Wilmer in [southern Dallas County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGSpCAURb8GM7oAUTQw2MRsNt3QesCjZesJPYBj-_dbM7-w8a26p06dPx_bB0SK6fkbDlzaO-Qt4VUJW8Oy2Vw8lguIwpl8TE98v3OyZ9yUUAMXI1dy8xDp3nTnFyv8LDtcpBnEIHojdLcvTisLYxBhcpNXxirjpRjRwgzSWWm6uHyfiVFJKYXszaMfZjX2dupnLcYeAtMCfWy5PNqODd9QA935C8vD5aOjZW_tVVn_i6mVqfW6rscVAL5HplYoLTpCptYjJ7yZWu1ZY8JamVodUAy5pAjc5eMF6eY7gv88oTQslf_A-N-8J_6Ck_gRm9uRiNe7Njwq3z-5ByKo3OUztZtfkQ4sTK1qMtz3xmpvBt4Hp7n2dubgUPJpdt5I5aS0oSuLf12RKNbRMC2eB0T6EWv_l-NrUf8CAAD__92DoUQ), according to Abbott's office.
## Texans Make Richest Self-Made Women List
[Nine Texas women](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOhCAUgOHTYKd5PAS1oNjGbrbd0qA8RhKUCTCDc_vN7BW2_pOv-H9uy8344M_7tzlIl8vF5aSaA5VCaVljspSqCcE9T-vPO11XPNenXxBQtqBa5Is1PryXvrF6BTvxhjQfJEgQA_TNrmF0gE5aM_VCDduIdpPbZAgVSmvXsfH6g4FCzjlwMXRCTqjEOoqpByWMYz2Q9SWmruxU6DLZhXd8Ueq2eDRB76U8MhNfDGeGc621czGtlD-Z4ZwpuPYwltoaDzoZzk3S9lF9CD6rgfVwP4wPf1j534KXxt8AAAD__2K2cAg) were featured in a new list from Forbes ranking the richest self-made women in America in 2025. Pacing the Texans is Thai Lee, CEO of IT infrastructure company SHI International. Heading the largest women-owned organization in the U.S., Lee’s net worth is $6.1 billion—good enough for No. 6 on the list. The list assesses not only net worth but also how far each woman had to climb to make her fortune. Robyn Jones, who started her own business out of frustration that her truck-driving husband was always on the road, is the next Texan at No. 28. Tied with Jones at No. 28 is SpaceX president and COO Gwynne Shotwell, followed by Austin-based jewelry designer Kendra Scott at No. 41. You can see the [full list here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOhCAUgOHTYKd5PAS1oNjGbrbd0qA8RhKUCTCDc_vN7BW2_pOv-H9uy8344M_7tzlIl8vF5aSaA5VCaVljspSqCcE9T-vPO11XPNenXxBQtqBa5Is1PryXvrF6BTvxhjQfJEgQA_TNrmF0gE5aM_VCDduIdpPbZAgVSmvXsfH6g4FCzjlwMXRCTqjEOoqpByWMYz2Q9SWmruxU6DLZhXd8Ueq2eDRB76U8MhNfDGeGc621czGtlD-Z4ZwpuPYwltoaDzoZzk3S9lF9CD6rgfVwP4wPf1j534KXxt8AAAD__2K2cAg).
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQANDT2F2sYcAmFBS_SZe0v0TgGSessImAOM7tV7tX2As86f2_uquPKW73m1_ZtmPJbuN3TdwaFxdyIS5vn9Ly2ihudz6OvIVXdAg4nmA6oXDkY_o41ZMNQEb0bIUeYQSpQfUPS2qhMJEmPUOgM2qhFJvgvR8JZwx9tD8YTCiEACH1IEeDkwxnaRRM0i-dAqbYchnagxsfvi7pk3cuw5zXPtlHa8_ayX8dXjq8NJ7z7utQv_Yh5g4vN7N-zN4XS893TCnWSXcK7quP6Rdof2vvFr8DAAD__9CebHA) **WALK TEXAS PROUD** When The Texas Flyover founder is talking about his favorite pair of boots, there's only one boot that makes the cut: [Tecovas. ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQANDT2F2sYcAmFBS_SZe0v0TgGSessImAOM7tV7tX2As86f2_uquPKW73m1_ZtmPJbuN3TdwaFxdyIS5vn9Ly2ihudz6OvIVXdAg4nmA6oXDkY_o41ZMNQEb0bIUeYQSpQfUPS2qhMJEmPUOgM2qhFJvgvR8JZwx9tD8YTCiEACH1IEeDkwxnaRRM0i-dAqbYchnagxsfvi7pk3cuw5zXPtlHa8_ayX8dXjq8NJ7z7utQv_Yh5g4vN7N-zN4XS893TCnWSXcK7quP6Rdof2vvFr8DAAD__9CebHA) It's not just the founder—many of our staff members swears by these handcrafted boots. Because when you're chronicling the heart and soul of Texas, you need footwear that honors tradition while standing up to whatever the day brings. [Meticulously crafted ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQANDT2F2sYcAmFBS_SZe0v0TgGSessImAOM7tV7tX2As86f2_uquPKW73m1_ZtmPJbuN3TdwaFxdyIS5vn9Ly2ihudz6OvIVXdAg4nmA6oXDkY_o41ZMNQEb0bIUeYQSpQfUPS2qhMJEmPUOgM2qhFJvgvR8JZwx9tD8YTCiEACH1IEeDkwxnaRRM0i-dAqbYchnagxsfvi7pk3cuw5zXPtlHa8_ayX8dXjq8NJ7z7utQv_Yh5g4vN7N-zN4XS893TCnWSXcK7quP6Rdof2vvFr8DAAD__9CebHA)[ from premium materials](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQANDT2F2sYcAmFBS_SZe0v0TgGSessImAOM7tV7tX2As86f2_uquPKW73m1_ZtmPJbuN3TdwaFxdyIS5vn9Ly2ihudz6OvIVXdAg4nmA6oXDkY_o41ZMNQEb0bIUeYQSpQfUPS2qhMJEmPUOgM2qhFJvgvR8JZwx9tD8YTCiEACH1IEeDkwxnaRRM0i-dAqbYchnagxsfvi7pk3cuw5zXPtlHa8_ayX8dXjq8NJ7z7utQv_Yh5g4vN7N-zN4XS893TCnWSXcK7quP6Rdof2vvFr8DAAD__9CebHA), Tecovas delivers unparalleled comfort from the very first step. No breaking in, no compromise. Just authentic Texas craftsmanship that speaks to both heritage and innovation. clean_body: The Texas legislature voted in the final hours of its session to stop any new funding for the construction of the , leaving about 740 miles of the planned 806-mile wall incomplete. | | | | | | Saturday, June 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1902, trial lawyer - was born in Bold Springs. Among his most famous clients were James Earl Ray, assassin of Martin Luther King Jr., and Charles Harrelson, father of actors Brett and Woody. Nothing says summer like a move to the desert. If that's your vibe, check out in the Hueco Tanks area recently listed for $600,000. We’ve got a special first-time sponsor today: You probably already know the name, but now’s the perfect time to refresh your summer wardrobe with some of their timeless western wear staples. What you might not know: The Texas Flyover founder and several of our team swear by their Tecovas boots. They’re comfortable, sharp, and built to last. Abilene ☀️ 94/74° | Amarillo 🌤️ 94/71° | Austin ☀️ 95/76° | Brownsville 🌩️ 90/79° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 92/80° | DFW ☀️ 94/76° | El Paso 🌦️ 101/79° | Houston 🌤️ 93/79° | Laredo 🌦️ 92/76° | Lubbock 🌤️ 94/72° | Midland 🌤️ 93/72° | San Antonio 🌤️ 94/76° | Tyler ☀️ 92/75° | Waco ☀️ 94/75° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Texas Halts New Funding for Border Wall The Texas Legislature voted in the final hours of its session to stop any new funding for the construction of the , leaving about 740 miles of the planned 806-mile wall incomplete. Lawmakers approved a for border security with little debate, but no funds were allocated for border wall construction. The majority of funding is headed to the Department of Public Safety and the Texas National Guard. Gov. Abbott said in a statement this week that border wall construction would continue on . Paul Mitchell Parent Company Moving to Texas Hair care giant John Paul Mitchell Systems—parent company for Paul Mitchell, Tea Tree, and Neuro—is from California to North Texas, bringing a $12 million investment and adding 80 new jobs. To sweeten the deal, Texas awarded the company a $640,000 grant as Gov. Greg Abbott celebrated the move, saying, "Texas is the headquarters of headquarters." The new corporate headquarters and a product distribution center will be located in Wilmer in , according to Abbott's office. Texans Make Richest Self-Made Women List were featured in a new list from Forbes ranking the richest self-made women in America in 2025. Pacing the Texans is Thai Lee, CEO of IT infrastructure company SHI International. Heading the largest women-owned organization in the U.S., Lee’s net worth is $6.1 billion—good enough for No. 6 on the list. The list assesses not only net worth but also how far each woman had to climb to make her fortune. Robyn Jones, who started her own business out of frustration that her truck-driving husband was always on the road, is the next Texan at No. 28. Tied with Jones at No. 28 is SpaceX president and COO Gwynne Shotwell, followed by Austin-based jewelry designer Kendra Scott at No. 41. You can see the . | WALK TEXAS PROUD When The Texas Flyover founder is talking about his favorite pair of boots, there's only one boot that makes the cut: It's not just the founder—many of our staff members swears by these handcrafted boots. Because when you're chronicling the heart and soul of Texas, you need footwear that honors tradition while standing up to whatever the day brings. , Tecovas delivers unparalleled comfort from the very first step. No breaking in, no compromise. Just authentic Texas craftsmanship that speaks to both heritage and innovation. From boardroom meetings to backroad adventures, seamlessly through every aspect of Texas life. That's why they've earned their place as the unofficial footwear of The Texas Flyover team. Join us and thousands of proud Texans who understand: when your boots carry the Tecovas name, you're walking with a Texas legend. | ➤ Dallas: The city plans to cancel a contract with a company hired in 2019 to manage the operations of Fair Park. Oak View Group has been accused of owing millions in utility payments, neglecting maintenance, and misallocating donations. () ➤ Austin: Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit against the city of Austin for its contract with WEX Bank, saying that the bank discriminates against the firearms and ammunition industries. () ➤ Austin: Texas lawmakers sent a letter to Tesla asking the electric vehicle maker to delay its launch of self-driving robotaxis in Austin from tomorrow, June 22, until September, in the interest of "public safety." () ➤ Baytown: Exxon Mobil will implode its 10-story Main Office Building today. Affectionately known as the “White House,” the building opened in 1971. () ➤ Houston: U.S. Rep. Al Green wrote a letter to the U.S. Senate this week asking that the Russell Senate Office Building on Capitol Hill have its name changed, citing namesake Sen. Richard Russell’s opposition to civil rights during his career. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s5nb_aHAgferJjMQyYPevQ~~/AARclBA~/Ea28oC5yHdJgg0m8BrsCtq5TnA-bv3vh3VCpoVN-E9K01hoaE1DFuFlH1himDLJny7WSrz4hfmq1GgVW4RU-Y_QKmrFNxdXObmNEbenN5wBV8qo5OG420PezrBIOUbV2zZQf52IEv3YKcl8GhxdsR89kWh9cDmy0S6BZol34gKz7wlj_Pqcvi57Gdy2HiXOBMO00n6Keal-VROfxdvA8oeCYoR4_fClwIoOgCEDBsEhlud-oDYSZjg8WT8h6Z5mYGnGrrdBhASivA7v1hMNL4JsX2aFskfs9nsEMTNREw7gk-_a21qtPK2GhD9kTplgbqhI2XxDwnK6P8mW8tzlAW4x8Fds-mAAoZ5du6wxo9UE~)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s5nb_aHAgferJjMQyYPevQ~~/AARclBA~/Ea28oC5yHdJgg0m8BrsCtq5TnA-bv3vh3VCpoVN-E9K01hoaE1DFuFlH1himDLJny7WSrz4hfmq1GgVW4RU-Y_QKmrFNxdXObmNEbenN5wBV8qo5OG420PezrBIOUbV2zZQf52IEv3YKcl8GhxdsR89kWh9cDmy0S6BZol34gKz7wlj_Pqcvi57Gdy2HiXOBMO00n6Keal-VROfxdvA8oeCYoR4_fClwIoOgCEDBsEhlud-oDYSZjg8WT8h6Z5mYGnGrrdBhASivA7v1hMNL4JsX2aFskfs9nsEMTNREw7gk-_a21qtPK2GhD9kTplgbqhI2XxDwnK6P8mW8tzlAW4x8Fds-mAAoZ5du6wxo9UE~)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s5nb_aHAgferJjMQyYPevQ~~/AARclBA~/Ea28oC5yHdJgg0m8BrsCtq5TnA-bv3vh3VCpoVN-E9K01hoaE1DFuFlH1himDLJny7WSrz4hfmq1GgVW4RU-Y_QKmrFNxdXObmNEbenN5wBV8qo5OG420PezrBIOUbV2zZQf52IEv3YKcl8GhxdsR89kWh9cDmy0S6BZol34gKz7wlj_Pqcvi57Gdy2HiXOBMO00n6Keal-VROfxdvA8oeCYoR4_fClwIoOgCEDBsEhlud-oDYSZjg8WT8h6Z5mYGnGrrdBhASivA7v1hMNL4JsX2aFskfs9nsEMTNREw7gk-_a21qtPK2GhD9kTplgbqhI2XxDwnK6P8mW8tzlAW4x8Fds-mAAoZ5du6wxo9UE~)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s5nb_aHAgferJjMQyYPevQ~~/AARclBA~/Ea28oC5yHdJgg0m8BrsCtq5TnA-bv3vh3VCpoVN-E9K01hoaE1DFuFlH1himDLJny7WSrz4hfmq1GgVW4RU-Y_QKmrFNxdXObmNEbenN5wBV8qo5OG420PezrBIOUbV2zZQf52IEv3YKcl8GhxdsR89kWh9cDmy0S6BZol34gKz7wlj_Pqcvi57Gdy2HiXOBMO00n6Keal-VROfxdvA8oeCYoR4_fClwIoOgCEDBsEhlud-oDYSZjg8WT8h6Z5mYGnGrrdBhASivA7v1hMNL4JsX2aFskfs9nsEMTNREw7gk-_a21qtPK2GhD9kTplgbqhI2XxDwnK6P8mW8tzlAW4x8Fds-mAAoZ5du6wxo9UE~)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.

## Border Patrol Vehicles ‘Violently Targeted’ in CA in Two Separate Hit-and-Run Incidents – RedState

subject: “In sadness, I dissent”

body:
Sotomayor just RIPPED into the MAGA majority >>
| **Justice Sonia Sotomayor just RIPPED Trump’s MAGA Justices for their latest attack on LGBTQ+ children:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91224?t=6&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_) Sotomayor has been a heroic force on the frontlines of our fight against Trump — defending our democracy, abortion rights, LGBTQ+ kids, and more.

[**As Republicans ramp up their attacks against her, we need to make sure she knows we have her back! Join 599 local Democrats in signing our letter by MIDNIGHT to stand with Justice Sotomayor!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91224?t=7&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91224?t=8&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91224?t=9&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91224?t=10&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20280%2E878179%2EDv-rv_)
---

Fellow activist,

This Pride month and every month, we are proud to stand in solidarity with members of the LGBTQIA+ community and continue to be committed allies in this fight for equal rights.
This year, three PA Supreme Court justices (all elected as Democrats), one judge on the Commonwealth Court, and one judge on the Superior Court will all be up for retention voting in November. With more and more attacks on our fundamental rights arising every day, ensuring we maintain fair and independent courts will be critical to protecting our rights from attempts to undo years of progress.

We know Pennsylvania is at its best when we bring down barriers to ensure all of us can thrive, and we remain committed to doing our part to help make that happen – starting with engaging our centered communities around the importance of our state judiciary and how their decisions impact our daily lives.

[**Want to help support our work to ensure voters understand that they have the power to elect representatives who will fight for LGBTQ+ rights? Pitch in $25 or more today.
**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR-2Bgbo-2BzzGAnKyoPyfvRtnbub14VzGR2RqjrtG6C94w-2FXCSi-2Bguq-2FhO-2F1vA4GzJtP36265JX-2FSROOivuL3-2BoyOHs-3Ds_v8_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYX5lvQxPADw688ETFNTF5Op7yLXnY0UKnjVZC9QtTylW27PwT-2BmeFmcjAO50DX5r-2B32vL1nW-2B6JXwaEShx7PO98oO3ufl3w-2BX-2Fsll0EWzzru8S5Dw9ZK-2BfR2b7NiXpFeDuE76yKi9mBiz5qi-2BWrWt5rmLr4M2390WAjQ4UWAjRRIzbIrEWXjMPKXbtbN5c42c)
---
This Pride month, thank you for joining us in this fight.

Together,

Team NPP
---
_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, This Pride month and every month, we are proud to stand in solidarity with members of the LGBTQIA+ community and continue to be committed allies in this fight for equal rights. This year, three PA Supreme Court justices (all elected as Democrats), one judge on the Commonwealth Court, and one judge on the Superior Court will all be up for retention voting in November. With more and more attacks on our fundamental rights arising every day, ensuring we maintain fair and independent courts will be critical to protecting our rights from attempts to undo years of progress. We know Pennsylvania is at its best when we bring down barriers to ensure all of us can thrive, and we remain committed to doing our part to help make that happen – starting with engaging our centered communities around the importance of our state judiciary and how their decisions impact our daily lives. This Pride month, thank you for joining us in this fight. Together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Thank goodness for Mississippi!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/achievingchange-12849298?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **When I first moved to Mississippi, one or two of my friends back in England raised their eyebrows.** “Mississippi!” the expression of their faces seemed to say.

Like many people who’ve never had the good fortune to live in this state, when they hear the word “Mississippi”, they think of the river, or a riverboat or cotton field, perhaps.

Maybe it’s time for such folk to think again. **Mississippi has real economic momentum. **

**Our state is the second-fastest growing economy nationwide.** In 2024, Mississippi’s real GDP grew by an impressive 4.2%, ranking second in the U.S. and adding $1.27 billion to our economy. We have also seen some remarkable income growth, ranking fifth nationally for per-capita personal income growth in Q3 2024.
---
|
---
_Free market reforms (left) help Mississippi overtake European output per person (right)_

| **A record flow of inward investment is coming into our state, while a record $14 billion a year of exports in goods goes out of our state abroad.**

For as long as anyone can remember, young people have been leaving Mississippi. Not anymore. SEC colleges have become fashionable, in part perhaps because they are less ‘woke’ than public universities elsewhere. **The number of students at Ole Miss and Mississippi State has risen sharply over the past five years.**

**Soon after I started at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, a think tanker from another state told me in jest that when they looked at any set of indices about their state, they would say “Thank goodness for Mississippi”.** Apparently, our reliably poor performance meant their state would always escape being bottom of the class.

**That joke doesn’t work anymore. **

**Mississippi just led the way in passing legislation to eliminate the income tax.** We’re the first state to have managed that since oil-rich Alaska in 1980. Other states are now using Mississippi tax reforms as the model to follow.

Our state pioneered labor market reforms to occupational licensing that have helped drive growth. **Mississippi has shown other states how to do it. **

If you want low cost energy, Mississippi gives you a pretty good guide as to how to do it, too. The average residential rate in our state is 14 ¢/kWh, among the lowest in America, and about a third of what it costs in California.

**A decade or so ago, Mississippi led the way insisting that children be taught to read using phonics.** This accounts for our relative (if not so much absolute) improvement in reading scores.

**Your support helps fuel this Mississippi success. **

Our state might be showing the way, but we also have a lot to learn from other states, particularly when it comes to school choice. Families in Tennessee, Arkansas and Alabama are now able to apply to get control over their child’s share of the state education budget.

There’s a lot more we need to do to get rid of red tape. Mississippi just passed the most conservative budget in years, and we need to keep control over public spending in our state.

**Each day when I wake up, I’m not just grateful to be in America. I’m delighted to be in Mississippi. **

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b2fabb89f2&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

**Last week, millions of Americans across the nation participated in nearly 1,800 ‘No Kings’ protests to stand up against Trump’s dangerous abuse of power.**

From attacking critical programs like Social Security to making decisions unilaterally without the approval of Congress, _he has overstepped the boundaries of the Constitution._

That’s why Democrats like Jamie Raskin have introduced the “No Kings Act” to hold Donald Trump accountable and remind him that no president is above the law!

* * *
Trump’s “Big, beautiful bill” that guts Medicaid to give big tax cuts to the super rich has passed the House. Now it’s in the Senate where Republicans are proposing even BIGGER cuts to Medicaid so they can give MORE tax breaks to billionaires! This new proposal aims to slash Medicaid spending by a staggering **_$1 trillion_** over the next decade—$200 billion more than the House version that has already been passed! Millions more Americans, many with disabilities who rely on Medicaid for lifesaving care, would lose their healthcare and hospitals across the nation would be forced to close! _And it would add even MORE to our nation’s debt!_ **Our healthcare system is under threat, and we cannot stand idly by while Congress pushes harmful cuts to Medicaid.** **[Our communities, our families, and our most vulnerable citizens deserve better than this reckless legislation. Stand with us and sign on to protect lifesaving Medicaid!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZN3lm0j-_obYessq4YtWcnqsuOA0ABugLUdHiYS7snoX3cr1Pdol7X6jeltiPiv7-gGYsgGrv89ml7Zr4aih8UtVhe14MEoAVmpH7S8pKK4TU1a_4ovPQpyAMKnWnVldoCEwBBMFUGPsEcVKDhVoejJ9FJEXIz46McpNWpNjBoes1Vg_CBfRFicRJR9GUkHJOcyjtRjNYXOBiBJBoNbjYidRZTUe-kuTGSM3EAD9P4oL4jd9vwp8zAdx8bEeTrTpU8HHcIEzvboB8XGRY90HrAfap0wPH0heK09_C8Y3sGOfED9VNdBV2DZWJpMAj88OnIYclFLmiX-9-oKVxlxGk4WS1k77fnTYtCOWr7W_rgP1o9PlsBIAAsPIJKz7U887Fn0jkOC_1BJT1Vfgrp5hc2pmvGEBb1RVREpCB-XWQZYnMa_S8B8IBYx4Fy4iz9KBN20quoPf9DHeMEZMEdHsp7Nw/4hj/b4oUc0WWRc6mIPaSQhpCNw/h2/h001.Cmz-zrISFyy9BChoQpaMHtU_5Xkx0DzfOIKNu_Eends)** **** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZN3lm0j-_obYessq4YtWcnqsuOA0ABugLUdHiYS7snoX3cr1Pdol7X6jeltiPiv7-gGYsgGrv89ml7Zr4aih8UtVhe14MEoAVmpH7S8pKK4TU1a_4ovPQpyAMKnWnVldoCEwBBMFUGPsEcVKDhVoejJ9FJEXIz46McpNWpNjBoes1Vg_CBfRFicRJR9GUkHJOcyjtRjNYXOBiBJBoNbjYidRZTUe-kuTGSM3EAD9P4oL7WRgwz-7fuNRi6epjUgHpj2gIP_DGG15KYB8eEF5kAvgsQLJgNK4hU7SyoUVcsQ_px6dweZHTHQ43sczZVOnoIyEgIRCaGy-O4sHXcr--bTKVpap8Tc-dkaAXB8hdCknyhpkqfVMprfd8Fp0LiFHmspxM1AL4Cq0zpJd1lPnb39s1Yuw0O6DDxXYfke6MIZ4zHRQhsJNk9lLs-x4AU22ILVhqgzrCb-8WCc9EWAdCroA/4hj/b4oUc0WWRc6mIPaSQhpCNw/h3/h001.j8lOZfniXo1GEoaM10Rpymd7bqkNFlUxCUrP40P7NZw)

****
These cuts would impose a national work requirement for childless adults, burdensome red tape that makes enrollment nearly impossible, and a crackdown on vital provider taxes that help sustain state Medicaid programs.
This isn’t about encouraging employment; it’s about limiting access to healthcare for millions, _including people with disabilities and those in low-income communities._
**If enacted, these changes would jeopardize healthcare for countless individuals and households who depend on Medicaid for essential services.**
****[**We need to act NOW. Please sign our letter to Congress demanding that they REJECT these devastating cuts to Medicaid.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZN3lm0j-_obYessq4YtWcnqsuOA0ABugLUdHiYS7snoX3cr1Pdol7X6jeltiPiv7-gGYsgGrv89ml7Zr4aih8UtVhe14MEoAVmpH7S8pKK4TU1a_4ovPQpyAMKnWnVldoCEwBBMFUGPsEcVKDhVoejJ9FJEXIz46McpNWpNjBoes1Vg_CBfRFicRJR9GUkHJOcyjtRjNYXOBiBJBoNbjYidRZTUe-kuTGSM3EAD9P4oL4r1ADI3F3zkQc_uUTQowX-s40CweUGgWMZPPtQg6nXNS7G7wk_3I8njoh3lVHZI_fJMA1OZ10VxbFTYZRK4ymA6OUgymlp28ypMKoXX_zu1VR466ANHQz8Gkq0U7JrFqGKPWyYE7k5u1Fa0SqGxbcfCkIGOl97gcC0deC8oXN4gF5EcuBSUM4fYspXGRQcK-TJjIZaN4WOGgZAGneHLz8EXwcxi4Nt2iprUnpmqVWITg/4hj/b4oUc0WWRc6mIPaSQhpCNw/h4/h001.gNWYQLAVmtE0lT-JGsYM9OIwCHj4xRxkpUys2l1pCUQ)

My Mamaw said that working people made this country what it is. That our strength comes from faith, family, and fighting for what's right. She didn't need a Harvard degree to know the truth: America and her people should be put FIRST by folks in D.C., not last. And now more than ever, we need leaders who believe that in their bones. Unfortunately, Establishment hacks on both sides are trying to derail President Trump's America First agenda. That's why I'm asking you to take my Official America First Priorities Survey. Our grassroots can NOT be silenced by the elites and I know you refuse to let them bully you into silence. This survey is only open until midnight tonight, I hope to see your response. Fill out the Official America First Priorities Survey and tell me exactly where you stand. If you believe America is worth saving, now is the time to speak up.****

name: Irene Shin
subject: If you’re done with business-as-usual politics, this is for you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250621_1_ireneshin?refcode=em20250621-2280&amount=5&refcode2=2280_587540_sKSRUc&akid=2280%2E587540%2EsKSRUc ][IMG]

Peter, I'm Irene Shin, candidate
for Congress in Virginia's 11th District. I am proud to be endorsed by
Leaders We Deserve.

I’m reaching out because we’re just one week out from the June 28
firehouse primary. The establishment is hoping we’ll fade out quietly –
that we’ll settle for business as usual.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250621_1_ireneshin?refcode=em20250621-2280&amount=5&refcode2=2280_587540_sKSRUc&akid=2280%2E587540%2EsKSRUc ]But if you’re tired of business-as-usual politics that protects the
powerful and ignores the rest of us, split $11 right now between my
campaign and Leaders We Deserve to help deliver real change in VA-11.

With only a week left until the primary, every dollar you give now will go
a long way towards reaching voters, mobilizing supporters, and turning out
the vote.

Here’s why we absolutely can’t slow down now:

Our democracy is being dismantled agency by agency. Trump’s second term
has meant thousands of jobs lost, families torn apart by ICE raids, and
relentless attacks on Medicaid, SNAP, and Social Security – programs our
neighbors depend on every day.

Meanwhile, too many Democrats in Congress have forgotten how to fight
back. Being the "opposition party" means more than politely objecting, it
means fiercely standing up for the people you represent, by any means
necessary.

That’s why I’m running. I’m not just here to oppose Trump; I’m here to
offer a bold, progressive vision of rebuilding everything he’s broken.

This campaign is powered entirely by grassroots support. No corporate PAC
money, no insider establishment funding. Just you.

With 7 days left, every single dollar helps us turn out voters who want
real change – voters ready for a new generation of leadership. That’s why
I’m asking:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250621_1_ireneshin?refcode=em20250621-2280&amount=5&refcode2=2280_587540_sKSRUc&akid=2280%2E587540%2EsKSRUc ]Can you split $11 right now between my campaign and Leaders We Deserve
to make sure we win this primary?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250621_1_ireneshin?amount=5&refcode=em20250621-2280&refcode2=2280_587540_sKSRUc&akid=2280%2E587540%2EsKSRUc ]Donate $5 »

Thank you,

Irene Shin
Democratic candidate for Congress
Virginia’s 11th District

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1001&akid=2280%2E587540%2EsKSRUc
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=2280%2E587540%2EsKSRUc

611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
info@leaderswedeserve.com

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: sorry to bother you on a weekend
body:
|

Friend, sorry to bother you on a weekend, but I’m hoping you can help us out. clean_body: I need your help on this something I believe to my core, Fellow American. And right now, the biggest obstacle in our path is the political machine trying to stop our movement from making America GREAT - FOR GOOD. We've set a critical $100,000 Mid-Year fundraising goal - and we must hit it by June 30 to stay on offense. Trump and Vice President Vance are making real progress - securing the border, cutting waste, and taking on the bureaucrats head-on. But the Swamp is fighting back. The radical Left, the Deep State, and their media allies know they can 't win on ideas. So they're trying to cut us off at the knees - starting in key battleground states like Ohio. If we don 't win here, they'll use it to stop the America First agenda dead in its tracks. That's why we need you in this fight right now, Fellow American. This isn 't just another fundraising deadline. This is about the future of our country. If we fall behind now, we risk giving the Left the opening they've been praying for. That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? win this fight, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. Every dollar counts. Even $5 puts us closer to our goal - and keeps us ahead of the opposition. | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Let's talk about Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
If we’re going to flip the Senate blue next year, we absolutely cannot afford to lose any ground in Georgia.
#

Let’s talk about Georgia, Peter.
In 2020, Georgia decided control of the U.S. Senate.
In 2022, Georgia secured the majority for Democrats again.
**Now, Georgia is a top battleground — one of the most competitive and expensive races for U.S. Senate in the entire country.**
Republicans are already spending HUGE amounts of money to flip Georgia’s Senate seat and add to their growing majority. They’re determined to elect another rubber stamp for Donald Trump’s agenda of extremism.
**If we’re going to flip the Senate blue next year, we absolutely cannot afford to lose any ground in Georgia.** Democrats are facing a tough map in 2026, which means holding onto Georgia is a critical part of our path to the majority.
**That’s why we’re asking you to help us defend Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat.[Will you rush a donation of any amount today to help us organize early in Georgia and push back against the GOP money already flooding in?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90081?refcode=em20250621-9031&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9031%2E614464%2EkAj-QA)**

subject: Taking care of our communities is NOT “government waste.”

body:
This bill is a rip-off.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109990578/552905699/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250618ripoff_N_TB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjk2ZGIzYi1hNTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-io7OCedEE9Bvlg-tf78VaARK9bgGjGGZxR5cxCrNY=) Peter,

If Trump’s Big Ugly Bill becomes law, millions of people across that nation, including hundreds of thousands of people in Ohio, will lose coverage. All of this is happening in order to pay for tax cuts for the rich.

I want to make one thing clear: **Democrats in Congress will fight this bill with everything we have.**

Despite what Republicans think, helping American people who are struggling to put food on the table, get healthcare, and provide for their families, is not “government waste.” **This bill is a rip-off for the American people.**

**Trump and his cronies are telling us exactly where their priorities land – with their billionaire buddies in Mar-a-Lago. We’re not going to stand for it.**

[**We need to be prepared to hold Republicans accountable, reclaim the House, and protect the American people. But I cannot do this alone. Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. ---
Peter, we saw an interesting study, and we wanted to talk about it.

The Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a recent study that analyzed campaign finance data for 2024 elections by candidate gender. Unsurprisingly, it found key differences in political fundraising between women and men candidates.
* Women running for the U.S. House received more of their funds from small contributions compared to men, who more often were able to self-finance their campaigns.
* The average donation to _**male**_ congressional candidates was HIGHER than the average donation to _**female**_ congressional candidates.
* Male donors vastly outspent female donors in the total amount contributed to congressional races. **Men contributed 63% of all money contributed, women contributed just 37%.**

_As we know, women donors are much more likely to support women candidates – which puts women candidates at a serious disadvantage when women are donating less frequently._

**At a time when our rights are in serious danger – and, in many cases, have already seen a backslide, we are in urgent need of _more women_ in the rooms where decisions about _our_ bodies are being made. That’s why we are working to ensure that pro-choice, pro-_women_ women candidates do not fall behind their male opponents in _fundraising_ * – but we need your help. **

[**Peter, let’s change these fundraising trends once and for all. With so much at stake, Her Bold Move is on a mission to remove as many obstacles as possible for women candidates – that includes supporting their fundraising efforts in a number of critical ways. Help us build a formidable war chest for women candidates by sending a donation of $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250621cawpB_N_CB_NO_9_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109991264/552907389/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250621cawpB_N_CB_NO_9_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhMmJmYmVlLWE1NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ijMMNPVfgjGns8nj2185Y2_pv7G95bHggknTvaJWjZE=)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: It's difficult
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter: We know you’re getting a lot of fundraising requests.
From us, from other organizations, and from candidates in tough races.
It’s difficult to get through them all, we’re sure. But if you have the time, we’re hoping you’d let us explain why a donation is put to good use at VoteVets.
This won’t take long.
The main reason — truly — is that we get results. With a lot of organizations, it’s not always clear what your donation is going towards. But at VoteVets, it is always going towards the work of electing principled leaders and fighting Trump and the MAGA Right.
Over the years we have helped literally thousands of Democrats get elected. We provide direct support to their campaigns. We run our own ads. We put on events, we organize, we do phone calls. We do the work.
That stuff does not come cheap. Every year we raise millions of dollars, and we pour that directly back into the programs we know will have a definite impact.
It’s why emails like this are so important. It’s why we reach out so often. And it’s why supporters like you are absolutely essential to our success.
Today, we’re hoping you could make a donation to support that work. We’re gearing up for one of the toughest election cycles of all, and we really need your help. Anything helps, and it all adds up.
[**How about it? Can you chip in to VoteVets today? Use this link, or pick an amount below.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25.e5pwgQ&refcode=em250622-1-120&t=1&akid=34455%2E3013755%2E74AWHt)

You really are the most critical piece of this organization. Nothing gets done here without your support. And when thousands of people join you it has an absolutely massive impact.

Thankfully, Trump can't appoint judges directly to state Supreme Courts - they are elected by the people of their state. But he can attempt to buy them and that is exactly what he and his billionaire cronies are trying to do in Pennsylvania. MAGA is planning to pump $30 million dollars into the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court retention election to defeat three Democrat justices. Their goal is to replace the democrats with Trump's handpicked judges. The rare special election is garnering little media attention and Republicans are attempting to sneak their MAGA puppets onto the court while no one is looking. But Defend Our Courts caught them in the act and are now assembling a nationwide movement to stop them. [PA law limits the ability of the democratic state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead. Peter, 2025 is almost halfway over. Have you been part of the fight to save our democracy so far this year? **Because the other side — well, they’ve been hard at work.** From trying to throw out votes to overturn an election they lost in North Carolina, to advancing excessively burdensome proof-of-citizenship voting laws in Congress and state legislatures — they are doing whatever it takes to undermine fair representation and fair elections in America. We can’t afford to play catch-up. **So today I am personally asking you to do the one thing that can truly make the biggest impact in this fight:**[**Start a monthly contribution to the NDRC to help us plan strategically for the long-term and be ready to respond whenever new threats arise.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109994659/552916080/1950963963?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGMonthlyAsk_email_20250621-NDRC-Tier1-AGMonthlyAsk_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250621-NDRC-Tier1-AGMonthlyAsk_&utm_campaign=AGMonthlyAsk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4NjI5ZWJjLWE4NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kABwJBPBrHAVLVPDJYLq3aMzWn4YiiGn0K1aBOGDbuI=) If this year has shown us anything, it’s that the best — and maybe the only — check on Trump’s power is _us_.
And if we don’t fight him and his extremists, in every way we can, we will lose everywhere and our democracy will be unalterably damaged, if not destroyed.
With the stakes so high, there’s no room to remain an onlooker. If we want to stop the rise of authoritarianism, we each must make the choice to take action. We can't wait for things to get worse or expect some cavalry to ride in and rescue our democracy — **you and I, we are the cavalry.**
Remember — this is not over. We are still in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we still have it in our power to shape our country’s future.
The hard work of fighting for our rights and fighting for what’s right is happening all around us, and we need you with us every step of the way, Peter.
**Will you commit to being a monthly donor to the NDRC?**
* [**Yes, I can fund the ongoing work to defend and strengthen our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109994664/552916085/1950963963?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGMonthlyAsk_email_20250621-NDRC-Tier1-AGMonthlyAsk_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250621-NDRC-Tier1-AGMonthlyAsk_&utm_campaign=AGMonthlyAsk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4NjI5ZWJjLWE4NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kABwJBPBrHAVLVPDJYLq3aMzWn4YiiGn0K1aBOGDbuI=)

* [**Not today, but I will make a one-time donation to make sure we can fight back against Republican attacks on our rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109994666/552916087/1950963963?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGMonthlyAsk_email_20250621-NDRC-Tier1-AGMonthlyAsk_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250621-NDRC-Tier1-AGMonthlyAsk_&utm_campaign=AGMonthlyAsk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4NjI5ZWJjLWE4NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kABwJBPBrHAVLVPDJYLq3aMzWn4YiiGn0K1aBOGDbuI=)

clean_body: Stay in the fight — give once or give monthly | Peter, 2025 is almost halfway over. Have you been part of the fight to save our democracy so far this year? Because the other side — well, they’ve been hard at work. From trying to throw out votes to overturn an election they lost in North Carolina, to advancing excessively burdensome proof-of-citizenship voting laws in Congress and state legislatures — they are doing whatever it takes to undermine fair representation and fair elections in America. We can’t afford to play catch-up. So today I am personally asking you to do the one thing that can truly make the biggest impact in this fight:= And if you prefer to make a one-time contribution, = | = | = ---|--- If this year has shown us anything, it’s that the best — and maybe the only — check on Trump’s power is us. And if we don’t fight him and his extremists, in every way we can, we will lose everywhere and our democracy will be unalterably damaged, if not destroyed. With the stakes so high, there’s no room to remain an onlooker. If we want to stop the rise of authoritarianism, we each must make the choice to take action. We can't wait for things to get worse or expect some cavalry to ride in and rescue our democracy — you and I, we are the cavalry. Remember — this is not over. We are still in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we still have it in our power to shape our country’s future. The hard work of fighting for our rights and fighting for what’s right is happening all around us, and we need you with us every step of the way, Peter. Will you commit to being a monthly donor to the NDRC? = = Thanks for everything you do, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83c6d01f-1aaf-4681-8e06-326dbc80d90d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: My promise to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1673%2E791427%2EnEso-8)

Friend, politics in the Trump era can be filled with so much hypocrisy, dishonesty, and flat out lying.
A lot of politicians choose to win the easy way. They accept big checks from corporations and billionaires in exchange for a favorable vote once they get into office. Then they turn around and tell us that they have all Americans’ interests in mind.
So here’s my promise to you: I will always do my best to stay true to the progressive values I stand for and commit to real transparency as a representative of my community.
Just look at how we run this campaign.
We rely on folks like you, to chip in just a few bucks at a time to raise the money we need to win.
And in turn, we speak out about our corrupt campaign finance system and fight for a real democracy where the working class has an equal say.
I don’t need to call up some billionaire and sacrifice my values for money or power. Because I have you.
**[Can I count on you to support our movement with a donation today? If we are going to defeat Trump and the oligarchs who benefit from our broken system, it’s going to take the help of everyone.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250621-1-180&t=2&akid=1673%2E791427%2EnEso-8)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: My friend, Juliana Stratton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I decided to get involved in this race because I believe Juliana is the exact kind of leader we need in this moment of crisis.
#
Hey folks, it’s Mandela Barnes, the former Lt. Governor of Wisconsin.
I’m thrilled to announce my endorsement of Juliana Stratton for U.S. Senate.
I decided to get involved in this race because I believe Juliana is the exact kind of leader we need in this moment of crisis.
She’s a trailblazer, and as Lt. Governor of Illinois, she’s done something most politicians in Washington have failed to do — deliver meaningful progress for working families.
Juliana helped raise the minimum wage, enshrine women’s rights into law, invest in infrastructure, ban assault weapons, and lower costs for families.
Juliana will bring a fresh perspective to Washington. She was raised in a working-class family on the South Side of Chicago. Her mom, like my mom, was a teacher.
But I know firsthand that the reality for groundbreaking candidates who are “different” is that the political pundit class scrutinizes us far more closely. We’re constantly asked if we have what it takes to win.
The truth is, people are really asking, “Can you raise enough money?” Because these Senate races, even in Illinois, are outrageously expensive. So many candidates who don’t fit the status quo — candidates who are Black, Brown, working class, LGBTQ+, disabled — have to work twice as hard to prove ourselves.
[**So I am asking you personally to pitch in to Juliana’s campaign and send a powerful message that the people have her back. Her first official FEC deadline is quickly approaching, and it’s going to be a major test of her campaign.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-stratton.e2jUQf&refcode=em250621-1-300&t=1&akid=5572%2E196590%2E05x15M)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your contribution between Juliana Stratton and The Long Run PAC._

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-stratton.LlgvJC&refcode=em250621-1-300&t=23&akid=5572%2E196590%2E05x15M)**

---
****
Let’s do this!
Mandela Barnes
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-stratton.e2jUQf&refcode=em250621-1-300&refcode2=5572.196590.05x15M&t=26&akid=5572%2E196590%2E05x15M)
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: re: Donavan McKinney
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump‘s move toward oligarchy and authoritarianism has created an
unprecedented moment in modern American history. We must respond in an
unprecedented way. Status quo politics is not good enough.

We need to elect candidates all over this country who have the guts not
only to stand up to Trumpism, but to take on the monied interests and
fight for a working class that has been ignored for far too long.

One of those candidates is our friend State Rep. Donavan McKinney, who
just over a month ago announced he was running for Congress in Michigan’s
13th Congressional District.

Donavan is a born-and-raised working class product of Detroit. Before he
was a State Rep., he was a champion and leader for labor rights and
climate justice across Michigan. Serving on Michigan’s first-ever
Environmental Justice Council and as a leader at SEIU Healthcare Michigan,
Donavan understands the obstacles everyday people in his state and across
the country are facing just to be able to drink clean water and earn a
living wage.

In the State House, he has continued that work, leading projects to
replace lead pipes in Michigan, fighting to ensure every child in Michigan
can receive a quality public education, bringing justice to the criminal
legal system, pushing for a robust, quality public transit system, and
securing the rights of unions and workers. He has worked to lower costs
and increase affordability for the people, representing the poorest State
House district in Michigan with a median income of less than $20K.

And Donavan knows that the greatest obstacle to delivering Medicare for
All, a Green New Deal, and a living wage for the people is the
overwhelming influence of big money in politics.

Donavan is running in a Democratic primary for Congress against a wealthy,
self-funding incumbent. If he is going to win he needs our help and that
is why I am asking you to donate to Donavan’s campaign — $27 or whatever
you can afford:

$27 because Donavan will be the kind of progressive voice we need in
Congress if we are going to stand up to Trump, protect our democratic way
of life, and create an economy that works for working families — not just
the rich.

$27 because Donavan will be taking on not just Republicans, not just
corporate interests, but the Democratic establishment as well.

$27 because we are all in this together, and Donavan needs us now if he is
going to win this race.

directly to Donavan McKinney’s campaign for Congress in Michigan. I am
very proud to support him in this race, and I hope you will as well.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250621-dm?refcode=em20250621-36779&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=27&refcode2=36779_1203867_nzAOph&akid=36779%2E1203867%2EnzAOph ]Contribute $27

When we act collectively we have the ability not only to create a dynamic

We must respond in an unprecedented way. Status quo politics is not good enough. Full-stop. Peter,

**FIRST:** Trump ran a campaign fueled by fear, division, and anger. He leaned on conspiracy theories, stoked hate, and made vague promises with no accountability.

**THEN:** After starting his second term, he filled his Cabinet with the most extreme, unqualified MAGA loyalists he could find, while firing experienced civil servants who were the backbone of our government.

**NOW:** Trump is letting his extremist allies make a mockery of our democracy by gutting critical social programs, taking away education, healthcare, and housing for countless Americans — _all while handing out tax breaks for the wealthy and weaponizing the government against political opponents._

And through it all, Trump watches from the top, not as a president for the people, **but as a man obsessed with power.**

This isn't leadership, Peter. **This is dangerous.**

Now, more than ever before, our country needs leaders who will fight for justice, truth, and the people — not for power, profit, or themselves. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Their party is erasing women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ba729dd7daed4edfab3a5e2f95c863be&_e=WrDNRhziLprnWjZUZCvIwqK5-0IWqaimUORzXPCQGu0CFGvEW-bUD0Ws7p76fFSrd6XcHB-WhuCobOwl0nCncucq0gida1t_kVp14VfvL_gLb6R1OAuGPmpkyxhcM3fv2og3ITP-t_9PfwyM0IdJu66Iqt5tcx6CunnMxRrruv7B5-ArWqQ3L16kmcf5dbnNFWtkleIk6I4DwGZ3uBSsl8IrcGkecvG5gH1300nwMiGi_B-O_Ihc3ZfoTDmgv616pi_gDLd7mc5dJMDMmCDyXAUwZYywCcSfJtSLJQFeKN5XsHPEG8lOmX165ijPeznT1leJcKfw-QtmAJ7EYpSai3cY5Ls_aed5IWfwMAQ-onq3VWjv8Tdt7nyJSOR-isimrlEukEHHwsdIVDPSrFpBLkxtmj_MEUOaBedxKq7zRYF7VvCc5ehdKZL8zbz5XLw6qpB93ffN4bF6nD6imHywh8nfhipj0MVm_5RVi1NqjO5lt2arA9COyNyeh8qUbEZOKgMiW-cWd8v6mkdHakuUWhGJVmCY16u_ASjMNksMfnBgnoL1yBntWWVQJJKqY-ioWe0jKnN2KLvUVcBURTXD89Cf1aPR_wrQ2T9J9fyHtkTRyAHfF65jrtCYdRmIOxc2r0-6UtK6TuLkhVI4kR-hrtzLEtTMf0OktX0D8nKMhh0ZXrimj7elBa3gg24R5j1y4Er5UHlhAWm5VCkqK5SPMaefvFwdGcsvw2nGPQsIz8kwLAx1UAEzSWlKSsvF0u_U)

---

Fellow Conservative,

Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd.

I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. **I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America.**

And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question:

_**“Can you define what a woman is?”**_

_**He couldn’t.**_
_**He wouldn’t.**_

He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence.

Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob.
**
Governor Walz chose the mob.**

That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous.

Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself.

My name is Adam Schwarze.

**I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL.** I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries.

_**I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it.**_

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ba729dd7daed4edfab3a5e2f95c863be&_e=WrDNRhziLprnWjZUZCvIwqK5-0IWqaimUORzXPCQGu0CFGvEW-bUD0Ws7p76fFSrrictauLl6w5TKpTsD--axn6iw82NLGVOijuQCpM7vQedRT3A29Z2yxSNySyemHI-vD5DYYY-Cou7cxcpNVuYiz7MwBbdWmn8IN9JoxiBZFq0QG8ubs1mreSKnaFH2JSaNI_mC-Te8NxgKOmISCCoT2D_8hgHhCIyi9522l45SZTcIpMlGgLd6Drz58mgAr7uGP0In09QcDyp4xd6ExoeSFPpjACGFE-ulBhaPKmyfj8BL8oEBWL3ULd-EswE1UlW82v8OiV39LNbzW97vMpi71Jxx1wenXMq6KHbxei_Wblji3By8aKh2xI9QXi7NK4_NGamFQREQiX05fe2MWIklLswlwMvwkmUZsS4wYj86GBSJ-7zU1_p0DG4tJtF9n6DU2QexNhfy79xjAjf8gm9acBCGIQia1bvyOB4CmSEPaZr8Fg0XRNng_MskeQ3Yt453ff_CNeh1f0dHr844eeeX68Beg0EbOd0Fr5oFVMiLUZTUqSG1LcpGPwMU68AlK3NFRLLRqrXujBqCBS7PvhQZLvUk5AnL4KQ6Gtl6M25wPCBWFFbO07caNbApnr7aYilbhaf76hojSwgvAMj7WCM-O38CzVfiXWMomXdHRGFRNbpJl5iwpS4wTbU52xC6q6gfFQTYClAe4dBpovZAmNpy6eZVq5jeXD9WaB5_--HF27O0DLDM8mW38gUtE7B_Nn-KCwbwPkBfi-Qr_c2RyFV_NqU3yfyULSEaXpXBb0l7Kg%3D)

And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental.

When a governor can’t say what a woman is...
When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy...
**When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission.**

I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone.

I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly.

That’s why I need your help today.

clean_body: This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | Fellow Conservative, Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd. I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America. And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question: “Can you define what a woman is?” He couldn’t. He wouldn’t. He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence. Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob. Governor Walz chose the mob. That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous. Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries. I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it. And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental. When a governor can’t say what a woman is... When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy... When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission. I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone. I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly. That’s why I need your help today. The Democratic Party isn’t just drifting — it’s sprinting toward something unrecognizable. First, they said men could use women’s bathrooms. Then they demanded that girls compete against biological males in school sports. Now, they claim they don’t even know what a woman is. And Governor Walz? He’s not a bystander. He’s a willing participant in this charade. His likely successor — my opponent — is even more radical. So if you’re like me — and Stand with me. Fight back. Let’s win this. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Wes Moore
subject: What I look at every day
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=206%2E1086043%2ET84lsH ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=206%2E1086043%2ET84lsH ]Wes Moore for Governor

Peter, can I show
you something? I have a clock that sits on my desk that counts back the
amount of days that I have until my first term is up. The whole point of
it is to never lose sight of the time we have left and that I'm never
going to get that day back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250621-1?refcode=em-20250621-1&refcode2=206_1086043_T84lsH&akid=206%2E1086043%2ET84lsH ]Countdown clock

It’s a constant reminder that I will never get that day back. I have to
use every single minute of every single day I have left in office
delivering results for the people who elected me.

The simple reality is this: Every minute I spend focused on fundraising is
a minute taken away from the fights that matter the most. That’s why I
need the help of this grassroots
team.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250621-1?refcode=em-20250621-1&refcode2=206_1086043_T84lsH&akid=206%2E1086043%2ET84lsH ]Grassroots contributions from supporters like
you have a direct impact on what I’m able to accomplish.
Right now, we’re facing down our next end-of-month deadline. Can you chip
in any amount before June 30th to help power our work?

When grassroots
supporters like you step up, the more I can stay
laser-focused on governing. Your contributions allow my team to
concentrate on driving results rather than chasing donations.

The work we're doing right now – to close the racial wealth gap, to
improve our public schools, and support our federal workers – that's what
your support makes possible. That's how we’ll make sure we leave no one
behind in Maryland.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250621-1?refcode=em-20250621-1&refcode2=206_1086043_T84lsH&akid=206%2E1086043%2ET84lsH ]Will you chip in $10 before June comes to a close so I can keep
governing and delivering results for
Marylanders?

and I refuse to waste a single one.

Thanks for making this one count.

Wes

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Avoiding anchors of debt for living free
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109996428/552920772/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDFiNjk4Yi1hZDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tysy2M2_swyHR8A8A4TynU5z79DglEKxZnjbGb9kFps=)
Peter, I have a story I’d like to share: In 2016, I needed to have surgery to save my kidneys. It was a risky and rare procedure and the surgical technique had only been created five years earlier. I knew it was a gamble, but inaction wasn’t on the table if I wanted to stay alive. I also knew this procedure could put me in debt for the rest of my life. After the operation, I’ll never forget that first medical bill sitting on the counter. It took me a few weeks before I had the strength to open it. It was more than an entire month’s salary! Even with my insurance covering a lot of it. Point being, it took me a long time to be able to pay it off. **Peter, nobody should go into debt or bankruptcy because they get sick, but far too many in our community are having their necessary coverage stripped by Trump’s awful budget bill.** Republicans and special interests are trying to strip healthcare from millions of Americans. It’s one of the realities that drove me to run for Congress, and it’s a fight I take extremely seriously. [**I will always fight back against those who put profits over people, and that's a big reason why I’m being attacked. We’re coming up on a major FEC deadline in just under 10 days. clean_body: | = Peter, I have a story I’d like to share: In 2016, I needed to have surgery to save my kidneys. It was a risky and rare procedure and the surgical technique had only been created five years earlier. I knew it was a gamble, but inaction wasn’t on the table if I wanted to stay alive. I also knew this procedure could put me in debt for the rest of my life. After the operation, I’ll never forget that first medical bill sitting on the counter. It took me a few weeks before I had the strength to open it. It was more than an entire month’s salary! Even with my insurance covering a lot of it. Point being, it took me a long time to be able to pay it off. Peter, nobody should go into debt or bankruptcy because they get sick, but far too many in our community are having their necessary coverage stripped by Trump’s awful budget bill. Republicans and special interests are trying to strip healthcare from millions of Americans. It’s one of the realities that drove me to run for Congress, and it’s a fight I take extremely seriously. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = People can’t focus on making a living when they feel sick, either physically or mentally. And I’ve been on the receiving end of bill collectors. They take a huge toll that weighs heavily on mental health. And lest we forget, still the pain of getting over a life-saving surgery. We need to be lifting people up with quality, affordable health care. I believe it’s essential to providing opportunity for all. Everyone has the right to be well, and that means receiving care that doesn’t cause financial jeopardy. Thanks for listening and understanding! -Eric | = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress.
