body:
Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00743d2d242f4660810ecb843184e9cc&_e=IfzjeKKAP4395zR1wi1HmYstQdH2yq-yMiZWF6KI99sB5UMgJz1TDHcJJ_A5gJmHz-GUhRAjDly6DtY3pYubOpROQRyOLvkDZVcrDO4V1CGv-ocBSEb_cZX7Had-KqSMhYQzOuiLLMLHeswjTNyEeGRXCpdEIorczkgUp99p08SEl3TlHBgXDtNbzDi0kL2SqNMJKzWkTk2nupgqWhRAEDmSwfIh0WCfdHqSkF835ClRpH6Ki8P3OgBpD7PK5i5XlmlkOXox7_GmxVo-hWgKo0cq_LeNSVyR_IXvuUjhe3HWGhnywH5e8oIZr2fvbb0ZqbXAw5jDT9T5D16ABfOKFWmErTUdxCPB15bAiqDYhL-WiqAs8UcvHBFZDm3ap7ujcPW94gpkrXgPaeDvMkBCfbHWqMpddek5pFhJ6NAjjqjKzw5thlh6NH5ToBOgzYI3WiNTF4amo6FU0DoTJNxIxhoChNgc1rQgstzvGk3DVKaoM8mJ83A9JGo0C-CKqE-5pkqNyECLOwvFJ6ONmuS-vnEhlZT3mh3QYqmfNrHFeQtBJBEfUAAR1IurF6quVCqq_J8Vhv-qgzUbeBnSgreRHGpvziEbJmHNOMH90WOJ2RbQlTXX7U_GaTLI5RWMoakm0VPN8CDF8kd4sYO4Ym2VL8-poYvAU-PikcmikLgloIngmAB6I7SJKjRiTzKACe-Z)I'm told my reputation precedes me.
I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__
_It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.
With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. **_[We’ve only got DAYS ‘til June is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00743d2d242f4660810ecb843184e9cc&_e=IfzjeKKAP4395zR1wi1HmYstQdH2yq-yMiZWF6KI99sB5UMgJz1TDHcJJ_A5gJmHz-GUhRAjDly6DtY3pYubOpROQRyOLvkDZVcrDO4V1CGv-ocBSEb_cZX7Had-KqSMhYQzOuiLLMLHeswjTNyEeGRXCpdEIorczkgUp99p08SEl3TlHBgXDtNbzDi0kL2SqNMJKzWkTk2nupgqWhRAEDmSwfIh0WCfdHqSkF835ClqMZR6DIOCgV3h_AI5yYVVh-2rzuEyGbiliDnpnJRu9MkZebYwo5IxByE4LzCyluqttu2ybEIUkw-zFlU_5Zfx9XW_fslkzSh50XfqhqYjXQl2sK5Sris0qZfk1pdrE0FqTXwGySolQZmfznwjop-EzX_V88xg_9t1QptuPkieXlYpJBTssimke00E1WcO-mJz0IYdoYTzDi3LXopOu5oXNuwCaoGv6QMi1a2SRHr3R7q_VkpXONFWD3qPbuUuTJRq4H4IbBnvL1KleMGQHqOpTDb5LfmvL3eeMyM8nlvXTL1zX_xTuE5GRqPKAr3oTFMvUwj137J4zUX9xJ3_LbJDaPISSGBY1W4wdwLtj6psmz9B3z-mfnRaY_nwJDvdk5797ZuWoR7v0JE2XOgmwCXk5R1ku5VT9st_USnAYBFjRjyzMplQYVUsjQu8XKlZfRwqwxyhis1X7bP4pUYrArME)_**[ Contribute Ten Bucks Now >>

clean_body: Folks - it's John Kennedy. told my reputation precedes me. I hope that's a good thing. I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart. So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now. My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before. That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives! And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal. It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it. With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. control the House by the slimmest margins in 100 years. I know we still have the Senate and White House but it could all be over for us if we don't dig deep and help SAVE the House Majority. That's why: Newt Gingrich already reached out ... Steve Scalise already reached out ... And FOUR freshmen Members of Congress reached out too ... I hate being a pest but we don 't have time to sit around - not if we want to win! name: Andy Kim
subject: School’s out for the summer, but Donald Trump’s attacks on our children’s education are just getting started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
In his relentless pursuit of chaos, Trump and his cronies are still pushing to dismantle the Department of Education.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109997749/552924868/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDllNmY2YS1iMDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=923XGGxN6pwq88KfkZX05wQ1k1s2MDPUYK_OFmH8rfc=&emci=45d50123-a04b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e09e6f6a-b04e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **School's out for the summer, but Donald Trump's attacks on our children's education are just getting started.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109997750/552924869/-1197072038?refcode=2025-06-21-education&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e09e6f6a-b04e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDllNmY2YS1iMDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=923XGGxN6pwq88KfkZX05wQ1k1s2MDPUYK_OFmH8rfc=) In his relentless pursuit of chaos, Trump and his cronies are still pushing to dismantle the Department of Education. His plan isn't just unpopular, it's dangerous. Trump's vision would shutter public schools, eliminate Head Start for over 800,000 children, and rip away support from New Jersey students who need it most – especially those with disabilities, from low-income families, and communities of color. He wants to hand our education system over to private interests and ideologues who see public schools as a target, not a treasure. **Let's be clear: this is a full-scale assault on our children's education and their right to learn.** We can't compromise when it comes to our children's future. When we invest in teachers and students, we invest in a stronger, more just America. That's why I'm fighting back, and I need you with me. We're using every tool available to hold Trump accountable and defend public education. And I promise you: we won't be silent while our kids' futures are being sold off to the highest bidder. clean_body: In his relentless pursuit of chaos, Trump and his cronies are still pushing to dismantle the Department of Education. | | | | School's out for the summer, but Donald Trump's attacks on our children's education are just getting started. = In his relentless pursuit of chaos, Trump and his cronies are still pushing to dismantle the Department of Education. His plan isn't just unpopular, it's dangerous. Trump's vision would shutter public schools, eliminate Head Start for over 800,000 children, and rip away support from New Jersey students who need it most – especially those with disabilities, from low-income families, and communities of color. He wants to hand our education system over to private interests and ideologues who see public schools as a target, not a treasure. Let's be clear: this is a full-scale assault on our children's education and their right to learn. We can't compromise when it comes to our children's future. When we invest in teachers and students, we invest in a stronger, more just America. That's why I'm fighting back, and I need you with me. We're using every tool available to hold Trump accountable and defend public education. And I promise you: we won't be silent while our kids' futures are being sold off to the highest bidder. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Donald Trump knows that strong unions defend democracy and protect workers. That’s why Trump is trying to break us - threatening union leaders, illegally tearing up contracts, and undermining collective bargaining rights. Donald Trump started his anti-worker blitz by firing federal workers - thousands of my neighbors in Northern Virginia. **Now, I’m a proud union sister running in a red-to-blue race for House of Delegates THIS NOVEMBER as**** _The Nation_****writes “the stakes have NEVER been higher in an off-year election.”** As a former Delegate, I passed the law repealing a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining. Thousands of teachers, firefighters, nurses, and other essential public servants have already won historic union contracts. Now, I’m running to come back and defend our rights from Trump. **I’m backed by workers of AFSCME (my union), IBEW, SEIU, UFCW, UMWA, Steamfitters, Teamsters, Carpenters, the Pipe Trades, and thousands of donors like you.** [**Stand for strong unions and against Donald Trump. Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A-vPvKDKO8dsR6az_CDR-WYmpHeknrHMuwq6B3rdqhPQNJt4inAH1355l6K5sqEpOI6GiGrHoDeMoKtjalA4pc3Tg2FeFdF5rC4bQ3axx2ni_-_kT2CaVTNf4m3bTGoPUTHCO-R9E2Bpw3o-GXNbopGdA8GwunzkdFFOYn9AqdBc7cP0Ld6qKmcq4acrrGKpKbtOR7j_WlZ0lFr_QXPBhTEa0JTwv8VOpnsHBm-4d_lEzX02Kbmkbk-KWOS4_-GjFE4WRc1dWYZl2-w4u9eCB7C/4hj/9hIshn1mQDG0aRtg0aPjzw/h9/h001.hv6Tbq7nSvwV85Dwbf7F3d4XkxJJFhxEZ-LkeO6nW4A) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. clean_body: | | | Donald Trump knows that strong unions defend democracy and protect workers. That’s why Trump is trying to break us - threatening union leaders, illegally tearing up contracts, and undermining collective bargaining rights. Donald Trump started his anti-worker blitz by firing federal workers - thousands of my neighbors in Northern Virginia. Now, I’m a proud union sister running in a red-to-blue race for House of Delegates THIS NOVEMBER as** The Nationwrites “the stakes have NEVER been higher in an off-year election.” As a former Delegate, I passed the law repealing a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining. Thousands of teachers, firefighters, nurses, and other essential public servants have already won historic union contracts. Now, I’m running to come back and defend our rights from Trump. I’m backed by workers of AFSCME (my union), IBEW, SEIU, UFCW, UMWA, Steamfitters, Teamsters, Carpenters, the Pipe Trades, and thousands of donors like you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . **Besides the Israeli Pre-Emptive Strike on Iran, 2 Things have happened in NYC Politics:**
1. **Bernie Sanders (a progressive liberal) endorsed Zohran Mamdani**
2. **Liberal New York Times Editorial Board Urged Against Ranking Zohran Mamdani**

_The New York Times_ editorial board stated "New York City voters should not "rank" Zohran Mamdani, an anti-Israel state representative, among their choices for mayor in the June 24 Democratic primary"
[Pledge your support](https://substack..EpksvpV4bhqUo67IILeH47hxO5_MvF8GFUoSgUPAz_U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166465327)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2119d522-83f2-4c64-8883-b57c59c98f12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This candidate is strongly supported by all the woke liberals like AOC, Hakeem Jeffries, and Bernie Sanders.
It is beyond belief that a candidate who help found a chapter of Justice for Palestine at Bowdoin College could not have an antisemitic bias. This organization is one of the organizers of the antisemitic protests on college campuses throughout the country that have ruined higher education, including Yale, Columbia and NYU.
**Mamdani will not accept the right of Israel to exist as a Jewish state.**
The fact that he is the candidate of the progressive liberals confirms that the progressive liberal movement is undoubtedly antisemitic (**and having one Jew like Bernie does not cleanse this)**. _**The possibility that Mamdani could be the leader of the city with the largest Jewish population outside of Israel is shocking (and some liberal jews could help make that a reality).**_
**WAKE UP NEW YORK**
While strong "conservative" voices like Sid Rosenberg have made it a point on almost every show not to support Mamdani, he is viewed as a super conservative. The reality is Sid was a Democrat who was awake but really "woke up," especially after October 7th and has been on a crusade to wake up all of New York, especially the liberal Jew which no one could understand how they proudly voted for Kamala.
Mamdani's bad ideas do not end with antisemitism. Mamdani runs on a platform of Affordability:
He promises to freeze your rent. Sounds good - no rent increases. This was done before and was called "rent control". Guess what happened. The rent is frozen, but every year the NYC real estate taxes go up, the wages and benefits of the unionized building employees go up, the cost of heating oil and natural gas goes up, the cost of electricity goes up, the cost of insurance goes up, the appliances get old, the pipes spring leaks, and the buildings take in less rent than it costs to run the building.
**Two things happen:**
1. **Landlords sell their property at steep discounts to what are commonly referred to as "slum lords"; or **
2. **Landlords abandon the buildings.**

Either way the housing deteriorates and buildings are abandoned and fall apart. As a medical student I used to drive from my parent's house in Queens to Flatbush Brooklyn where my medical school was located. I saw endless rows of buildings in various stages of decay. It looked as if this was a war zone and the buildings were mostly not intact. There was no war, just abandoned properties in what was once a working/middle class neighborhood. This is what freezing the rent does.
On top of that - Mamdani promises "city-run" supermarkets - Gristedes CEO John Catsimatidis was willing to give Zohran Mamdani one of his stores to try out his municipal grocery experiment as long as the city would pay for shoplifting losses. If Mamdani is successful, all Gristedes will go.
**If you plan on staying in your neighborhood and living in your apartment, a vote for Mamdani will guarantee that you will be moving out. If you are a homeowner in a neighborhood with apartments, as the neighborhood goes downhill so will the value of your house.**
Don't forget the Mamdani woke agenda is anti-police so don't expect to be safe in his New York.
Of course if you are a drug dealer, gang member or criminal he will make it easier for you to do business.
When it all falls apart under a Mamdani administration you will need an exit plan. If Mamdani gets elected, the faster you leave the less you will loose. This is a re-branded socialist plan and we know it did not work in the Soviet Union.
New Yorkers this is your last chance to say no to Mamdani
Say no to Mamdani and yes to a New York with a bright future.
DO NOT RANK MAMDANI

name: The Democrats
subject: A question
body:
---
We’ve got a question for you, Derek: If you knew that a $3 contribution would help Democrats invest in every single Democratic state party across the country and elect more Democrats who will check Trump’s power in their cities, states, and districts, wouldn’t that $3 be worth it? Wouldn’t you donate right away? If you knew that same $3 would help Democrats win back Congress in 2026 and help prevent Trump and his allies from passing more disastrous legislation, wouldn’t you feel like it was $3 well spent? We know it may not seem like $3 can do all of that. But by the time you finish reading this message, lots and lots of people will have chipped in their $3. That’s money we’re putting towards organizing everywhere, communicating with voters year-round, holding town halls across the country, and more. Now they’re hoping you’ll join them with a $3 contribution of your own to help fund that work, too. It has never been more important that we have a strong Democratic Party that fights back against Trump, while also laying the groundwork we’ll need to win back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=73da3249791d4bc2abd2afb188881b94&_e=I4RH8hrAE6Wr16ymUWVujo3bO302r4TKdc5CJb28Ud9IRK4DWPSHKygd4lmY2isZdGvVobV5I5J1609rFsqtsDsqr9XcRSw3caqB1zzcst6kuUi3MRtBDJrbvNZ3Q-cgrMeK19XmHDARC-J-kI5fDBD6GUg0VgnOKHkpCYABdUo-W9GBDYlqi0SpxDmIRSTvD3QifzurkwcraHUWfYAK1dxvGVVX5jFYeYsr5GndkXJCVF7jYJiFoZC5LVskaHtpA1hC5XeqR1B7quMkYB8vhnBfFdFTSX7qfyKvZ0WascwlZTNJPfzuD6_Mk7rbMfJb0ng8jE7B0x34fIGjTW0V1tlauBW5A34LrxPKgSr7YC6vQb_kzpxIaxtZfYD6EFB4uQwErQgGxZpsZAxj3NF7nauPs2awYqPGhrngC809A1-6YROvgbL7icUc2FE26asora6KPDdd_93zjFBo8ptwiJf8aGsmyTLo701FSna8NMCmotRz8wScgFNoRtTbM3sfouuaFDF7oU0pPDgSsgFtMPAOsi4yG61tDTixt8JxJrJpP2XtC8c9IssFVas3oFc0L0i2e5JVWM99Q9JTPi9JC_DDbrB4ZzpOqlLe7TB5_EIVjxxrWVJfPYg3zIoScw2p)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re **horrified** by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue.**[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=73da3249791d4bc2abd2afb188881b94&_e=I4RH8hrAE6Wr16ymUWVujo3bO302r4TKdc5CJb28Ud9IRK4DWPSHKygd4lmY2isZdGvVobV5I5J1609rFsqtsDsqr9XcRSw3caqB1zzcst6kuUi3MRtBDJrbvNZ3Q-cgrMeK19XmHDARC-J-kI5fDBD6GUg0VgnOKHkpCYABdUo-W9GBDYlqi0SpxDmIRSTvD3QifzurkwcraHUWfYAK1QdaRpnfDpFrmZqZcu7mMZOoHsE5Bu3iGRLpGX32I5nYa63mMmjbPuVeYKbJK9z_xoEa0P6nE43R2k1sImnHEBZn2FpojrHbKiZZvQsxXAu0qaKXIZNaSMiyNlTqN27l1jaGEWDkLuaFzeGgeAgNrk6LDcjvKsmpr4VZJmv9_V8LU632dfeZnT8reu-30FINvaSLh4_0vVoGlL6xDbTA_u1nYfKiPbh4wMuzsGfuqrgDF5VLyBxLjY6oKQBppj5_qTRwiYGHGbgeqiuo9gvTc9SjaI7UmbxGMdIYrQXGZtN1vOogoiXIU_4LzRtp-G9qNy2WQ5fa9E82j9l9Y1boyRnQKqVRYN5GYbn1c_EHgGBZsbce2c1xRCyf8M36_mGX5oEwb_gEhUOP38R0ivzsqSK-dYbD_fPc5_y322C_yaLp)**

clean_body: We will call this what it is - abuse| | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?_Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

Peter, it's official:
**My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I'm the Democratic nominee for Governor in Virginia's general election.** I'm ready to flip the Governor's office blue this November, defeat Trump's agenda at the ballot box, and get to work creating a more affordable Commonwealth for all.
But one lesson I learned during my years in Congress and at CIA is that a strong team beats going at it alone every time, so I hope you will join my campaign today.
**[Will you become a founding member of my campaign for Governor by splitting a $10 contribution with Heartland Patriots? There's no bigger election this year than here in Virginia, and I feel the responsibility to set the tone by winning big — but I can only deliver if we raise the resources to air ads, hire organizers, and turn out voters.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89967?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89968?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89968?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89968?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89968?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89968?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89968?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89967?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A)

In a few short months, we can start Democrats on a winning streak by flipping Virginia blue.
_It's not going to be easy._
Four years ago, we lost this same Governor's race by _two points_ and saw years of progress erased in an instant. And my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has shown she will indulge in fearmongering and disinformation to keep Virginia under Republican control.
Your contribution today, whatever the amount, will help us rise above the attacks and build a winning campaign that reflects our shared values.
If you're fed up with the chaos coming out of Washington, if you're outraged watching GOP officials bend their knee rather than uphold their oath, I am counting on your immediate and full support.
**[Click this link to complete your donation and become a founding member of my campaign for Governor.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89967?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A)** Together, we will flip Virginia blue and send a resounding message to this White House and beyond that voters will not stand for the corruption, the attacks on fundamental rights, and the brazen disregard for the needs of working families.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89967?refcode=em20250621-9037&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9037%2E614464%2EFdjH7A)**
I'm honored by the trust you are placing in me. Virginia is where I grew up and where I'm raising my three girls, and I refuse to let far-right extremism win the day.
With immense gratitude,
Abigail Spanberger

Dear Derek,
A lot of political organizations try to dupe you into donating. They’ll whip out fake donation matches or zip code requirements to get you to give your money.
Not this campaign. **We are 100% honest with you.**
We do have deadlines, like the one at the end of this month when we’ll have to release our fundraising numbers for everyone to judge the strength of our campaign. And, these deadlines do have urgency.
But as a consumer protection advocate, I won’t ever cheat you out of your hard-earned dollars.
If you choose to donate to this campaign, I want it to be because you truly believe in my vision for the future.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This is the kind of person JD Vance is
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Over the course of those two years he served alongside my friend, Alex Padilla. I guess he was spending too much time on his eyeliner to get to know his colleagues, because this happened yesterday:
#

Peter, it’s almost hard to remember now, but JD Vance actually ran for Senate in 2022.
He spent a whole two years there before he became VP.
Over the course of those two years he served alongside my friend, Alex Padilla. I guess he was spending too much time on his eyeliner to get to know his colleagues, because this happened yesterday:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-padilla-em-split.wtUkpF&refcode=em250621-1-f&t=1&akid=3898%2E734936%2Er-9RSm)
That’s the kind of person JD is.
JD, let me tell you something: We know you think you have to do this kind of stuff so your boss likes you more. We know you treat jobs like stepping stones — you only ran for senate to audition for vice president, and you only wanted to be vice president so you could run for president.
But this smarmy, crypto-racist act isn’t doing you any favors. Latinos don’t like it. Nobody likes it. And you’re going to get smoked when you run for president in 2028.
Now, back to my friend, Senator Alex Padilla.
He’s one of the nicest guys you’ll ever meet. He’s serious. He’s dedicated to his people, to his job, to doing the right thing, respecting the Constitution, and getting results. That’s what you get with an MIT educated engineer, someone who’s been serving his community since he was first elected to Los Angeles City Council at the age of 26.
He is everything JD Vance is not. And thanks to people like Trump and JD, he’s in the eye of the storm right now. The MAGA right is all over him, and he needs our help.
Let’s stick it to JD and show Alex we’ve got his back.
[**Chip in to this email and we’ll split your donation between Alex Padilla’s campaign and mine. We can send a real message when Alex rolls out his FEC report to the public after his deadline on June 30th, and I know Alex would appreciate the help.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-padilla-em-split.wtUkpF&refcode=em250621-1-f&t=2&akid=3898%2E734936%2Er-9RSm)

Hi Peter, it’s Ritchie.

**I’m personally reaching out to you today because if we get just 4 more donations in Cresco by midnight, we’ll hit our mid-year goal** — _and then I can stop spamming your inbox with emails like this one!_

Peter, our mid-year deadline isn’t a made-up number or gimmicky ploy to get people to chip in for no reason. **Hitting this goal allows us to combat extremism, to stop Trump, to save our Democracy, and to keep me fighting for you in Washington.**

You know I don’t do a second of call time – i.e. spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks — so I’m _really_ counting on grassroots supporters like you, Peter.

**All I need is 4 more donations from Cresco, so I have to ask:**

Ohio Republican Representative Max Miller's viral post about his alleged experience of being "run off the road" in an antisemitic attack appears to be more fiction than fact.
In his now-viral video, Miller claimed he was "run off the road" by a man who threw a Palestinian flag out the window at him while driving on the highway.
At least, that was what Miller's _original post_ on X claimed.
Miller edited the post, changing "threw a Palestinian flag out the window" to "waved a Palestinian flag at me," to "showed a Palestinian flag," according to his post edit history on X.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e936662-1fb3-4b70-861e-41bd36679767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Julio Rosas is a experienced field reporter and National Correspondent for TheBlaze. He is the author of **[Fiery But Mostly Peaceful: The 2020 Riots and the Gaslighting of America](https://substack.com/redirect/52951340-f98d-494e-b08e-ffd3e6fb1384?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
* * *
The U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement building in southern Portland, Oregon is no stranger to being attacked by the city's radical Antifa mob. During the Black Lives Matter riots in 2020, the federal facility was one of Antifa's targets in their months-long campaign to sow terror in the streets.
The prolonged attacks on ICE during that time period extended into 2021. With Joe Biden becoming president on January 20, 2021, the anarcho-communists attacked the Oregon Democrat headquarters during the day and then the ICE building at night.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VzSGAgc07al4XQcUoZ89ruLwqsGFcb8juSNe7vUvoec?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166469152)
This is why it is no surprise that in the aftermath of the anti-ICE riots in Los Angeles, Antifa in the Pacific Northwest have mobilized to directly confront the federal government once again. While the issue is different this time around, they believe it all boils down to fascism, racism, white supremacy, and police brutality.
In Washington state, Antifa has attacked the federal building in downtown Seattle and a Department of Homeland Security building in nearby Tukwila. Fires have been started and police have had to move in to remove the rioting crowd from federal property. Not many arrests have taken place during these confrontations.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Neil Armstrong's SHOCKING Apollo 11 confession
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...
Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.
And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.
NASA did their best to keep it secret...
But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.
**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69b8f2-584c-494f-8707-f2ef4503b4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
* * *
**(Continued)**
In Portland, the aforementioned ICE building has been under siege on a near daily basis. On Wednesday, Antifa gathered at a nearby park before marching towards the building. The public side of the compound has been reinforced with wooden boards to prevent further damage to the windows.
The walls are now covered in graffiti that calls for the deaths of President Donald Trump and federal agents. Antifa rioters block the driveway to prevent federal vehicles from entering or leaving, forcing the DHS agents to clear the crowd away from the building.
You can watch the confrontation here.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/aa0a1ccd-017f-49be-8f4c-edbc3a31ce8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While Los Angeles has mostly calmed down, in spite of small bouts of violence erupting during immigration enforcement operations, it appears things are just getting started in the Pacific Northwest. The "Summer of Love" in 2020 proved the local population in places like Portland can sustain temporary sieges for months. Except this time, Antifa can really focus on one or two places since they are mainly angry at the federal government instead of the city.
As for the Portland Police Bureau? Their officers were around on Wednesday night, but they were mainly monitoring the situation. The few times police on bicycles got close to the Antifa crowd, they quickly rode away with people heckling them.
It is clear the federal government assets in the city are on their own. This is why Trump and DHS need to send more resources and personnel to the region. The plan could be similar to Los Angeles by activating some elements of the states' National Guard to help provide security to federal locations, which would then free up DHS agents from guard duty so they can focus on immigration enforcement missions.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VzSGAgc07al4XQcUoZ89ruLwqsGFcb8juSNe7vUvoec?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166469152)
Understandably, this move could further anger the local radicals and get an even larger response like in Los Angeles, but it has been proven a sustained and effective response to the riots can tire out the attackers.
While the Antifa crowd in Portland made a big show of force on Wednesday evening, they were quickly defeated with the small force of DHS agents. A few arrests were made, but most of the crowd was able to escape. Having a larger force that can arrest and process a large number of rioters will put a dent into their ability to show up night after night.
The main problem is DHS assets are being stretched thin with the high number of interference from bystanders across the country. Doesn't matter if illegal aliens are being arrested in big cities or small towns, Democrats have been quick at throwing themselves at agents to prevent arrests.
That said, if the Trump administration can get the Pacific Northwest under control, it will send a clear message to the rest of the country that playtime is over.

body:
| | | This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn't just another election.

It's the one race MAGA is banking on.

See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target.

You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are ready to make a donation today, please use this link to split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC today:

[**www.dscc.org/DSCCandOssoff**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21333?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250621-JonOssoff-OssoffTandemLetMeExplain-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250621-JonOssoff-OssoffTandemLetMeExplain-Pros-sl1&akid=20548%2E9716520%2E6gT6KQ)

Otherwise, I hope you'll give me a minute or two to explain why your support is so important.

They're going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me.

That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.

That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state.

All of that takes resources. And it's why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign.

The road ahead won't be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I've done it before.

I can't do it alone, which is why I'm asking:

[**Please, consider splitting a contribution between my re-election and the DSCC. clean_body: | | | This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn't just another election. It's the one race MAGA is banking on. See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target. You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are ready to make a donation today, please use this link to split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC today: Otherwise, I hope you'll give me a minute or two to explain why your support is so important. They're going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me. That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state. All of that takes resources. And it's why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign. The road ahead won't be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I've done it before. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250621_v&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]Our Revolution logo

Bernie Sanders is going DIRECTLY into the heart of Trump territory – and
we’re with him in this fight to defeat oligarchy, authoritarianism, and
MAGA’s nonstop attacks on low-income and working-class Americans.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250621&t=1061&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ][IMG]

The Fighting Oligarchy Tour is stopping in Texas, Louisiana, and Oklahoma,
bringing thousands of regular Americans together to say NO to billionaire
control of our country and YES to progressive change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250621nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]Bernie’s powerful tour shows that resistance to Trump and hope for real,
progressive change is possible beyond traditional blue states – but to
turn rallies into lasting power, we URGENTLY need your support. Will you
chip in today and help scale up Our Revolution's crucial work in
battleground communities nationwide?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250621nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250621nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250621nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250621nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

From coast to coast, Bernie is proving that progressive values resonate
with all Americans – not just those in liberal strongholds. His
record-breaking tour is sparking grassroots energy in GOP strongholds,
building momentum to stand up to Trump and his oligarchs and turn
resistance into real change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250621&t=1060&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ][IMG]

That’s why Our Revolution is deploying our 60,000-person-strong Citizen
Action Team right now across the country to organize local activists,
elect progressive candidates, and build power in states the political
establishment has ignored.

But scaling up to meet this moment comes with a cost. Sending organizers
to battleground states, mobilizing volunteers, and funding local campaigns
is resource-intensive – and Our Revolution has never depended on
billionaire backers or corporate donations. Every penny of our strength
comes from people like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250621nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8899%2E5885482%2EpusqAq ]If you've ever believed in Bernie's vision of a country that works for
everyone – not just the wealthy few – NOW is the time to act. Will you
chip in and help Our Revolution deepen our community organizing in every
state and create lasting change from the ground up?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was just indicted for standing up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250621-1?refcode=em20250621-2119&refcode2=2119_21716_Kv-PL5&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)
Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. **Now, I’ve been officially indicted.**
**Let me be clear:** under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights. And I was charged and now indicted. **The administration’s attacks are baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from going after me.** **[So I need you on my side, today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250621-1?refcode=em20250621-2119&refcode2=2119_21716_Kv-PL5&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5).**
These charges hold no factual merit. But there’s a reason they brought them: the Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong.
I need your help to send an unmistakable message: Americans won’t stand for this.
[**Will you contribute a split donation between me and Congresswoman McBride to stand against the Trump administration's unjust political intimidation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250621-1?refcode=em20250621-2119&refcode2=2119_21716_Kv-PL5&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250621-1?refcode=em20250621-2119&refcode2=2119_21716_Kv-PL5&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)**
We set a goal of 5,000 new grassroots donors to stand with us before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT.
If we stand together we can amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this baseless indictment and show the Trump administration that the people who oppose his cruel agenda won’t be intimidated into silence.
This is far bigger than one person. The rule of law is under attack, and what we do next matters.
[**Can we count on you to donate now and stand up against the Trump administration’s attacks on oversight, decency, and all who dare to speak up for what’s right?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250621-1?refcode=em20250621-2119&refcode2=2119_21716_Kv-PL5&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)
We’re in this together,
Rep. LaMonica McIver
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250621-1&t=1&refcode2=2119_21716_Kv-PL5&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2119%2E21716%2EKv-PL5)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: PA Dems
subject: We said no to troops, now we say yes to power.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

More than 80,000 Pennsylvanians marched in Philly to say no to authoritarianism. Thousands more signed our petition to stop Trump’s threat to send federal troops into our state. _So what now?_

We channel that momentum into power. Because petitions make noise — but elections make change. If we want to stop MAGA extremism from flooding our courts, attacking our schools, and invading our streets, we need to win. Local races. Court seats. Voter protection programs. All of it.

**[If you joined us in the streets or signed your name to the petition, the next step is this: help us fund the work it takes to win, Peter!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110001498/552935575/1318455813?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250621_FR_nokings_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRjZmFjZi1iNjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQlX9tXrHdVYOvOxolu6Qo4fIOe57rivyxDuccCh_pE=)** | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110001499/552935576/1318455813?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250621_FR_nokings_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRjZmFjZi1iNjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQlX9tXrHdVYOvOxolu6Qo4fIOe57rivyxDuccCh_pE=)

We said “no troops.” Now we say: more organizers, more Democrats, more wins.

Let’s finish what we started.

— PA Dems

name: Jane Fonda
subject: They asked why I went to jail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The answer is simple.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110001627/552935856/1328794144?refcode=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1YjZhZjQzLWI3NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UEkHSTN_H_zUvCf4MdCwwkOr5E1Dv7dF7UsU_9Z-lbw=&emci=dde25926-e84d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ll never forget stepping out of the D.C. jail that chilly morning in 2019. I’d just been released after protesting on the steps of the Capitol for climate action. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110001628/552935857/2105508926?refcode=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1YjZhZjQzLWI3NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UEkHSTN_H_zUvCf4MdCwwkOr5E1Dv7dF7UsU_9Z-lbw=) _Photo by Victoria Pickering._ As I started to leave, a Fox TV reporter rushed over and stuck a mic in my face while his camera rolled. "Why have you done this, gone to jail?" he asked with an edge in his voice. "To get you to cover climate," I replied. **That exchange captures exactly why I've put my body on the line over and over again — to force people to pay attention to the crisis that's staring us all in the face.** But I knew that raising awareness wouldn’t be enough. The more I learned about the climate crisis, the more I realized that building a community was essential to growing the movement needed to change the way this country does business. Protesting got people’s attention. It forced conversations. But nothing is going to change at the scale we need if we don't change the people in power. That’s why I started JanePAC. My goal was to move people from concern to action, and that’s why I’m grateful to you, friend. This community is proof that we’re not in this fight alone. Together, we’re backing candidates who aren’t afraid to take on corporate polluters. Leaders who understand that science demands urgency. Morality demands courage. And the moment demands boldness. As Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our planet to the highest bidder, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. We need to keep pushing for leaders in office who understand that the window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast. **[I may be 87 years old, but I’m not slowing down. And I hope you won’t either. Will you join me in this fight by chipping in whatever you can to power our work ahead? Together, we can turn our anger into the political change our planet desperately needs.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110001629/552935858/2105508926?refcode=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1YjZhZjQzLWI3NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UEkHSTN_H_zUvCf4MdCwwkOr5E1Dv7dF7UsU_9Z-lbw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110001630/552935859/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1YjZhZjQzLWI3NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UEkHSTN_H_zUvCf4MdCwwkOr5E1Dv7dF7UsU_9Z-lbw=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110001631/552935860/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.05b6af43-b74e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1YjZhZjQzLWI3NGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UEkHSTN_H_zUvCf4MdCwwkOr5E1Dv7dF7UsU_9Z-lbw=)

clean_body: The answer is simple. | I’ll never forget stepping out of the D.C. jail that chilly morning in 2019. I’d just been released after protesting on the steps of the Capitol for climate action. = Photo by Victoria Pickering. As I started to leave, a Fox TV reporter rushed over and stuck a mic in my face while his camera rolled. "Why have you done this, gone to jail?" he asked with an edge in his voice. "To get you to cover climate," I replied. That exchange captures exactly why I've put my body on the line over and over again — to force people to pay attention to the crisis that's staring us all in the face. But I knew that raising awareness wouldn’t be enough. The more I learned about the climate crisis, the more I realized that building a community was essential to growing the movement needed to change the way this country does business. Protesting got people’s attention. It forced conversations. But nothing is going to change at the scale we need if we don't change the people in power. That’s why I started JanePAC. My goal was to move people from concern to action, and that’s why I’m grateful to you, friend. This community is proof that we’re not in this fight alone. Together, we’re backing candidates who aren’t afraid to take on corporate polluters. Leaders who understand that science demands urgency. Morality demands courage. And the moment demands boldness. As Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our planet to the highest bidder, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. We need to keep pushing for leaders in office who understand that the window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:

Hey, it’s Jon Ossoff. Before you close this email, hear me out:
I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, and MAGA is pouring millions into Georgia to take me down.
I’m the number one target in the country for Trump’s GOP.
So if you are upset with what's happening to our country right now and you're ready to fight back, please chip in what you can to support my campaign here in Georgia.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Trump is trying to rehash the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I didn’t back down. I held firm to the truth:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=435%2E181023%2EVg7QTK)
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250621_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=435%2E181023%2EVg7QTK)
Team — Well, here we go again. With zero evidence and an abundance of lies, **Donald Trump is showing us again that he _still_ can’t accept the fact that he lost the 2020 election.**
Instead of focusing on creating well-paying jobs, improving our schools, or making people’s lives easier, he’s rehashing past grievances and denying the truth.
But all his noisy allegations and false rhetoric still don’t change the facts: he lost.
In 2020, we defeated an unprecedented effort — that then-President Trump led — to overturn the accurate election results of the highest turnout election in our state’s history.
As the Secretary of State of Michigan, I stood up to Trump when he lied about our elections. I defeated his plan to interfere with the counting of valid votes and illegally block the certification of accurate election results — a plan that escalated into tragedy at our US Capitol on January 6th. I sheltered in my home, protecting my child, while people with guns protested outside my front door because of lies they’d been fed about our elections.
**Despite all the lies and the sham investigations, I didn’t back down.** I held firm to the truth: The 2020 election was secure, transparent, and the results were an accurate reflection of the will of the people.
Here’s the thing. There are consequences to this baseless rhetoric. Every time Trump and his followers falsely sow doubts about our elections, election officials, our families, and our staff face threats — to our lives and our safety.
I’m running for governor of Michigan because people are sick and tired of the political fights and the animosity. It’s time to rise above the fear-mongering and fight back with truth, courage, and a fierce defense of our values. It’s time to focus on a brighter future: ensuring people can afford to buy a home in the community they want to live in, send their kids to good schools, and thrive. Where our elections are safe and secure, every valid vote is counted, and where accurate results are accepted by candidates — regardless of who wins.
[**Please help me stand up to these lies and stand for democracy. Pitch in to my campaign for governor to help move our state forward — and move on from the chaos and the noise of the Trump era.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q22025.A8dvHW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250621_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=435%2E181023%2EVg7QTK)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Jocelyn

subject: This crosses a line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110002443/552938650/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU5NDlmNy1iODRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9_4jaXchyprKd-OnmyF3AiIKldKOKxjm__WwW9zd5k=)
This crosses a line, friend.

Under the Trump Administration’s orders, Veterans Affairs hospitals have walked back their guidelines protecting veterans from discrimination.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110002444/552938651/753003349?refcode=em-6.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU5NDlmNy1iODRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9_4jaXchyprKd-OnmyF3AiIKldKOKxjm__WwW9zd5k=)
**Our veterans have sacrificed so much for this country, and yet they are being cast aside by the MAGA agenda.**

This news comes after thousands of veterans continuing their service in the federal government have been laid off, and thousands more face uncertainty as House Republicans passed a bill gutting Medicaid and other essential programs.

**I’m proud to support our veterans. It’s why I introduced a new bill that will cut through the red tape and address staffing shortages at the VA.**

I’m fighting for our veterans, working families, and so much more in Congress every day. But I’ll admit, it’s an uphill battle with Republicans in charge.

**[If you’re with me, please consider chipping in $3 to protect this seat and flip the House majority so we can protect our veterans and make our country a more just place.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110002451/552938657/753003349?refcode=em-6.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU5NDlmNy1iODRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9_4jaXchyprKd-OnmyF3AiIKldKOKxjm__WwW9zd5k=)**

clean_body: | = This crosses a line, friend. Under the Trump Administration’s orders, Veterans Affairs hospitals have walked back their guidelines protecting veterans from discrimination. = Our veterans have sacrificed so much for this country, and yet they are being cast aside by the MAGA agenda. This news comes after thousands of veterans continuing their service in the federal government have been laid off, and thousands more face uncertainty as House Republicans passed a bill gutting Medicaid and other essential programs. I’m proud to support our veterans. It’s why I introduced a new bill that will cut through the red tape and address staffing shortages at the VA. I’m fighting for our veterans, working families, and so much more in Congress every day. But I’ll admit, it’s an uphill battle with Republicans in charge. = Thank you, Nikki | = | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Maud Maron
subject: Will you help me defeat Alvin Bragg?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “novel legal theory” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies.| | |
---

---
| | My Dear Friend,**[Will you help me defeat Alvin Bragg?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1f49871dda804d089a89396c246f7213&_e=XZn8ckO1lyTwYd9mtmcqk8Fe4a7Gpatz0wyZvbAOcZGcXSwZ-IV7mhe4nT7pJqt89C5QLE-tnl9Jsvx8bgv5d7xHJYy90xfZ8GXF9YwTieVdRYOGMNXt-gSBm3VrBkriFmBgATCYmiHF9MYZc_wyW2hVuUPTQyuHSgbk1H_45TvWvsBfhdOZrlFDEIxoY1YNFsQD58yVX6F9dZXdMkhEVT3f7EkWWFzu1XK0bLI0YJm5_u4SKwVgEMzDdfiRyGcDFU2O0lyUfPVGPtymjIc9aT1AWDECndd2IigO8PyHZ-k4bjDkgItXdELZZGANjRDEm_-8ID-0d8QvPtjwHi2RWnh_A7q1gkrb5GjvGNmRB8wZZnJddq68xP_FRkLCTU9aMgFVAh9a1H0k0YqSeDyQB8o-Oba6JQwogbyUTNN8Gwi9z0RX_0LL2v-xlb49-kA8bexHBieEvgygyfzfQ22OAcvTqeKt7n32rnhGgESdEfx6MzFq8_CIHqR4mGEbPE7yDIN122otgHK0D2CwlDblOqQwGIGWrf6ubAG5PV_vj82I4Q1G34rwM2i4OfNZnzCzOdcZdE5q1JgXyZzVY_ied_dKRba-yNHG3uU3FS4FO6FYWvymrcz0T_YdqNHxyyOJNEcjf36QHItfUGyj4di8J6QKpIn6ikrHVJ8ZIDI3choYm-RoT3Lscx3F5mDFcwubzTl70qE3Nt1eFFvRwulkHQ%3D%3D)** He is the poster child of a Soros-backed district attorney. He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “ _novel legal theory_ ” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies. He brought New York City to its knees with soft-on-crime policies like “cashless bail.” And he prosecuted Daniel Penny the veteran and hero who risked his life to protect a subway car full of innocent New Yorkers from a menacing vagrant with a violent criminal past. **Make no mistake, Bragg and his fellow leftists would export this vision to your hometown in a ‘**** _New York minute_****’ if given the chance.** I’ll stop right there. If you find yourself thinking: _Say no more, Maud! I agree Alvin Bragg is not only a threat to New York City but to all Americans, and must be defeated..._ **[Then, by all means, skip the rest of this letter and go right to your DEFEAT ALVIN BRAGG Emergency reply form and send it in to me today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1f49871dda804d089a89396c246f7213&_e=XZn8ckO1lyTwYd9mtmcqk8Fe4a7Gpatz0wyZvbAOcZGcXSwZ-IV7mhe4nT7pJqt89C5QLE-tnl9Jsvx8bgv5d7xHJYy90xfZ8GXF9YwTieVdRYOGMNXt-gSBm3VrBkriFmBgATCYmiHF9MYZc_wyW2hVuUPTQyuHSgbk1H_45TvWvsBfhdOZrlFDEIxoY1YNFsQD58yVX6F9dZXdMkhEVT3f7EkWWFzu1XK0bLI0YJm5_u4SKwVgEMzDdfiRyGcDMzeWODW88HDvd8hCRga-el4CBj1bOZcbMrRaDbPbEIMDJsznWd6SruY7hJxnw3BI4GTxPdA_BS_2cc1h1wzcbxoiZku9eWXlJ3f0c8X9x0D6uKzzPl6sIhsbDHcB1TJRtYqV34629y09i7DlQSjovHzxNaK5uEzN16EUUpgDcg3sxmXXPstg5T9iOAXDrYNYIY6i-sfSO_0XeHsMCaLW2eitien9z3Cuvmx3HcnGfGoDdhbaVGCOT_fiNymDKWNlK3SM72OW9kr8yD1aOsKOlgn1_Q1lAQGhcT-NcRZznQoYREQALcbuQ2s2jXMKwclNdtVMljbZsvKuzbGdZR7rtQQVwRhUOosge8Z1dAgZrDqVroQFmqeg6lfaeboonnMAlzt5WXOY13lTHQGLqLR7qpZCD-1V0UTPp3f_j5UBfJdRa3jDWR-xYJubsSLI6b00WLM5wpxGSM-I67sRWIffdg%3D%3D)** But if you’d like to hear the litany of reasons to defeat Alvin Bragg or hear some more about my own background and why I am such a clear contrast and a clear threat to Bragg, then read on. It’ll come as no surprise to you that I’m asking for your financial support today to overcome Alvin Bragg and his Soros network of billionaire backers. He has been richly rewarded for prosecuting President Trump. His without a doubt the “darling” of the radical Left and a “folk hero” amongst the establishment media who are all too happy to wipe Bragg’s fingerprints off every story related to crime and squalor in New York City. You want to know the worst part about the decay happening here on Alvin Bragg’s watch? It is all by design. His actions are intentionally driving this violent crime streak:
---
* **“Manhattan DA Bragg Slammed for Charging Daniel Penny with Murder in Subway Death Case”**
* **“Bodega Owner’s Self-Defense Case Ignites Fury” Why Did Alvin Bragg Charge Jose Alba with Murder?”**
* **“Knifepoint Robbery Charged as Misdemeanor: Bragg’s Decision Sparks Public Safety Concerns”**
* **“Bragg Slammed for Releasing Migrant Suspects in Times Square NYPD Assault Case”**
* **“Alvin Bragg Under Fire for Downgrading Anti-Semitic Assault to Misdemeanor in Times Square”**

---
Every single New Yorker knows that Bragg’s disastrous “criminal justice reforms” are only adding fuel to the fire...every single New Yorker is being forced to live with the dangerous repercussions of these policies...and every single New Yorker is right to be pissed off about it. This includes me. My name is Maud Maron. I don’t just live and work here, I’m raising my family here in Manhattan. And, **_as the mom of four public school kids_** , I am deeply troubled by what Alvin Bragg is doing to our once-great city. With over 20 years as a public defender in Manhattan and the Bronx, I understand the justice system and I will prosecute _all_ criminals regardless of their background. **_And as someone who spent 20 years as a litigator, I can unequivocally condemn Alvin Bragg’s politicized prosecution of President Trump. Bragg’s use of a “novel legal theory” to elevate a misdemeanor to a felony in President Trump’s business records case sets a very dangerous precedent and should have been laughed out of court._** What’s more, the hardworking men and women of New York City would rather see their district attorney prosecuting violent criminals, _not_ __ engaging in this sort of weaponization. That’s the reason I’m running. That’s exactly what I pledge to do. ✅ Awarding a self-described white supremacist & Nazi ✅ Loves the idea that the Constitution only applies to white people _This one has all the traits Trump loves!_ _Thankfully,_ Trump can't appoint judges directly to state Supreme Courts - they are elected by the people of their state. **But he can attempt to buy them** __ and _that is exactly what he and his billionaire cronies are trying to do in Pennsylvania. MAGA is planning to pump $30 million dollars into the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court retention election to defeat three Democrat justices._**Their goal is to replace the democrats with Trump's handpicked judges.** _The rare special election is garnering little media attention and Republicans are attempting to sneak their MAGA puppets onto the court while no one is looking._ But **Defend Our Courts caught them in the act and are now assembling a nationwide movement to stop them.** **[PA law limits the ability of the democratic state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead. Can you chip in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts & protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court majority?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-yxrsq6Oi_S7xMoUcTzytOR0NfcI_Ugr7xbQGDUZvFJ-kpolJbBkf-6dM-LAu2UUuLU07sZwYXo2wFNs0F-9WMeyKWzLwtmhGM06IhEKz0utcJnSDqltt90mK5ZUNxb8vLP1gGCaHxBc0VUbY6Apslu3GiKzQ-L7uY2JmHTKF7P2WfAPXCYuNLq7MyjN-drLpqCO9S4nskxVzZzTjhj0f5T2x8wrGTE1v9D2Gr453drT77aqTU6xu1LssiwI54ZJJASNzYDZPqwED110t4FKCSk/4hj/C2X7KVD8RVi3o-YMeNOVww/h3/h001.6mxYOucOZtWrQiWUH2VJ7KdBEiWH1X6IUxnyq8cBDWY)**

clean_body: What more could Trump want in a judge? | | Peter, Defend Our Courts has been sounding the alarm about Trump's plan to sneak MAGA puppets onto state Supreme Courts in key swing states around the country. Today, we wanted to highlight a few of the judges that Trump loves - that way you know what to expect when MAGA attempts to put a puppet on your state's Supreme Court: | ✅ A willingness to engage in a little quid pro quo ✅ Tolerance for blatant corruption ✅ Ruling against free speech protections What more could Trump want in a judge? | ✅ Awarding a self-described white supremacist & Nazi ✅ Loves the idea that the Constitution only applies to white people This one has all the traits Trump loves! Thankfully, Trump can't appoint judges directly to state Supreme Courts - they are elected by the people of their state. But he can attempt to buy them and that is exactly what he and his billionaire cronies are trying to do in Pennsylvania. MAGA is planning to pump $30 million dollars into the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court retention election to defeat three Democrat justices.Their goal is to replace the democrats with Trump's handpicked judges. The rare special election is garnering little media attention and Republicans are attempting to sneak their MAGA puppets onto the court while no one is looking. But Defend Our Courts caught them in the act and are now assembling a nationwide movement to stop them. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice. Powered by You. | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . name: SIGN ON via Team Jena
subject: Summer in Colorado is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250621-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250621-email]
Peter,
Today is the first day of summer, a season that reminds us just how lucky we are to call Colorado home.
From mountain hikes to river floats to crisp mornings, summer in Colorado is something special. But climate change is threatening what makes our state so extraordinary. Wildfire seasons are getting longer. Air quality alerts are becoming routine.
That’s why we need leaders who will treat the climate crisis like the urgent threat it is.
Will you sign our petition calling on the next Attorney General to be a champion for clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment for all? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]As Colorado’s Attorney General, Jena Griswold will take on corporate polluters, fight for environmental justice, and defend our natural resources — not just for us, but for future generations.
Let’s send a clear message: Colorado’s environment is worth fighting for.
Add your name now to demand bold environmental leadership from our next AG. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]Thank you,

clean_body: [] Peter, Today is the first day of summer, a season that reminds us just how lucky we are to call Colorado home. From mountain hikes to river floats to crisp mornings, summer in Colorado is something special. But climate change is threatening what makes our state so extraordinary. Wildfire seasons are getting longer. Air quality alerts are becoming routine. That’s why we need leaders who will treat the climate crisis like the urgent threat it is. Will you sign our petition calling on the next Attorney General to be a champion for clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment for all? [] SIGN THE PETITION [ Colorado’s Attorney General, Jena Griswold will take on corporate polluters, fight for environmental justice, and defend our natural resources — not just for us, but for future generations. Let’s send a clear message: Colorado’s environment is worth fighting for. Add your name now to demand bold environmental leadership from our next AG.
