Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans.

To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following...
* An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending

* The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong

* An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state

* An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty

* An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions

The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists.

**If we don 't fix this crisis ...**

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people.

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms.

**And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic?_

Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/pizzas-power-to-predict?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6060217-bcc8-4b4e-b948-3776ef5f4f21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Recently, I've been intensely focused on all things pizza - a natural consequence of [my having recently started a frozen pizza manufacturing business](https://substack.com/redirect/51a416ab-21ee-46bf-9f00-3651680ff75d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting the pizza ingredient supply chain...all grab my attention. And I always detour to the frozen section of any grocery store to see the offerings, placement, and pricing of the pizza products they offer. But I also continue to monitor the context in which the pizza industry operates--and regularly watch Sunday morning news shows, skim about 5 newspapers each day, and religiously listen to [Bloomberg News](https://substack.com/redirect/30bfc2ac-36e2-48ac-a6ff-c527df084a74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Given my long-standing interest in foreign affairs, geopolitics, and economics, it should be no surprise that a recent headline about the "Pentagon Pizza Index" caught my attention. The index, which tracks pizza orders heading to the headquarters of the US Department of Defense from local pizza shops, tends to surge immediately before geopolitical or military events transpire. Why's that? When the world is on the cusp of major events, those working at the Pentagon usually work late and order pizza.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aw62ngqH6uiHNx4mzQmWkxgHlaarByXGc_YqkIUxvaA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166434737)
The Pentagon Pizza Index recently started [trending](https://substack.com/redirect/11d7f8ca-a001-4b24-980c-120efb126b75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on social media. Why? There's a Twitter [account](https://substack.com/redirect/3369a3d1-a231-45ce-a112-df6c9e4513f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) called "Pentagon Pizza Report" that uses open source data to monitor pizza activity near the Pentagon (Virginia, headquarters for the US Department of Defense), MacDill AirForce Base (Tampa, headquarters for US Special Operations Command and Central Command), the White House, and other locations. On June 11, @PenPizzaReport [posted](https://substack.com/redirect/e4cded75-08c3-495e-9023-c00629777e08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that pizza activity had spiked near the Pentagon. Israel [attacked](https://substack.com/redirect/00e28c8d-42ed-4912-8c1b-096d102d1223?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Iran the very next day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b709e4-e8b2-4d0b-bce2-512ec22e76e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Although this was the first I had heard of it, the idea has been kicking around for decades. It might be apocryphal, but the story goes that the practice was [started](https://substack.com/redirect/24946ea3-1c9f-473a-a654-b65002c3d013?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Soviet spies in 1980's, who watched pizza delivery cars in the Washington, DC area; they dubbed it "Pizzint". And news reports at the time also [noted](https://substack.com/redirect/5ee7ca2d-3379-4d3e-b7e9-69e2f0b70131?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that deliveries picked up before the U.S. invasion of Grenada in 1983 and Panama in 1989.
But it wasn't until the 1990's that idea really took off, when pizza deliveries seemingly predicted the start of the First Gulf War. Frank Meeks, who at the time owned 43 Domino's franchises in the Greater DC area, [noted](https://substack.com/redirect/ec28baf2-e745-4aa4-84c8-01c4b464ab37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that late night pizza deliveries to the Pentagon had increased from three to over one hundred; 55 pizzas had been delivered to the White House, and 21 to the CIA the night before the war started. This led CNN's Wolf Blitzer to [remark](https://substack.com/redirect/84175b7d-8daa-437e-bfe9-45ef12ab09ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the time, "Bottomline for journalists: Always monitor the pizzas."
**Wolf Blitzer: "Always monitor the pizzas"**
Those who have followed my work for some time won't be surprised that this story appealed to me. I have long suggested that **the best way to navigate uncertainty is to embrace a generalist approach: focus on connecting dots across silos, look for relationships between seemingly irrelevant domains, and think about multiple futures**.
For example, shortly after the financial crisis, while teaching a class about financial bubbles at Yale, I decided to investigate if it were possible to identify financial bubbles before they burst and to see if I might be able to identify signs that reflected underlying exuberance. My research revealed that two _seemingly_ irrelevant indicators appeared to do exactly that: the world's tallest skyscrapers, and the share price of auction house Sotheby's common stock (it was publicly traded back then).
I wrote an article in 2011 about the world's tallest skyscrapers being a reliable indicator of bubbles. When skyscrapers are built, they are usually built on faith; tenants aren't lined up and it's unclear if there will be enough future occupants to fill the space. Skyscraper construction tends to be speculative. Skyscrapers are also built using credit; the amount of money entailed forgoes the possibility of self-financing. Skyscraper construction usually indicates banks are confident and flush; money is easy to get. And when decisions are made to build the tallest skyscraper ever, it usually indicates irrational exuberance or chest-thumping overconfidence. As I described in _[Boombustology](https://substack.com/redirect/9b6c341d-530d-4d7a-8d39-e706ecce989b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , my 2011 book about bubbles, the world's tallest skyscrapers predicted the Great Depression, the Asian Financial Crisis, the Technology Bubble of 1999/2000, and the Global Financial Crisis.
* * *
## [Skyscrapers Are A Great Bubble Indicator](https://substack.com/redirect/f18bc885-ea6b-4b89-ab54-2ffb147b73bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| March 10, 2011
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f18bc885-ea6b-4b89-ab54-2ffb147b73bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[One of the first skyscrapers was designed and built by Bradford Lee Gilbert in 1887. It was designed to solve a problem of extremely limited space resulting from the ownership of an awkwardly shaped ...](https://substack.com/redirect/f18bc885-ea6b-4b89-ab54-2ffb147b73bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f18bc885-ea6b-4b89-ab54-2ffb147b73bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I also [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/f657f474-f7f2-4ade-8073-9b81bd1748ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a piece on another bubble indicator: [Sotheby's stock price hitting relative highs](https://substack.com/redirect/458010f7-6dcc-40e9-b5cc-a3a5ead95b9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When Sotheby's was doing especially well it was a result of the higher and higher prices being commanded at its auctions. The dynamics at play here are similar to those associated with skyscrapers. People with a lot of money are making a speculative play that the prices they are paying at an auction will be surpassed by the prices commanded at future auctions. Overconfidence and easy money drive auction prices and Sothebys revenues (and skyscrapers) sky-high. I've noted how Sotheby's stock price hit new highs in 1989 (driven by Japanese buyers), 1999 (driven by tech executives buying art), and 2007 (driven by private equity managers)... telegraphing the Japanese bubble, DotCom bubble, and the Global Financial Crisis.
* * *
## [Sotheby's Stock Price: The World's Best Overconfidence Indicator?](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b68c5f-0e2e-4502-9f43-29dea59bd0f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| December 17, 2012
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b68c5f-0e2e-4502-9f43-29dea59bd0f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Anyone who has witnessed a live auction in which bidding far exceeds pre-auction estimates or sets a new world record price understands there is something curious in the air. There is something elect...](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b68c5f-0e2e-4502-9f43-29dea59bd0f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b68c5f-0e2e-4502-9f43-29dea59bd0f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
My fascination with bubbles grew with time and I expanded my focus from navigating financial bubbles to navigating uncertainty more generally. I found that connecting seemingly irrelevant dots was really useful in many areas outside of investing. I've written about how crossing silos can help in healthcare, intelligence, and education. I learned that those who focused narrowly on one industry or function had an excellent ability to provide insight to those looking elsewhere.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aw62ngqH6uiHNx4mzQmWkxgHlaarByXGc_YqkIUxvaA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166434737)
Are all of these things mere coincidences? When it comes to the Pentagon Pizza Index, that's exactly what the Pentagon would have us believe, and it strenuously [denies](https://substack.com/redirect/102ed89b-46ba-446e-9988-3c4914deba66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the connection (of course). But other observers are convinced; Alex Selby-Boothroyd, _The Economist 's_ head of data journalism, [posted](https://substack.com/redirect/f04a3016-550f-472b-9939-501443e3cbcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on LinkedIn that it was a "surprisingly reliable predictor of seismic global events."
Personally, I do believe skyscrapers and auctions - among other things - are reliable indicators of bubbles. When it comes to pizza deliveries predicting world events, it's unclear if the indicator is still useful-- after all, Uber Eats has grown the universe of food delivery options beyond just pizza. While the Pentagon Pizza Index may be an uncertain indicator, I can tell you with certainty that the [Goodwell Team ](https://substack.com/redirect/51a416ab-21ee-46bf-9f00-3651680ff75d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is regularly fueled by our delicious pizzas, and late nights always see a spike.

[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=166434737&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NDM0NzM3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA1MjUyNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MzExNzI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Cb4DKAN5KObJESco7_wFC2kOA6xxo5xPMWP6UhZ4ibo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/70a2b119-8567-4387-b195-1364f35f4b95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/826f193a-f243-4854-bb9d-0bac2153f7f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/33c1df1a-874e-458f-950d-6cfd08f4a07c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/71dc4827-d770-4932-b95a-0dce1e6d36c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/3c2ad82e-38d9-4300-8510-d1cb27b3a26b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Does the Pentagon Pizza Index telegraph global chaos? | | | Jun 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Recently, I've been intensely focused on all things pizza - a natural consequence of . Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting the pizza ingredient supply chain...all grab my attention. And I always detour to the frozen section of any grocery store to see the offerings, placement, and pricing of the pizza products they offer. But I also continue to monitor the context in which the pizza industry operates--and regularly watch Sunday morning news shows, skim about 5 newspapers each day, and religiously listen to . Given my long-standing interest in foreign affairs, geopolitics, and economics, it should be no surprise that a recent headline about the "Pentagon Pizza Index" caught my attention. The index, which tracks pizza orders heading to the headquarters of the US Department of Defense from local pizza shops, tends to surge immediately before geopolitical or military events transpire. Why's that? When the world is on the cusp of major events, those working at the Pentagon usually work late and order pizza. The Pentagon Pizza Index recently started on social media. Why? There's a Twitter called "Pentagon Pizza Report" that uses open source data to monitor pizza activity near the Pentagon (Virginia, headquarters for the US Department of Defense), MacDill AirForce Base (Tampa, headquarters for US Special Operations Command and Central Command), the White House, and other locations. On June 11, @PenPizzaReport that pizza activity had spiked near the Pentagon. Israel Iran the very next day. | | ---|---|--- Although this was the first I had heard of it, the idea has been kicking around for decades. It might be apocryphal, but the story goes that the practice was by Soviet spies in 1980's, who watched pizza delivery cars in the Washington, DC area; they dubbed it "Pizzint". And news reports at the time also that deliveries picked up before the U.S. invasion of Grenada in 1983 and Panama in 1989. But it wasn't until the 1990's that idea really took off, when pizza deliveries seemingly predicted the start of the First Gulf War. Frank Meeks, who at the time owned 43 Domino's franchises in the Greater DC area, that late night pizza deliveries to the Pentagon had increased from three to over one hundred; 55 pizzas had been delivered to the White House, and 21 to the CIA the night before the war started. This led CNN's Wolf Blitzer to at the time, "Bottomline for journalists: Always monitor the pizzas." Wolf Blitzer: "Always monitor the pizzas" Those who have followed my work for some time won't be surprised that this story appealed to me. I have long suggested that the best way to navigate uncertainty is to embrace a generalist approach: focus on connecting dots across silos, look for relationships between seemingly irrelevant domains, and think about multiple futures. For example, shortly after the financial crisis, while teaching a class about financial bubbles at Yale, I decided to investigate if it were possible to identify financial bubbles before they burst and to see if I might be able to identify signs that reflected underlying exuberance. My research revealed that two seemingly irrelevant indicators appeared to do exactly that: the world's tallest skyscrapers, and the share price of auction house Sotheby's common stock (it was publicly traded back then). I wrote an article in 2011 about the world's tallest skyscrapers being a reliable indicator of bubbles. When skyscrapers are built, they are usually built on faith; tenants aren't lined up and it's unclear if there will be enough future occupants to fill the space. Skyscraper construction tends to be speculative. Skyscrapers are also built using credit; the amount of money entailed forgoes the possibility of self-financing. Skyscraper construction usually indicates banks are confident and flush; money is easy to get. And when decisions are made to build the tallest skyscraper ever, it usually indicates irrational exuberance or chest-thumping overconfidence. As I described in , my 2011 book about bubbles, the world's tallest skyscrapers predicted the Great Depression, the Asian Financial Crisis, the Technology Bubble of 1999/2000, and the Global Financial Crisis. | | | | ---|---|--- | March 10, 2011 | I also a piece on another bubble indicator: . When Sotheby's was doing especially well it was a result of the higher and higher prices being commanded at its auctions. The dynamics at play here are similar to those associated with skyscrapers. People with a lot of money are making a speculative play that the prices they are paying at an auction will be surpassed by the prices commanded at future auctions. Overconfidence and easy money drive auction prices and Sothebys revenues (and skyscrapers) sky-high. I've noted how Sotheby's stock price hit new highs in 1989 (driven by Japanese buyers), 1999 (driven by tech executives buying art), and 2007 (driven by private equity managers)... telegraphing the Japanese bubble, DotCom bubble, and the Global Financial Crisis. | | | | ---|---|--- | December 17, 2012 | My fascination with bubbles grew with time and I expanded my focus from navigating financial bubbles to navigating uncertainty more generally. I found that connecting seemingly irrelevant dots was really useful in many areas outside of investing. I've written about how crossing silos can help in healthcare, intelligence, and education. I learned that those who focused narrowly on one industry or function had an excellent ability to provide insight to those looking elsewhere. Are all of these things mere coincidences? When it comes to the Pentagon Pizza Index, that's exactly what the Pentagon would have us believe, and it strenuously the connection (of course). But other observers are convinced; Alex Selby-Boothroyd, The Economist 's head of data journalism, on LinkedIn that it was a "surprisingly reliable predictor of seismic global events." Personally, I do believe skyscrapers and auctions - among other things - are reliable indicators of bubbles. When it comes to pizza deliveries predicting world events, it's unclear if the indicator is still useful-- after all, Uber Eats has grown the universe of food delivery options beyond just pizza. While the Pentagon Pizza Index may be an uncertain indicator, I can tell you with certainty that the regularly fueled by our delicious pizzas, and late nights always see a spike. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Jay (personal)
subject: I’m fighting for our future
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025?]
Folks,
I am proud to have earned the Democratic nomination for Virginia Attorney General. As soon as I heard the results, I thought of my family legacy.
When my grandfather, Hilary H. Jones Sr., wanted to become an attorney, he couldn’t go to law school in Virginia because schools wouldn’t admit Black people. He had to borrow bar exam practice books from other students because law libraries refused to loan them to him, but he never gave up. He became a pioneering civil rights attorney.
My father, Jerrauld, had to pass a special test for Black students to attend his public elementary school. He had slurs and rocks thrown at him, but he never gave up, either. He graduated from law school and served Virginia in all three branches of government.
When I look at my childhood photos, I understand why they never gave up – even when the odds were against them: they weren’t just fighting for themselves. They were fighting so that I – and every child across Virginia – wouldn’t have to face the discrimination they did.
Like my family, I am dedicated to facing injustice head-on – and that is what’s driving my campaign for Attorney General.
Before I go on, will you become a Founding Donor of my General Election campaign by chipping in just $5 right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025?amount=5]
DONATE $5 NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025?amount=5]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025?]
Even today, Virginia’s legal system contains holdovers from Jim Crow laws. Voting rights are under attack. And every day, I see ways in which those in power are threatening the freedoms that my family – and so many others – fought to protect.
As Attorney General, I will stand up against any threat to our rights so my sons – and all children across the Commonwealth – can have a better life.
Folks, this is the most important moment of this campaign so far – and I need your help to launch my General Election campaign. Can you please support my campaign with a gift of $5 – or anything you can spare – today? Your donation will make a huge impact on my ability to win my tough race in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025?amount=5]

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: I’ve learned a lot in the last few months
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Hey there, it’s Janelle here! It’s been almost six months since I was sworn in as the Congresswoman from Oregon’s 5th District and I wanted to give you an update on what I’ve been up to in Washington. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110007090/552953564/-629675555?refcode=email_062125_DC-updates&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RiY2JhOTktYzE0ZS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ueu2x4rIt_zGe4mCtJn-11ko_uQwSMKLwv3_SLg5psk=) I’ve joined the House Financial Services Committee and I’ve advanced three bipartisan bills that would set up small businesses for success. I’ve led the charge demanding Speaker Johnson put the American people first and finally bring a bill to the House floor that will lower costs and improve our quality of life. I’ve met with constituents and discussed ways that we can build a better future for our families — by lowering costs, creating jobs, protecting programs like Medicaid, and so much more. And I’ve also dealt with A LOT of nonsense from Republicans who are trying to push their extreme agenda — _even if that means stripping healthcare and nutrition benefits from Americans._ **Look, I’ve learned a lot in the last few months, and it’s clear that there’s still a lot of work we need to do to stop the GOP’s dangerous agenda in its tracks.** So I’m going full steam ahead to fight for every possible win for Oregonians, but I need you standing with me. **[To help fuel my work in D.C. and ensure I can continue this fight, will you consider making a contribution to my re-election campaign today? This is a people-powered team, so every single dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110007091/552953566/-629675555?refcode=email_062125_DC-updates&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RiY2JhOTktYzE0ZS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ueu2x4rIt_zGe4mCtJn-11ko_uQwSMKLwv3_SLg5psk=)** Thanks so much, Janelle
---

subject: Trump’s weaponization of ICE threatens democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110007081/552953555/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU2MDMyZC1jMTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POLumMNEhOiXmhLWYhJok7nmaSBzwK5yQfSwgwXm7-g=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s false voting claims target cities and weaponize ICE ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110007082/552953556/-209663064?refcode=em-6.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU2MDMyZC1jMTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POLumMNEhOiXmhLWYhJok7nmaSBzwK5yQfSwgwXm7-g=)
* * *
President Trump is now actively targeting major Democratic-led cities — including Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York — with baseless claims that they’re allowing illegal immigrants to “cheat in elections.” Now, he’s directing ICE to crack down on these cities, treating political speech as a crime. It’s a blatant attempt to **punish communities that didn’t vote for him and to intimidate voters** across the country. Let’s get real: this is a political vendetta. Trump is turning federal agencies into instruments of partisan power. **Here’s what it means:** Democratic Secretaries of State are already working to protect absentee and mail-in voters, ensuring everyone — regardless of zip code — can participate in our democracy. But now, with ICE being leveraged as a political tool, those protections are under siege. **We refuse to sit back.** DASS is building robust legal and organizing infrastructure to support election officials, fight misinformation, and push back on this authoritarian playbook. But it costs money, and time is running out. [**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help us protect voters, defend election officials, and elect democracy defenders?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110007083/552953557/-209663064?refcode=em-6.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU2MDMyZC1jMTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POLumMNEhOiXmhLWYhJok7nmaSBzwK5yQfSwgwXm7-g=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110007084/552953558/-209663064?refcode=em-6.21.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU2MDMyZC1jMTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POLumMNEhOiXmhLWYhJok7nmaSBzwK5yQfSwgwXm7-g=)**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Fighting for Palestinians’ rights, our constitutional rights, and reparations for Black Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I’m fighting alongside Summer Lee for our collective liberation. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWiN20yoLwgLqf5pUnc6j1nl7fT1MSYl8zrpAXp3sTyhnGjY0gM4gqygC-Wo-yqUgC3fmCjYXZQe_D0TA6z91tG2ENr-GEal7LqOgspfEh5BtS_CTj8BJ5cnTQIPu_ntXsTXImp0ZZfii8_uvz0SsJ3nOsMZYZjNgb9J4xZbZq3LtFyUrsXmBrIYgq41922CVL-_0izta7E1NWIVV1IayQqxyGeLRi7pOHI7TdA1KtK7ENf1mD7DNBuOxWpLr58vIijWb54xriQYp0ETtbCfCwlydd6y-gNS2o8owvPhJD76flBwBpkOMIGUnMCRZE3hqTKYd9bkHpJEFc4Aeem0PB2g/4hj/9ACug9a_TLqFREZuM5xiDA/h0/h001.COR0ZvjfPfpQyz4MRVrho7SYYxoPB-Rv1VSXnmrK8ZM)
---
Friend, I’m honored to fight for our collective liberation alongside Congresswoman Summer Lee. She’s overcome millions of dollars in attacks from AIPAC and far-right billionaires, and she’s not afraid to speak the truth about U.S. complicity in genocide. **Congresswoman Summer Lee** **is a consistent cosponsor of my legislation for Palestinians’ human rights, and she’s co-leading first-ever legislation to proactively restrict U.S. military aid to Israel: the**** _Block the Bombs Act_**. Summer said recently: _“_** _It’s disturbing how many warmongers there are in Congress_** _—on both sides of the aisle.”_ I agree, and I’m grateful she’s a key cosponsor of my legislation to**stop our colleagues in Congress from profiting off war.** She’s also pushing for the bold changes our communities deserve, like enacting reparations for Black Americans, taxing billionaires, abolishing super PACs, and expanding protections for our civil and constitutional rights. **At a time when right-wing billionaires are meddling in Democratic primaries to send pro-genocide and corporate Democarts to Congress, Summer and I need your support to stay in Congress fighting for you.** [**Will you chip in now to my and Summer Lee’s campaigns so we can keep leading the fight for a government that truly serves our communities and invests in saving lives—rather than spending billions of our taxpayer dollars on mass death and weapons industry profits?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbeHApD6Rd2RVIhefVUw5Onviuj7wEZJK4HYSS8du3U7sXvb4-5rv0QZDRBOOmY7kQJRtzkitooyfjMZUtDAOeZu3Spl2C3zCI7d4Y7u8R06vHPPpNAArazdC5SLuL8Bo_E4vQllctulmhtPmhr21SRAKYUdtphTf1Nf1cH0O-kY1r4kqW-XPJ30fd_UP6CNBxLEGXvH34ARxUFWv0aX_Oaphhgp9y6v7vp5GOMqd25vEyeomdXaQgkqrJhs05HbQU5eLC6HR9p6ex1VUx-WnX3iB5Zv3yjSmYNNVY1n0DRvaB29DzhV8mXwjCOaJVYNgGP6hzEJtuIxVaVFgEKHnw3wGD5QIn6Ij1H6T9QU-fGx4LP8s7mZfgSIQxw6Wzb5bzKSll-60bYrj4uTBtDEG4JjMhN_hubbxkHQl3Qb6sRZc5RauES58WBu6DyfTxgoQCN2t3t4bTFUHA951vDxujBw/4hj/9ACug9a_TLqFREZuM5xiDA/h1/h001.Icp-Jkc2guLp94g7OfxUIJdxu1K0JqzG4TMQHZSSSm0) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbeHApD6Rd2RVIhefVUw5OnvoAtmgw7DSr8FasVXd5rFV2TZXMhCosHAaUPtj-rzzdvFZMCC2IIvTnnwXUC0LvvbAQzf7XKA-oNxBwi5IbRP3LUIRQvMdL3p-YBeATI3SeY8yIZJIP-b4lGL05PTEy3Ci8SpzCR5FJWIE9u5hHge8_oBqxL9OrMwjO3DtisvBX5oCDqBizI7nTkMhaKK8zgAKo2oskBxD2SAHwXeoBJDeeSQ_UdNHCSg4oF8rF_Mxc64YaznL1wSs_O4J3Z8fubmw8mVOI4QF9jXAou7Uh8xGx46Ch5UbwZvGfu_0lK72R-ox_D4_wPriZDQe6wX161enKd1C-aX1ZXUinKm8YYRiFbLBfzEKbc_HOj0CJaLRDs1FZWS9_Xg6eyX_urWNJA0vdmrKR5krpkE4srsI-UfGSfnBJchQzmH5dBh3ZJ3x4tXiVJZYzHF3x6j6Gxo4kS8/4hj/9ACug9a_TLqFREZuM5xiDA/h3/h001.EvLl4hebTzryKvd30dwcqooFr9iYKFfgRy7bCSTUq6Y)
In this Congressional term, Summer and I have introduced multiple policies together, including the **_Drain the Swamp Act_****to reinstate crucial White House ethics rules that Trump rescinded when he got into office**. Summer said:_“This bill is about putting people first and making sure our government answers to the people—not to the highest bidder, and not to the biggest check.”_
**We’re also leading the**** _OLIGARCH Act_****to tax billionaires and invest in our communities**. Summer explained: _“The richest among us shouldn’t be paying a smaller percentage of their income to the federal government than most working families. They must pay their fair share.”_
Summer and I know that it’s time for a radical redistribution of wealth: We need to tax the rich and get dark money out of our elections. **I’m proud to cosponsor Summer’s policies such as the**** _Abolish Super PACs Act_** , which would eliminate the legal loopholes that allow billionaires and dark money groups to drown out the voices of voters.
I’m also cosponsoring Summer’s **_Reparations Now Resolution_****to recognize the U.S. government’s obligations to Black Americans** , and she is cosponsoring my recently reintroduced _Justice For All Act_ to strengthen our civil rights, block racial profiling in police activity, and end qualified immunity for police.
And I’m cosponsoring Summer Lee’s **_True Justice Act_****to ensure the right to due process** and dismantle the mass incarceration crisis. It would expand public defender services at bail hearings, which is proven to decrease the use of monetary bail and pretrial detention. As Summer said: _“Due process is a constitutional right and justice should never be determined by your bank account.”_
We will keep fighting for a society where everyone can thrive, and we will keep pushing back against Trump’s attacks on our communities and our rights—including our right to due process and our right to free speech/protest.
[**Are you with us? If you can, please chip in today to our re-election campaigns so we can show the fascists that our movement isn’t going anywhere.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbeHApD6Rd2RVIhefVUw5Onsym2mXBZQiJZCCyA22pacP3j3YjZMkgoQ5a-ojnk_G5i2TpS-gv3dh8TqbOEUOnm1QAhzFELREN9TI7QZEd1LmAosHMmREm7LFhwsdxOlFn4YI3dIiSR7V31DKsngsLxYEFAhnqHNcojF_2YttBiPn3dpthaipGkVocuMjd7tp9IqJrgld4FPEkeuY0jM2bc4p5rHDJxlu2AU5i_JhfXHCSkyu3maOzSEZIjyM0YIiBNA13AEVd-KfBOOUZfVZ26UbGtKRh1-GURFwPUJYUne6rUXcLV3GKxnKLEw1BW-scj5ocGaaUs78Us-OpqSZLpF-mwfCSJm24Ht904mxZQiEgBX_EHEqcx3FzD4F2WBeKTM7ouwvULs2bbpv5ipi6EquPs6ybY9QwrTfBZLGQkUB0eN0CPbwaO4O5GaU7t3h4-sijcJ3njsboi1y-yNRrTE/4hj/9ACug9a_TLqFREZuM5xiDA/h4/h001.SaCdbrbB-weYYI1_S0mN8lQkKiQyn7o94eF5B_Ag95s)

clean_body: I’m fighting alongside Summer Lee for our collective liberation. | | | Friend, I’m honored to fight for our collective liberation alongside Congresswoman Summer Lee. She’s overcome millions of dollars in attacks from AIPAC and far-right billionaires, and she’s not afraid to speak the truth about U.S. complicity in genocide. Congresswoman Summer Lee is a consistent cosponsor of my legislation for Palestinians’ human rights, and she’s co-leading first-ever legislation to proactively restrict U.S. military aid to Israel: the Block the Bombs Act. Summer said recently: “ It’s disturbing how many warmongers there are in Congress —on both sides of the aisle.” I agree, and I’m grateful she’s a key cosponsor of my legislation tostop our colleagues in Congress from profiting off war. She’s also pushing for the bold changes our communities deserve, like enacting reparations for Black Americans, taxing billionaires, abolishing super PACs, and expanding protections for our civil and constitutional rights. At a time when right-wing billionaires are meddling in Democratic primaries to send pro-genocide and corporate Democarts to Congress, Summer and I need your support to stay in Congress fighting for you. | In this Congressional term, Summer and I have introduced multiple policies together, including the Drain the Swamp Actto reinstate crucial White House ethics rules that Trump rescinded when he got into office. Summer said:“This bill is about putting people first and making sure our government answers to the people—not to the highest bidder, and not to the biggest check.” We’re also leading the OLIGARCH Actto tax billionaires and invest in our communities. Summer explained: “The richest among us shouldn’t be paying a smaller percentage of their income to the federal government than most working families. They must pay their fair share.” Summer and I know that it’s time for a radical redistribution of wealth: We need to tax the rich and get dark money out of our elections. I’m proud to cosponsor Summer’s policies such as the Abolish Super PACs Act , which would eliminate the legal loopholes that allow billionaires and dark money groups to drown out the voices of voters. I’m also cosponsoring Summer’s Reparations Now Resolutionto recognize the U.S. government’s obligations to Black Americans , and she is cosponsoring my recently reintroduced Justice For All Act to strengthen our civil rights, block racial profiling in police activity, and end qualified immunity for police. And I’m cosponsoring Summer Lee’s True Justice Actto ensure the right to due process and dismantle the mass incarceration crisis. It would expand public defender services at bail hearings, which is proven to decrease the use of monetary bail and pretrial detention. As Summer said: “Due process is a constitutional right and justice should never be determined by your bank account.” We will keep fighting for a society where everyone can thrive, and we will keep pushing back against Trump’s attacks on our communities and our rights—including our right to due process and our right to free speech/protest. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Together we are powerful, and we won’t stop demanding the equity and justice that all people deserve. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Fellow Patriot,

Under President Trump's decisive leadership, our nation's borders are more secure than ever. Through robust policies and unwavering commitment, we've significantly curbed illegal immigration and fortified our homeland.

name: Nellie Pou
subject: One word to describe this month: authoritarian
body:
Here's the list of things this administration did

| |
---
Friend, Here’s an overview of all of the outright anti-democratic things Donald Trump and his administration have done this month:
* Indicted a colleague of mine, Rep. LaMonica McIver, and a member of the New Jersey delegation, on bogus charges.
* Assaulted Alex Padilla, a U.S. Senator from California, for asking a question at a public briefing.
* Threatened to arrest a sitting Governor.

This is not America. This is not what this nation was founded on. He is doing all of this unchecked, and Congressional Republicans aren’t doing anything about it. **I can guarantee you this: I will fight this destruction every step of the way.** **[But to hold Trump accountable, I need your help, though. I need to have the resources to win my re-election and help flip 3 seats to take back the House majority. name: Powered By People
subject: 6 town halls in the next 10 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Beto is joining Bernie Sanders for two town halls this weekend! Bernie is coming to Texas because he knows that we can’t afford to write anyone off in our fight against Trump’s extremism and oligarchy.
Powered by People also just announced that we’ll be hosting four town halls in Laredo, San Antonio, Beaumont, and Tyler.
**Texas is worth fighting for** and Beto is 100% committed to this work. Whether someone is a Democrat, Republican, Independent or a-political—we don’t check party status at the door of Powered by People town halls.
Beto doesn’t take a salary from Powered by People. Your donation today will be used to help us put on town halls, connect with voters and non-voters, and build long-term relationships in Texas to win up and down the ballot in 2026 and 2028.
**→ Please chip in any amount that you can afford today.** Every single donation makes a difference. Here’s a personalized link where you can donate:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-20250621?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250621.KrQRse&refcode=ema20250621-240171&t=1&akid=240171%2E444211%2EwP37Bz)

Powered by People

name: Josh Harder
subject: I represent a Trump district in California

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter - I've been in some really rough situations in the past, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session! I'm not kidding - a Soros-backed group even dropped $500K on my head all in one shot, Peter! This is a BAD situation that will spiral out of control if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I am coming to you with a heartfelt plea; I'm doing everything I can to win this race and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really meanall of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! Look, this race is TIED. There's ONLY one thing holding me and my team back from winning right now; my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. Thank you for being a crucial part of my team, Peter. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support! -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. name: AOC
subject: We need to be brawlers for the working class.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We have turned into a party that caters to the wealthy.
#
I believe that **we need to be a party of brawlers for the working class**.
And we have turned into a party that caters to people who _call_ themselves "upper middle class," but they're actually wealthy.
We've been chasing this affluent group, making all of these little concessions, and hoping that working people don't notice.
I think the most famous one that comes to mind is Kyrsten Sinema doing her little curtsy when she voted down the $15 minimum wage.
**But it wasn't just her**. That was the most public expression of it, but there were a bunch of Democrats in the Senate behind her that also voted it down.
People are struggling so much right now. **$15 an hour is nothing**.
The day I was assigned to the Energy and Commerce Committee, my staff's email inboxes blew up with lobbyists, just _tons_ of lobbyists, flooding our emails.
I don't take a dime of lobbyists' money. And because I am afforded that independence because everyday people support me, I'm under no pressure or obligation to take a _single_ one of these meetings. **Not one**.
And because of your grassroots support, we will stop at _nothing_ to push for real progress for working people these next four years.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250621.yyZJRv&refcode=em20250621-9139-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250621.yyZJRv&refcode=em20250621-9139-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250621?refcode=em20250621-9139-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9139_2526796_9n0i8k&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250621-9139-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=9139%2E2526796%2E9n0i8k)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Why? It’s Adam’s birthday! And we’re planning a little surprise (no, not a military parade) — but we need your help. 🎂
Adam’s not usually one to make a big fuss about his birthday. But after all the work he’s done this year, we think he deserves to be celebrated.
Since his last birthday, Adam was elected to the U.S. Senate, continued holding Donald Trump and MAGA extremists accountable, and has been working nonstop to defend our democracy and flip House and Senate seats nationwide.

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, here’s an inside look at this session 👀
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=knaBn5KP6HXhnJlXULkQMfDZ1N1qvdIaWy3zJwKTxWqHAsku2UjKgTh7F2EdLI0WTJ7gHed9ta5m4uheSgWpSXM7fUJITrbyN661ss1HT0Midgq3IMzoxbLBdSHDh5Im [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=knaBn5KP6HXhnJlXULkQMfDZ1N1qvdIaWy3zJwKTxWqHAsku2UjKgTh7F2EdLI0WTJ7gHed9ta5m4uheSgWpSXM7fUJITrbyN661ss1HT0Midgq3IMzoxbLBdSHDh5Im]
Dear Peter,
Each day we’re nearing the end of the wire of this year’s session. The Legislature will adjourn by June 29th or possibly sooner. With the climate and environmental attacks we’re seeing at the federal level, this session is critical for our state to deliver on our environmental values. Will you show your support of our priority bills for a healthy Oregon now for these final days of session? [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2]
Show your support [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=knaBn5KP6HXhnJlXULkQMfDZ1N1qvdIaWy3zJwKTxWqHAsku2UjKgTh7F2EdLI0WTJ7gHed9ta5m4uheSgWpSXM7fUJITrbyN661ss1HT0Midgq3IMzoxbLBdSHDh5Im]
I’m happy to report that the POWER Act ( HB 3546 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/HB3546] ), one of our priorities in the Energy Affordability and Utility Accountability package, recently passed and is now headed to the Governor’s desk to be signed into law! We’re still working hard to get One Stop Shop 2.0 ( HB 3081 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/HB3081] ) and Get the Junk Out of Rates ( SB 88 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025r1/Measures/Overview/SB88] ) across the finish line before session ends but time is running out.
Safeguarding Streamflows to Protect Oregon’s Water ( SB 427 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/SB427] ) was one of our priority bills this session and would have been the most significant progress for Oregon’s streams and rivers in decades. Unfortunately, the bill stalled in the Senate Rules Committee. However, we’ve since pivoted to support SB 1153 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/SB1153] , which addresses the same problems and prohibits harm to fish. SB 1153 is an important step forward in modernizing our water laws and we are pleased to see tribal consultation as part of this bill. Nevertheless, it will still take a big effort to get it across the finish line as it is currently stuck in the legislature.
After a long wait, the transportation package ( HB 2025 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/HB2025] ) finally dropped a couple weeks ago. While it includes several investments that we advocated for, it does not include everything necessary to meet the needs of our communities and to achieve our climate goals. However, a new amendment has been added to the bill which would provide funds for investments in transportation electrification and community paths and help us meet some of our goals but that amendment is not likely to move forward and the package does not currently move us forward on climate.
Make an urgent donation now and help us get our priorities across the finish line! clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Each day we’re nearing the end of the wire of this year’s session. The Legislature will adjourn by June 29th or possibly sooner. With the climate and environmental attacks we’re seeing at the federal level, this session is critical for our state to deliver on our environmental values. Will you show your support of our priority bills for a healthy Oregon now for these final days of session? [] Show your support [] I’m happy to report that the POWER Act ( HB 3546 [] ), one of our priorities in the Energy Affordability and Utility Accountability package, recently passed and is now headed to the Governor’s desk to be signed into law! We’re still working hard to get One Stop Shop 2.0 ( HB 3081 [] ) and Get the Junk Out of Rates ( SB 88 [] ) across the finish line before session ends but time is running out. Safeguarding Streamflows to Protect Oregon’s Water ( SB 427 [] ) was one of our priority bills this session and would have been the most significant progress for Oregon’s streams and rivers in decades. Unfortunately, the bill stalled in the Senate Rules Committee. However, we’ve since pivoted to support SB 1153 [] , which addresses the same problems and prohibits harm to fish. SB 1153 is an important step forward in modernizing our water laws and we are pleased to see tribal consultation as part of this bill. Nevertheless, it will still take a big effort to get it across the finish line as it is currently stuck in the legislature. After a long wait, the transportation package ( HB 2025 [] ) finally dropped a couple weeks ago. While it includes several investments that we advocated for, it does not include everything necessary to meet the needs of our communities and to achieve our climate goals. However, a new amendment has been added to the bill which would provide funds for investments in transportation electrification and community paths and help us meet some of our goals but that amendment is not likely to move forward and the package does not currently move us forward on climate. Make an urgent donation now and help us get our priorities across the finish line! [] [] This session has been a whirlwind, but we haven’t let up in the fight for a healthy Oregon. In these final crunch days, we’re going above and beyond to assure that we can get our priorities across the finish line. We can't afford to let up this session and let Oregon backslide. To get the job done and keep this strong momentum going, we need one more thing: your support. Will you make a contribution of any amount today, so that we can end this session strong? [] Renew your membership [] The clock is ticking on this session, but we’re not going anywhere until we get our priorities across the finish line. We can’t do this without you! [] Thank you for your support, [] Sarah Kline (she/they) OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator P.S.: If you’d no longer like to receive fundraising emails, please use this link here [] to log-in and update your email preferences. name: Young Kim
subject: I lost…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
They won.

You may not know me.
You may not know me.

| |
---
| | | _**– A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim – **_
Dear friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn’t speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn’t been exactly easy.

_In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election._

But I wouldn’t let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we’ve continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I’m nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country – not knowing a word of English – who lived the American Dream. And I’ve made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge._
---
| | | [SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY")
---
| | | [DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY")
---
This past election cycle they pulled out ALL the stops: recruiting progressive Liberals to run against me, pledging MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads and smear campaigns, and the Biden White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets. Yet, even with everything they threw at me, I was able to emerge VICTORIOUS thanks to the support of my grassroots supporters like you, Friend.

But that’s NOTHING compared to what they are already plotting for this cycle.

**[A Democrat PAC has announced MY SEAT as one of their top targets in 2026.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "A Democrat PAC has already announced MY SEAT as one of their top targets in 2026.")**

The Democrats are FIRED UP with even more momentum coming off the 2024 election where they were able to FLIP multiple critical GOP California seats BLUE!

_Please don’t let this be my fate next election._

I don’t normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to fuel my fight, Friend.

**[I’m coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help make sure my campaign has the necessary resources and momentum to defend my seat and our GOP majority!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "I’m coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help make sure my campaign has the necessary resources and momentum to defend my seat and our GOP majority!")**
---
| | | [SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY")
---
| | | [DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY")
---
Thank you in advance for your support,

---
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEUh/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Champion")
---

Young Kim

body:

name: Marshall, Steve
subject: I was in the courtroom during President Trump’s New York City trial.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marshall Victory Fund
body:
Peter, you probably get lots of messages asking you to defend President Trump.
Well, I actually did it.
When the radical Left used the justice system to attack President Trump, I was one of the first to stand up for him.
When President Trump was dragged into a New York City courtroom as part of a political witch hunt, I was IN THE ROOM to support him.
When the Democrats launched POLITICALLY MOTIVATED, BASELESS lawsuits to stop President Trump's executive orders and actions to fulfill the will of the American people, I jumped into action.
I have stood by the President's side through thick and thin. Now, I need you to stand by me as I fight to take that mission to the U.S. Senate.
President Trump needs strong, MAGA reinforcements. He deserves a Senator who will fight tooth and nail to pass his agenda, and you deserve a Senator who will ALWAYS defend the American values that bring us all together.
This fight won't be easy, but we can't afford to lose!
If we lose Alabama, the consequences will be disastrous. The America First agenda and the success of President Trump's second term will be doomed!
President Trump's Senate majority hinges on winning each and every must-win seat, just like this one!
_We need to know that we can count on you._
[ I need 500 patriots to step up and contribute $25 or more in the next 24 hours to jumpstart this campaign. clean_body: Peter, you probably get lots of messages asking you to defend President Trump. Well, I actually did it. When the radical Left used the justice system to attack President Trump, I was one of the first to stand up for him. When President Trump was dragged into a New York City courtroom as part of a political witch hunt, I was IN THE ROOM to support him. When the Democrats launched POLITICALLY MOTIVATED, BASELESS lawsuits to stop President Trump's executive orders and actions to fulfill the will of the American people, I jumped into action. I have stood by the President's side through thick and thin. Now, I need you to stand by me as I fight to take that mission to the U.S. Senate. President Trump needs strong, MAGA reinforcements. He deserves a Senator who will fight tooth and nail to pass his agenda, and you deserve a Senator who will ALWAYS defend the American values that bring us all together. This fight won't be easy, but we can't afford to lose! If we lose Alabama, the consequences will be disastrous. The America First agenda and the success of President Trump's second term will be doomed! President Trump's Senate majority hinges on winning each and every must-win seat, just like this one! We need to know that we can count on you. you. I promise to NEVER forget your support. MAGA! \- Steve Marshall| | | | | Paid for by Marshall Victory Fund PO Box 530335 Birmingham, AL 35253 |

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b01430eb52a42c893f7e43c0f16c646&_e=fzD6t8I88fsQsdWuFH9hP55TJS2olq2qO6sSJA-Li43bPH3fB7jBCZueQzCDzVlsXLeaWl0MO3_ZmrrbictYhTvCR_S5RC5aGJdRHhPQByCsVO_p8r3dntTqMO7rJotBEztUwex-NgWEphy5mmMC7lGeQBnvkPDreZZ-m54oT0C01DhYFHWwc4XXF3B1I2NTZSkanBd1TYukEN1tiZawjKUuKKMerfNi2BZ64eoZw-F3jc-bItmuA1Yx-zTG9P0z2Afu3SygJtPFKrmbmL919PdSzr3OwJSrGG9fbPLKKCLll6IZWUYJAZbuATq2vHd_IykQvFQpBsuG_UKn0Bzt7JYaRYMzeYlw58KXI35f8EX7XbsbzOb_XA6elUrqljiH4JDUoY8JtTCF29aQzk5yOKCkFrREOyfXVDtUt3sWQb0330NwjXHm0H1KYSpm11oofIbk7rNEa64i-4lbj4bFliU8cn6MeF6YFbtBRi74KI_wf2DIMJdgO5D7bI0eJuMGTW_jN0z2cJzjUi0APTWMiruH8Bwem4Z7ZjAZwWPN3KcV_VTQrdqv0MZhPZAhyxhWf4I_lkQYyRnFOfXvVTHnFf4-KI8qP-JnhiJCZy599uw%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
**Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:**
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
**As a senior how do you feel about their findings?** _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b01430eb52a42c893f7e43c0f16c646&_e=fzD6t8I88fsQsdWuFH9hP55TJS2olq2qO6sSJA-Li43bPH3fB7jBCZueQzCDzVlsXLeaWl0MO3_ZmrrbictYhTvCR_S5RC5aGJdRHhPQByCsVO_p8r3dntTqMO7rJotBEztUwex-NgWEphy5mmMC7lGeQBnvkPDreZZ-m54oT0C01DhYFHWwc4XXF3B1I2NTHDlxPwz9apc94onLqjIuTBSHHYxncW-zYGR8Fic9xzbmBvb1VIBPDHvIdXc5OXYWDiltUjyLnP390vEABi1zzNTamjUvboLQyogqmfrmrqlsgXxpwoVGKlCXGM0ahT83C3UkQrMyUQ_XYYSE1zCTjU-XnDEVT5pa3K9EYOQ4tsRhJQVTVHZ19y7Q_84nmgH67uBwteyphEyvI0q9H1_S56FqPhQIHdt_HtApA5EaXdCAQdxgprhhOY3jBFEJrPaol2I75cCTVy11uodhzA1hAxfPH_2oc7sEtc32qj5_R1grjofk9MkkcNjTmC_rCt3ajuj3_rocl8qL-Xexa_5UkSbJEKTbQzRhWkYaJXiXQniHeK6naQ82HDbfHGYkLEpt5I2j1JaTzveuZZe2tytN5-hFJTumoBFPu3PlnXAABnc%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b01430eb52a42c893f7e43c0f16c646&_e=fzD6t8I88fsQsdWuFH9hP55TJS2olq2qO6sSJA-Li43bPH3fB7jBCZueQzCDzVlsXLeaWl0MO3_ZmrrbictYhTvCR_S5RC5aGJdRHhPQByCsVO_p8r3dntTqMO7rJotBEztUwex-NgWEphy5mmMC7lGeQBnvkPDreZZ-m54oT0C01DhYFHWwc4XXF3B1I2NTQV1e-wAsCi61pwdwo6U7KTv2i7WPkDqFqW-YvLn9maJwnO0av2fAdmvs5n7cC3zrbjoJRSKBseWKD9SqZNlMMTJsLLEK0QyQ0pYMMJTja7ZEScki0AqL76ekDg4ITD9AKMfpqhyp6xOdiqOjLxHciDBlGB9RNo0q_LjNeHHlwiAQGCiI6O5_-qq_AVXXva2u7_skGLwZIGe4UlulzecOPuQ17btwooaORiwWU1pJTJPFUu7keOCHdU1s9_yv_jg1NRu8Lz2UxDxHfyBcNQ1NhSjrl75LuTwK8z1BtMG4mjmNHTPPbd8ZC7ZvpmuH6f7KGAcmx4pPsv7KxulrBMtOYKT3-cm3Nadl63UFUnNlLD3GXwxRHhgyz07o4AIL0kBzfykUgqGjonQQf4SqYHCLmaRlrAYURxJmrvJYfB72piU%3D)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b01430eb52a42c893f7e43c0f16c646&_e=fzD6t8I88fsQsdWuFH9hP55TJS2olq2qO6sSJA-Li43bPH3fB7jBCZueQzCDzVlsXLeaWl0MO3_ZmrrbictYhTvCR_S5RC5aGJdRHhPQByCsVO_p8r3dntTqMO7rJotBEztUwex-NgWEphy5mmMC7lGeQBnvkPDreZZ-m54oT0C01DhYFHWwc4XXF3B1I2NTlZ1eZe4FD6libUY3c70N9KFF3n6phHGdwgVH1FIz0aYy8O1CyEgi7kfpaP92NqExPuR2eOUkoOmXJ5nuptmzz-SycTfqIg5cQNCMBvZcJv4nu2EWO2BCdYFojaUAr2izZxLwTf9rqsj0S41hy6jGGo2qV0Gu2MOjj6vIW20R3lFQh2VREwhkkCdkZ87xMKoXMKsJMIkJugVWHevvXK8vI2CVwxC67exoHqVRC15NU6fKsqATcz_ZCmyzjxmjzIllxbqF6leO55INto0mHad-PN1g1rFlLGpZovzzu-KtOsXtgb7L83mia9IxA6or03Ha2q6nS3pAkJlaRykSMtKokgoNaCCLMJWOQqtw57JfCgZB4ZoR7kaCQbOk9D65AkiKLGjEpCldamaTXG_vX-W4y8QM_zBtl_nwpz7DG2DlkCw%3D)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re **horrified** by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. clean_body: As a senior how do you feel about their findings? | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Tristan Rader
subject: March in the 4th of July Parade!!
body:
Join Tristan July 4th in the Lakewood 4th of July Parade | | | |
---
|
# Join us for the Lakewood
4th of July Parade!!
---
| | |
---
|
### Join me in my first parade as a State Representative!
Hey friends, Lakewood’s Fourth of July Parade is right around the corner, and I’d love for you to march with me! This is one of the best community events of the year, and a great way to show support, meet neighbors, and celebrate the values we’re fighting for: equality, justice, and a better future for all. **Here’s the info:** 📅 **Parade Date:** Friday, July 4, 2025 (rain or shine)
🕘 **Line-up Time:** Between 9:00–9:30 AM (please arrive by 9:30!)
📍 **Line-up Location:** Edgewater Dr. between Webb & Kenneth
🚶♂️ **Parade Start:** 10:00 AM sharp
🗺️ **Route:** East on Lake Ave. from Kenneth to Lakewood Park (1mi)
We'll have signs, flags, candy, music, and great energy! Wear red, white, and blue, or rep your _Tristan Rader_ shirt if you’ve got one - or we will provide a **free t-shirt** if you need one! In the form linked, please indicate if you have mobility challenges and require a ride in the parade car. There's a role for everyone, and all are welcome! [👉 **Click here to sign up to march with us!**](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=9e79e59aa0&e=869bcf0641) Let’s show Lakewood what people-powered politics looks like. Hope to see you there! In solidarity,
**Tristan Rader**
---
| [Sign Up Now!! ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=e31948571c&e=869bcf0641 "Sign Up Now!! ")

**_POLITICO:_ Trump administration slapped with ‘impoundment’ violation for freezing library, museum funding**

_"By freezing money that’s supposed to flow through the Institute of Museum and Library Services, the Trump administration violated the 51-year-old law barring presidents from withholding federal dollars without approval from Congress..."_
[DONATE TO HOLD TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011113/552968525/-1978405529?refcode=em25_250621_fundin_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250621_fundin_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=54a5eb02-ce4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGE1ZWIwMi1jZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UcjkbHUQBeNYm4IRIstgv13pC1Y4-tmrAgZ-_s3oLRY=)
* * *
Peter,

To nobody's surprise, the Trump administration has been caught— _again_ —violating the law by freezing critical federal funding without congressional approval.

This time it was money set aside for libraries and museums, vital community institutions that educate, preserve history, and serve everyone. **This marks the second time Trump has been hit with an impoundment violation.**

Let's be clear: This is a serious breach of the Constitution’s separation of powers. Despite what he may think, he's not a king, he doesn’t get to decide where this money goes. _That’s Congress’s job._ Our founders were crystal clear: **Congress holds the power of the purse, not sitting presidents.**

That’s how our democracy ensures no one person— _no matter how powerful or self-interested_ —can hijack the system. But, yet again, Trump is testing those boundaries. And make no mistake, he won’t stop unless we stop him. That means flipping the House in 2026 and putting a check on this president. **We need representatives who will defend democracy, not rubber-stamp authoritarian power grabs.**
