clean_body: POLITICO: Trump administration slapped with ‘impoundment’ violation for freezing library, museum funding POLITICO: Trump administration slapped with ‘impoundment’ violation for freezing library, museum funding "By freezing money that’s supposed to flow through the Institute of Museum and Library Services, the Trump administration violated the 51-year-old law barring presidents from withholding federal dollars without approval from Congress..." = Peter, To nobody's surprise, the Trump administration has been caught— again —violating the law by freezing critical federal funding without congressional approval. This time it was money set aside for libraries and museums, vital community institutions that educate, preserve history, and serve everyone. This marks the second time Trump has been hit with an impoundment violation. Let's be clear: This is a serious breach of the Constitution’s separation of powers. Despite what he may think, he's not a king, he doesn’t get to decide where this money goes. That’s Congress’s job. Our founders were crystal clear: Congress holds the power of the purse, not sitting presidents. That’s how our democracy ensures no one person— no matter how powerful or self-interested —can hijack the system. But, yet again, Trump is testing those boundaries. And make no mistake, he won’t stop unless we stop him. That means flipping the House in 2026 and putting a check on this president. We need representatives who will defend democracy, not rubber-stamp authoritarian power grabs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. name: Sarah McBride
subject: As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be times like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=Ym%2FZgvHWHI6HYuCC83k8p7UD13e%2FgwR2rvHeIj%2FLfSysi3SqHBBVkylq1YJ5lUKfeQqvRnO3AIwq1hr8Z0TkyJPqzElUH2rsDwCQwjmcKvlUTyNYwOoPXX7OEGC%2BjBmpJy5Ycdr5PT3Qd9dESUXfA3Cs%2BeMb94XkCDo4K%2BdciOLYsifRwHOlo5fNIZZmpCE9FlCk%2FNH6cu7z%2F%2B1EjiJkNymP8bJjSijPO6adLikrqvMAvzRzyE7vGrJvRmlOcJG64a2Vc3qr%2F%2FAfjVsnyDcjWRerxXBMzvlobzm9n0xhupxqmZyr%2BaWFMld7%2BFh0wNn6ieKNpaFzemG99QEt%2BiMlFMNmOIZFwpceMxIfegvV5OfKjFqLrEZ%2BtG15uGFwWE4fYG%2Bl7G43vE2aH3DbE2Y5vhGV%2Bym9mMolSgreks0ukyw1Dxf2Mf3%2Bv0hwDvxlKVE9)
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011219/552968832/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_062125_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiYzk5Ny1jZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r0SGLhR1c0_2ezBB-6LpTZDL4g9rZMWUG4lKCz98Q0=) Hi Peter, it's Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. **As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.** I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and the Democratic Party of Georgia standing with me. [If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011220/552968833/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_062125_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiYzk5Ny1jZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r0SGLhR1c0_2ezBB-6LpTZDL4g9rZMWUG4lKCz98Q0=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011221/552968834/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_062125_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiYzk5Ny1jZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r0SGLhR1c0_2ezBB-6LpTZDL4g9rZMWUG4lKCz98Q0=)**
---
Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
[So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $10 between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011222/552968835/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_062125_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiYzk5Ny1jZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r0SGLhR1c0_2ezBB-6LpTZDL4g9rZMWUG4lKCz98Q0=)

clean_body: I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | = Hi Peter, it's Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues. I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and the Democratic Party of Georgia standing with me. = | | = Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me. Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it. That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split evenly between Sarah McBride and the Democratic Party of Georgia: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you and Happy Pride! subject: I’m not afraid, and I’m not staying silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011364/552969238/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU3NmI2ZS1jZjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYlsrqM6YdhRXclGceXKwhE8y4Mtlf48O3AhmjJLF0c=)
Folks, the recent Trump-Musk breakup had me thinking about my own dispute with Musk from a few months back.
After I called out Musk’s attacks on our democracy, Trump’s politicized Department of Justice sent me a letter with the goal of scaring me into silence:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011365/552969239/789508428?refcode=250621_RG_Silent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU3NmI2ZS1jZjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYlsrqM6YdhRXclGceXKwhE8y4Mtlf48O3AhmjJLF0c=)
**Well, I have news for Donald Trump and his Department of Justice:_I’m not afraid, and I’m not staying silent._**
When I see attacks on our democracy, on our federal government, on the rule of law itself — I have no choice but to take a stand and call it out.
It’s what the people of California elected me to do, and it’s what the American people deserve from their leaders. **This is not a time for cowardice.**
[**But with the full force of Trump’s Justice Department targeting me and my colleagues, I’m going to need your help like never before to defend my voice in Congress at this critical moment. You can help me continue standing up for our freedoms by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now. Can I count on you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011366/552969240/789508428?refcode=250621_RG_Silent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU3NmI2ZS1jZjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYlsrqM6YdhRXclGceXKwhE8y4Mtlf48O3AhmjJLF0c=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011367/552969241/-309737922?refcode=250621_RG_Silent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU3NmI2ZS1jZjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYlsrqM6YdhRXclGceXKwhE8y4Mtlf48O3AhmjJLF0c=)
Thank you,
Robert
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110011368/552969242/-309737922?refcode=250621_RG_Silent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU3NmI2ZS1jZjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYlsrqM6YdhRXclGceXKwhE8y4Mtlf48O3AhmjJLF0c=)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Stop Trump’s War with Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Rep. Massie and I have introduced a War Powers Resolution [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/06/17/world/middleeast/trump-war-powers-iran-congress.html] to keep America out of a war with Iran.
While Trump debates whether to strike Iran, our resolution guarantees a vote in the House, which means every member will have to go on the record.
Sign the petition: Tell Congress to reject a war with Iran. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/iran-war-powers-resolution-petition?contactdata=EFWUWpQOAsulvvF9Coce4WSxEICojYJqnIgNi8EpZcBpLXfGxG8tpgR70Na43GNkatF70/aT9vVoW+fEVRm9VOunjWas0IBoA1g1/qwEqwDZlpO6fqYKRfo3lIVcECd1rrBcOnVy+zrjRXII4D4QyXnnGePjeQZxQO3cQ/xQQKt5tO0HNinXZlsh6Idg3R5f]
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1935524307217604647 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1935524307217604647]
Let’s be clear: The United States must not go to war with Iran. The Iraq War was the biggest American blunder of the 21st century. We need Congress to act now to stop the next war before it begins.
TAKE ACTION: Demand that your representative co-sponsor our resolution and stand up to the war establishment in both parties. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/iran-war-powers-resolution-petition?contactdata=EFWUWpQOAsulvvF9Coce4WSxEICojYJqnIgNi8EpZcBpLXfGxG8tpgR70Na43GNkatF70/aT9vVoW+fEVRm9VOunjWas0IBoA1g1/qwEqwDZlpO6fqYKRfo3lIVcECd1rrBcOnVy+zrjRXII4D4QyXnnGePjeQZxQO3cQ/xQQKt5tO0HNinXZlsh6Idg3R5f]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. subject: Trump’s not a king, but he sure acts like one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Last week, thousands of Coloradans gathered in cities and towns across the state to protest Donald Trump’s dangerous, authoritarian agenda.

Jason Crow stands with them. What we’re facing isn’t just political, it’s personal. It’s about the kind of country we want to live in.

Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” would gut Medicaid, reward billionaires with massive tax breaks, and explode the national deficit, all while everyday families pay the price.

Beyond the numbers, Trump is deploying military force to intimidate American citizens. This isn’t leadership. It’s a power grab, and Trump’s acting like a king.

Jason has never backed down from tough fights when it comes to defending our democracy. He never wavered as an Army Ranger or as an impeachment manager in Trump’s first impeachment trial, and he’s definitely not going to fold now.

Every day, he’s fighting for working families and protecting the values that actually make America strong: decency, fairness, and the rule of law. He won’t let Donald Trump rewrite the rules.

If you’re with Jason and believe in standing up against authoritarianism, will you chip in to support his campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

name: Mazie Hirono

body:
|
#

Peter, I want to take a moment to discuss the importance of our upcoming FEC deadline and what it means for our fight together. At the end of June, our team will report all of our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, which will then make those numbers publicly available. This end-of-quarter deadline isn’t just a date on the calendar — it’s a critical test of our momentum. The numbers we report don’t just reflect our financial strength — they send a powerful message to this corrupt administration: **We’re organized, we’re united, and we’re not backing down.** In moments like this — when the values we hold dear are under attack — showing strong support gives us the power to keep fighting for causes that matter. Your support has never been so important, and as we approach this reporting deadline, we need you with us more than ever. Every contribution, no matter the size, demonstrates that we’re committed to building a future rooted in our values, not just the priorities of the powerful few. **[Let’s show the strength of our grassroots movement. name: WileyNickel.com
subject: We’ve got some good news and some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012201/552972156/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250621_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDc3M2UzOS1kMjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RyAWx09gyjqy9IX3WLbmtAlJ7eJtt-HXvZu1eo9ijmM=)
---
Hi Peter, **Let’s start with the bad news:** Thom Tillis just hired the same top consultants who helped Donald Trump raise millions and get elected. He nabbed Trump’s pollster, his chief data strategist, and his lead fundraiser. They’re calling it a “rock star” team. We’re calling it what it is: a desperate attempt to hold on to power and bring Trump’s full MAGA playbook to North Carolina. **But here’s the good news:** even Trump voters in North Carolina are sick of Thom Tillis. In recent swing-voter focus groups, **only one out of twelve participants** said they’d consider voting for him again. The rest said they couldn’t name a single thing he’s done for our state and that they don’t trust him to deliver. Tillis is **already** one of the most vulnerable senators in the country heading into 2026, and with your support, we can defeat him and flip this seat blue. But we can’t afford to wait. clean_body: | = Hi Peter, Let’s start with the bad news: Thom Tillis just hired the same top consultants who helped Donald Trump raise millions and get elected. He nabbed Trump’s pollster, his chief data strategist, and his lead fundraiser. They’re calling it a “rock star” team. We’re calling it what it is: a desperate attempt to hold on to power and bring Trump’s full MAGA playbook to North Carolina. But here’s the good news: even Trump voters in North Carolina are sick of Thom Tillis. In recent swing-voter focus groups, only one out of twelve participants said they’d consider voting for him again. The rest said they couldn’t name a single thing he’s done for our state and that they don’t trust him to deliver. Tillis is already one of the most vulnerable senators in the country heading into 2026, and with your support, we can defeat him and flip this seat blue. But we can’t afford to wait. name: Rep. Janelle Bynum
subject: My least favorite part of the job →
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110012305/552972582/-1076767284?refcode=WUEFC656_20250621_BynumCF&sourceid=1056434&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjZmYjMxNi1kMjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEeic6jEW4MCcWEiYdQIBS2Sawsm1fnS1zjD25IRinU=) Peter,

I'll be honest with you: Asking for your hard-earned money every month is my _least favorite part of running for Congress_.

**But the reality is that our race here in Oregon's 5th Congressional District is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, and I can't win next November without your support.**

In 2024, far-right MAGA Republicans fought hard to keep this seat red — but we were able to turn it blue thanks to supporters like you. [**Now, I'm asking you to step up once again to help us hold this seat.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110012307/552972584/-1076767284?refcode=WUEFC656_20250621_BynumCF&sourceid=1056434&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjZmYjMxNi1kMjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEeic6jEW4MCcWEiYdQIBS2Sawsm1fnS1zjD25IRinU=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110012312/552972587/-1076767284?refcode=WUEFC656_20250621_BynumCF&sourceid=1056434&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjZmYjMxNi1kMjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEeic6jEW4MCcWEiYdQIBS2Sawsm1fnS1zjD25IRinU=)

You can trust that I would never ask for even $1 if I couldn't tell you exactly how your donation would have an outsized impact on our race.

On a grassroots campaign like ours, $3 helps us print yard signs; $10 helps us reach more voters; and $5 helps to fight back against any attack Republicans throw our way.
**[To ensure our campaign is on track to win this highly competitive race, my team has set a goal of raising $15,000 by the end of the month. Please, will you join in on our people-powered movement with a $5 grassroots donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110012315/552972593/-1076767284?refcode=WUEFC656_20250621_BynumCF&sourceid=1056434&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjZmYjMxNi1kMjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEeic6jEW4MCcWEiYdQIBS2Sawsm1fnS1zjD25IRinU=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I'll be honest with you: Asking for your hard-earned money every month is my least favorite part of running for Congress. But the reality is that our race here in Oregon's 5th Congressional District is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, and I can't win next November without your support. In 2024, far-right MAGA Republicans fought hard to keep this seat red — but we were able to turn it blue thanks to supporters like you. = | = You can trust that I would never ask for even $1 if I couldn't tell you exactly how your donation would have an outsized impact on our race. On a grassroots campaign like ours, $3 helps us print yard signs; $10 helps us reach more voters; and $5 helps to fight back against any attack Republicans throw our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Janelle Rep. Janelle Bynum = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Calling out the bullsh*t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
**I'm Mallory McMorrow, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the bullshit.** [**I’m going to share more about why I’m running. But before I do, if you’re like me and are done with the BS coming from Washington, please split a contribution between Ohio House Dems and my campaign now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012925/552974567/-1576555546?refcode=250621_McMorrow_Calling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJmZjI5YS1kNDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op7evCeKPn5_ee-AL7As9jN81LEaOKxLHZ9wTq6z9tA=) | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012926/552974568/-632785217?refcode=250621_McMorrow_Calling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJmZjI5YS1kNDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op7evCeKPn5_ee-AL7As9jN81LEaOKxLHZ9wTq6z9tA= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
Now I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up. Politics should be about service, not self-interest. And not building up your own power by tearing others down. So I googled _“how to run for office.”_
Seriously.
I took on a state Senate race in Michigan no one thought we could win. I took on an incumbent state Senator who _refused_ to do anything about the epidemic of gun violence, who sided with corporate polluters over protecting our clean water, and who didn’t represent us.
Democrats and Republicans counted me out because I was young. Because I had never run for office before. Because it _**“wasn’t my turn”.**_ But through the help of over 500(!) local volunteers, I swung a Republican-held state Senate seat 20 points and flipped a district that included Mitt Romney’s home town. That victory sent me to the Michigan State Senate.
_**My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate: no bullshit.**_
The system is broken and we should call it out. I’m a millennial. On the whole, we’re the first generation to do worse than our parents. For millions of people, it can feel like you’ve done _everything_ right — working hard in school, going to college or earning a skill or trade, taking on one job, then a side-hustle, then a gig, building your entire life around work and still barely getting by. It’s impossible to buy a house. It’s too expensive to start a family. We look at our parents and wonder where it all went wrong? The American Dream feels like a distant past.
Democratic messaging usually sounds something like this: “Democrats are fighting to help you put food on the table.”
Oy. Now look, of course that’s true, but that vision isn’t big enough. No one aspires to _just get by_. We need to think bigger, dream bigger, and lay out a vision for the New American Dream that people can see themselves in, something they want to vote for.
Because being against Donald Trump is simply not enough.
It’s about a Michigan where you know you’ll have a tight-knit vibrant community, where you’ll have restaurants, small businesses, and places to go. It’s about creating a future where if you work hard, you _will_ be able to afford the life you dreamed of — to start a family, to buy that house, rent where you want, have the car you want, have a fulfilling career, and yes — maybe even have that little place Up North because you can afford a vacation and time away to reset. And still put money away for retirement, savings, or a college or house fund for your kids.
[**Democrats have to get real. The status quo simply wasn’t working. But while Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to burn it all to the ground, we have to build something new. Something that actually works. For everyone.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012927/552974569/-1576555546?refcode=250621_McMorrow_Calling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJmZjI5YS1kNDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op7evCeKPn5_ee-AL7As9jN81LEaOKxLHZ9wTq6z9tA=)
I’m fed up with Democrats in DC who have completely missed how much people were struggling. I’m fed up with the party of “Well, _actually_.” When we told our party leaders that groceries and gas were too expensive, that people were struggling to find the job they really wanted, that they felt stretched too thin, what did Democrats do? Told them the economy was doing great, _actually._
So yes, even if the decisions made by our leaders staved off the worst of a recession, people were still hurting. And we need to _listen_ to them.
Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator.
[**If you’re done with the same old nonsense, split a donation between Ohio House Dems and my campaign and send a message to DC on day one.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012928/552974570/-1576555546?refcode=250621_McMorrow_Calling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJmZjI5YS1kNDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op7evCeKPn5_ee-AL7As9jN81LEaOKxLHZ9wTq6z9tA=)
Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. **But we are not powerless.**
The reality is, there’s a lot in common between this moment today, and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know _exactly_ how to rise to this moment.
This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together.
[**So please join us in building that future: split a contribution of whatever you can between Ohio House Dems and my campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012929/552974571/-1576555546?refcode=250621_McMorrow_Calling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJmZjI5YS1kNDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op7evCeKPn5_ee-AL7As9jN81LEaOKxLHZ9wTq6z9tA=)
| [**$5 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110012930/552974572/-632785217?amount=5&refcode=250621_McMorrow_Calling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJmZjI5YS1kNDRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op7evCeKPn5_ee-AL7As9jN81LEaOKxLHZ9wTq6z9tA= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

Because being against Donald Trump is simply not enough. It’s about a Michigan where you know you’ll have a tight-knit vibrant community, where you’ll have restaurants, small businesses, and places to go. It’s about creating a future where if you work hard, you will be able to afford the life you dreamed of — to start a family, to buy that house, rent where you want, have the car you want, have a fulfilling career, and yes — maybe even have that little place Up North because you can afford a vacation and time away to reset. And still put money away for retirement, savings, or a college or house fund for your kids. = I’m fed up with Democrats in DC who have completely missed how much people were struggling. I’m fed up with the party of “Well, actually.” When we told our party leaders that groceries and gas were too expensive, that people were struggling to find the job they really wanted, that they felt stretched too thin, what did Democrats do? Told them the economy was doing great, actually. So yes, even if the decisions made by our leaders staved off the worst of a recession, people were still hurting. And we need to listen to them. Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator. = Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. But we are not powerless. The reality is, there’s a lot in common between this moment today, and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know exactly how to rise to this moment. This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you, Mallory = = = OHDC 545 E. body:
Final chance >>
| Friend — your 2025 Democratic Membership is __still__ UNCONFIRMED? [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91312?t=6&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq) | [STAND WITH HEROES LIKE BERNIE SANDERS, HAKEEM JEFFRIES, AND ELIZABETH WARREN: CONFIRM YOUR DEMOCRATIC SUPPORTER MEMBERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91312?t=7&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq)
---
_This could be a HUGE problem:_

**Trump just raked in _$600 MILLION_ to CRUSH our momentum, destroy Social Security and Medicaid, and END Democracy as we know it.**

**_We CAN’T afford to fall behind right now, team!_**

[**We need 15,000 Democrats to confirm their 2025 Democratic Supporter Memberships by 11:59pm to help Democrats take back the House and Senate, SAVE our democracy and our benefits, and STOP Trump’s MAGA movement in its tracks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91312?t=8&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91313?t=9&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq)

Now or never,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20300%2E878179%2EmW2etq) to request fewer emails. name: Tobias Read
subject: The values that guide me:
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
Hi, folks. It’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
People often ask me why I still send out fundraising emails even though I was just elected. Trust me – asking for money is not my favorite part of being a candidate.
Here’s the bottom line: I love my job and I’m proud of the work we have done in the Secretary of State’s office. But even though the election is behind us, the work of building a strong, effective campaign never really stops. Maintaining a campaign apparatus is crucial in modern politics. Without it, I’d be vulnerable to a challenger. Raising money also allows me to build stronger alliances across Oregon and to support organizations and candidates who will fight to protect our democracy.
Most importantly, it allows me to maintain a consistent and aggressive communication structure with Oregon residents about what I’m doing to uplift our democracy and help make Oregon's government more accountable to voters.
To support my campaign, please consider pitching in $25 or more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
The principles that guide my time in office are the same ones that guided me during the campaign.
Democracy. The rule of law. Public service. Fairness and equality.
So when it comes to standing up to MAGA extremism and President Donald Trump’s illegal actions, it’s never a question of whether I’ll bow to political pressure.
I’ll choose my values and the bedrock principles of American democracy every time.
But as our country faces unprecedented challenges, I need your help to continue defending Oregon’s elections. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
I also wanted to share a quick update. I recently had the honor of sitting down with Southern Oregon’s Jefferson Public Radio to discuss the work that my office has been doing over the past few months.
You can listen to what I had to say by clicking on this link. [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
And then, if you’re able, chip in $10 (or whatever you can spare) to help my campaign stay strong in the face of these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250621em-values-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

Here’s where we stand.

**First:** Last November, we flipped **TEN** Republican-held seats and came within striking distance of taking back the House.

**Then:** Trump’s billionaire donors dropped $4 million in 1 NIGHT to support House Republicans and their extreme agenda.

**Now:** Our fundraising is falling behind and we need to band together for an all-hands-on-deck push against the flood of extremism that has been unleashed on the American people.

The latest polls reveal House Democrats are up by 8 POINTS in the race to take back the House. We have a major opportunity here, but we can’t take on these billionaire donors alone. That’s where you come in.

**House Democrats need your support now more than ever to grow our lead, overpower MAGA’s billionaire funded war chest and put our winning strategy into action. clean_body: Quick update on where Derek stands ahead of his end-of-quarter deadline | = = Here’s where we stand. First: Last November, we flipped TEN Republican-held seats and came within striking distance of taking back the House. Then: Trump’s billionaire donors dropped $4 million in 1 NIGHT to support House Republicans and their extreme agenda. Now: Our fundraising is falling behind and we need to band together for an all-hands-on-deck push against the flood of extremism that has been unleashed on the American people. The latest polls reveal House Democrats are up by 8 POINTS in the race to take back the House. We have a major opportunity here, but we can’t take on these billionaire donors alone. That’s where you come in. House Democrats need your support now more than ever to grow our lead, overpower MAGA’s billionaire funded war chest and put our winning strategy into action. Derek Tran is in a key, must-win district that is essential to take back the House.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Keep the faith, Hakeem Jeffries | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Let’s finish what we started
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205z4gz8p0lvhxh2ghy86y3e7nfyjcr2d1c8tr1cw3zu5szzf2an3hha0o6lfkdpi2f6igm9wp56zkkaapi&__stmp=sy82c1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jj03zjoo1s2pxtq9o6tz6ju4llqwoa9rxeafira4cvtj7r54lmgxfcajmz0lhqyn7ndpclkg6bpw6k0i5l9xvudfxzhbnh2wqiw7ngvzwkhnszbou2ttijj8cyd6o4f43e8x8rdjjo806fjwadjo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jj03zjoo1s2pxtq9o6tz6ju59yt0ws7mpbi9xy1dii3e1bh2bute0m5rt64bo01p38fbdvqb9p7hv1ccl4pt651wmwaa8fpwnzr26ow9jqifdxqvvlx4vjvurw13ekoas1jk0iqjepjbav0hyspo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy82c1&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: All On The Line
subject: Here’s why our census matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need to take census attacks seriously. Here’s why:
|
---

Peter,
When our census is under attack, our democracy is under attack. **That’s because our fight for fair maps doesn’t start through legal battles or in state redistricting commissions — it starts with the census. **
Every ten years, the census ensures an accurate count of our population and demographics. The data then determines how our communities are accounted for, and ultimately, how our political power is distributed — shaping local representation and congressional seats.
**That’s why anti-democracy forces have been laying the groundwork to undermine it.** By manipulating the count behind the maps, they can silence communities and unfairly consolidate their power and representation.
Since Trump took office in January, his administration and radicals around the country have made deliberate attacks on the census. He rescinded an order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted. We’ve seen massive data become inaccessible to the public, wiped from the Census Bureau website. To top it off, some extremist attorney generals have sued to stop the 2030 census from counting all U.S. residents.
Without an accurate population count, the administration can succeed at excluding traditionally undercounted people like communities of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and Native communities.
**To put it plainly: This would make it impossible to create fair maps that truly represent the communities that live there.** The census is the foundation for redistricting, and right now, it’s under attack again — so we’re sounding the alarm.
[**Peter, we need folks like you to power our work for fair maps and accurate representation — that includes our efforts to mobilize communities in demanding a fair census. Can you make a donation to All On The Line today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110013591/552976961/917590507?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_CensusDownload_email_20250623-AOTL-Tier1-CensusDownload_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250623-AOTL-Tier1-CensusDownload_&utm_campaign=CensusDownload&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNWVmNTUzLWRhNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaQTuWSLjLgW0Lh5HhWgV4WB46ut_u5br5VUd6YYiSw=)

---
According to recent population estimates from the Census Bureau, the makeup of the House of Representatives could significantly change, with the South potentially gaining NINE seats — plus, these gains would be predominantly from communities of color across Florida, Texas, and North Carolina. **These are some of the states where we’ve seen repeated efforts to gerrymander and silence marginalized communities — so we have to expect the attacks incoming. **
Peter, this is not the first time that the census has been under attack. **And it’s certainly not the last.** As long as anti-democracy forces exist, we must remain committed to protecting the integrity of the census and its data.
**Undermining the integrity of the census data and eroding the trust of the American people is part of a coordinated, extreme ideological attack on our democracy. In 2020, our movement was able to help defend the 2020 Census from the first Trump administration’s attempts to distort the count with a manipulative and racist citizenship question — and we’re prepared to defend the 2030 Census with you by our side. **
**[All On The Line will not let assaults on the census stand, and we know you won’t either. Can you make a contribution of](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110013593/552976963/917590507?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_CensusDownload_email_20250623-AOTL-Tier1-CensusDownload_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250623-AOTL-Tier1-CensusDownload_&utm_campaign=CensusDownload&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNWVmNTUzLWRhNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaQTuWSLjLgW0Lh5HhWgV4WB46ut_u5br5VUd6YYiSw=)**[**$15 or whatever you can to help stop anti-democracy extremists from manipulating the system in their favor?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110013594/552976964/917590507?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_CensusDownload_email_20250623-AOTL-Tier1-CensusDownload_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250623-AOTL-Tier1-CensusDownload_&utm_campaign=CensusDownload&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNWVmNTUzLWRhNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaQTuWSLjLgW0Lh5HhWgV4WB46ut_u5br5VUd6YYiSw=)

clean_body: We need to take census attacks seriously. Here’s why: | Peter, When our census is under attack, our democracy is under attack. That’s because our fight for fair maps doesn’t start through legal battles or in state redistricting commissions — it starts with the census. Every ten years, the census ensures an accurate count of our population and demographics. The data then determines how our communities are accounted for, and ultimately, how our political power is distributed — shaping local representation and congressional seats. That’s why anti-democracy forces have been laying the groundwork to undermine it. By manipulating the count behind the maps, they can silence communities and unfairly consolidate their power and representation. Since Trump took office in January, his administration and radicals around the country have made deliberate attacks on the census. He rescinded an order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted. We’ve seen massive data become inaccessible to the public, wiped from the Census Bureau website. To top it off, some extremist attorney generals have sued to stop the 2030 census from counting all U.S. residents. Without an accurate population count, the administration can succeed at excluding traditionally undercounted people like communities of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and Native communities. To put it plainly: This would make it impossible to create fair maps that truly represent the communities that live there. The census is the foundation for redistricting, and right now, it’s under attack again — so we’re sounding the alarm. = = According to recent population estimates from the Census Bureau, the makeup of the House of Representatives could significantly change, with the South potentially gaining NINE seats — plus, these gains would be predominantly from communities of color across Florida, Texas, and North Carolina. These are some of the states where we’ve seen repeated efforts to gerrymander and silence marginalized communities — so we have to expect the attacks incoming. Peter, this is not the first time that the census has been under attack. And it’s certainly not the last. As long as anti-democracy forces exist, we must remain committed to protecting the integrity of the census and its data. Undermining the integrity of the census data and eroding the trust of the American people is part of a coordinated, extreme ideological attack on our democracy. In 2020, our movement was able to help defend the 2020 Census from the first Trump administration’s attempts to distort the count with a manipulative and racist citizenship question — and we’re prepared to defend the 2030 Census with you by our side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for your help, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

Completely unbelievable.
Yesterday, Vice President JD Vance parachuted into California but “couldn’t remember” Senator Alex Padilla’s name when attacking him in his remarks.
“I was hoping Jose Padilla would be here to ask a question, but unfortunately I guess he decided not to show up because there wasn’t the theater,” Vice President JD Vance said in Los Angeles.
Let’s be real. JD Vance served with Alex Padilla in the United States Senate. He knows his name.
This disrespect for Californians has reached a new low. We are all justified in being furious and outraged. But we need to channel that into political power. That means ramping up organizing efforts that will take back the U.S. House. Will you pitch in $ or more right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount=]“He knows my name,” Senator Alex Padilla said bluntly. “Look, sadly it’s just an indicator of how petty and unserious this administration is.”
During his Presidential campaign, Donald Trump promised revenge and retribution. He promised to unleash the military on his political opponents who he called “the enemy from within.”
While ignoring rising prices and the economic instability he created, it’s clear that Donald Trump sees California as the “enemy from within” and is committed to keeping his campaign promises for revenge.
!!️ He deployed the national guard and military to patrol Los Angeles neighborhoods over the objection of Gov. Gavin Newsom. When the governor stood up against this, Trump called for him to be arrested .
!!️ When California’s Senator Alex Padilla questioned Secretary of Kristi Noem at a press conference, he was forced to the ground and handcuffed .
!!️ And now, rather than answer questions, JD Vance is parachuting into California just to mock Sen. Padilla by pretending not to remember his name.
There is so much work to be done for everyday Americans, but instead the Trump Administration is doing everything possible to target and mock Californians and others across the country.
There is no magic wand to stop the chaos. We wish there was. But with control of the U.S. House likely coming down to swing seats in California, we *DO* have an opportunity to take the fury and anger of this moment and build a political movement. By making a donation of $ or more today, you are investing in the campaign that will flip the House Majority and elect a Speaker who *WILL* hold Trump accountable and stop this madness. Are you in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount=]

- CADEM

During every break Senator Warner has in the Senate schedule, he heads back to the Commonwealth to speak directly with Virginians about their biggest concerns and his work in Washington to stand up to the Trump administration.

Earlier today, he spoke with hundreds of folks in Henrico County – one of Virginia’s Republican-held districts: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110013782/552977672/409585885?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TownHallFollowUp_250621_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQ4NjU4NS1kYjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7YJoDmGWXBwyOvsrruPDrZjyB0-NZChawVtAdBZ_C7Y=) But this isn’t the first GOP-held district Senator Warner held a town hall in, Derek. He’s held a town hall in every congressional district in Virginia represented by a Republican. Why?

He knows how difficult the past 6 months have been. From the early days of DOGE and their mass firings of federal workers, to Trump’s on-again, off-again tariffs driving up costs, to his big ugly bill, Warner knows Virginians have a lot to talk about when it comes to Trump's dangerous agenda.

**And frankly, many Republicans are hiding from their constituents right now because they know how deeply unpopular Trump’s reckless agenda is.**

Senator Warner will keep speaking out and pushing back when Trump and Congressional Republicans threaten your safety, your bank account, or your freedom, and he’ll keep you informed every step of the way.

But since we can’t rely on Republicans to stand up to Trump, it’s clear that taking back the Senate for Democrats is the only way we can hold the dangerous Trump administration accountable.

That starts with reelecting Mark.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Add your name to show your support for passing the Equality Act.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha)
Peter, As the first openly gay Senator in United States history, my commitment to equality isn’t just political — it’s personal. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/equality-act-2025/?t=4&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha) From Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill to laws in Iowa and Mississippi that target medical professionals who provide gender-affirming care to minors, LGBTQ+ Americans’ fundamental freedoms and civil rights are under attack by extremist Republicans across the country. And since the Trump administration is actively working to unravel all the progress we’ve made in recent years, it’s time to pass federal legislation that affirms that every American should be treated equally under the law. **That’s why I joined my Democratic colleagues in reintroducing the _Equality Act_ to guarantee every LGBTQ American the full freedom of equality and protection under federal law.** We’ve made incredible advances in equality for LGBTQ+ Americans in recent years, like passing my _Respect for Marriage Act_ to protect same-sex and interracial marriages, but our work is far from over. **This Pride Month, let’s recommit ourselves to the fight against discrimination and unjust treatment.** **[No LGBTQ+ American should face hate simply because of who they are and who they love. If you agree, sign on to show your support for passing the _Equality Act:_](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/equality-act-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250621_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/equality-act-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250621_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha)
---
I’m so grateful for your support, Peter. Thanks for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=4768%2E35263%2EGNGYha)

Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | By now, you might have heard about the Republican budget bill being considered in Congress. You might have heard about how it will gut Medicaid funding, resulting in 16 million Americans getting kicked off their health insurance. You might have heard that it contains a backdoor abortion ban. And you might have heard that it guts all these essential services our families rely on in order to give another round of tax cuts to billionaires and corporations. But what you might not have heard about is a last-minute provision Senate Republicans snuck into the bill: a massive sell-off of our public lands. **Yep, you read that right. On top of all the cruelty Senate Republicans are prepared to inflict on the American people, they're also trying to auction off our most treasured outdoor spaces in the process.** This includes some of our most beloved public lands in the Cascades, as well as popular hunting and recreation areas across Oregon. If Republicans succeed in their plans, this will be a massive gut punch to Oregonians and people across the West. All to finance Republicans' tax cuts for billionaires and corporations. I was already a 'no' on this bill that is the most destructive piece of legislation Congress has considered in decades, and now I'm a _hell no_. Our public lands are core to our identity as Oregonians and westerners. But Republicans think they can quietly auction them off for the benefit of billionaires without us noticing, so corporations can turn these spaces into new data centers and mining operations. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c0eb25f6-cf84-49ec-8a09-c95a33e5746b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Daniel Turner**
This is the second in my series of 10 proposals to win the war: the culture war, the war on America and western values, the war against our freedom and prosperity. A **[fuller intro can be found here](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/if-the-right-really-wants-to-win?r=5l70ex&utm_medium=ios)** where I also proposed the first two winning ideas.
The next two winners are the defense of unifying factors: the Pledge and English language. The following two are about property. Let's get going.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KQpBoWnAIb5KHNFIsBvOrbgZTQplespsfLU4iGG_lWc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166472086)
## **Three: The Pledge of Allegiance**
Whenever the left fears something they cower behind the term "litmus test". Nominating a judge to the Supreme Court? NO LITMUS TEST on abortion. Nominating a cabinet official or FBI / CIA director? NO LITMUS TEST on illegal aliens.
This proposal is, unequivocally, a litmus test.
Mandated in every school in every state and in every grade from pre-K to 12 is the Pledge of the Allegiance as the first act of the day. The litmus test is for the teachers and the faculty, because if they cannot comply with this basic, simple, patriotic gesture, then there is little chance said teacher actually teaches, but rather indoctrinates liberalism into the minds and hearts of our vulnerable, impressionable young people who grow up to be leftists.
The Pledge is unifying. It is for that reason it is disrespected. For the left, what unites us must be destroyed. The race baiters used The National Anthem to kneel because that one moment is what unites us, and therefore it must be attacked. Same goes for the Pledge. This is a litmus test, and those unwilling to pass it, to have 30 seconds of genuine deference and humility to respect something so much greater than the self and personal ideas and agenda, is a danger, a threat, probably a sexual deviant, definitely someone no parent would want near their children if they had the right to choose their kids' teachers.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Neil Armstrong's SHOCKING Apollo 11 confession
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...
Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.
And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.
NASA did their best to keep it secret...
But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.
**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef702f1-b9fc-46b3-8c29-4d11ad15a057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
* * *
**(Continued)**
## **Four: English Requirement for Citizenship**
Every election day the number of ballots in foreign languages expands. And if you cannot vote in English, you are not a functioning member of American society, and as such, you should not have been granted citizenship.
Does that hurt your feelings? I don't care.
America's language is English, and the inability to function in our language denies you shared experiences and commonality with American society. Lacking that means you lack the necessary essence of being American.
My great grandmother did not speak English. She didn't even speak Italian. She spoke some wacked regional dialect, arriving here at age 30 something with 6 kids, who all learned English, and never spoke their wacked regional dialect except to her. And I am sure that was hard. And sad. And I am sure one could argue their denial of cultural heritage and unique identity. But they were better off, and we, as a nation, were better off that this was the way. My ancestors all became thoroughly, deeply, American. So much so that when World War II broke out, they, with European roots, put on the American uniform and went back to fight and die in Europe as Americans.
Don't even get me started on Jury Duty. "Juror Translation Available" means the defendant does not have a "jury of peers". But there's not enough space here to go down that rabbit hell hole here...
Language is a unifier (like the aforementioned Pledge of Allegiance) and to win the war for America, we must require unifying factors as part of citizenship.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KQpBoWnAIb5KHNFIsBvOrbgZTQplespsfLU4iGG_lWc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166472086)
## **Five: No More Federal Land**
The National Parks are great. The other 250 million acres of land "managed" by the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) are a bureaucratic, wasteful nightmare arcanely overseen by several thousand desk jockeys in Washington DC who likely don't even own boots. Ever see **[a map of how](https://substack.com/redirect/9a7f18e1-71cf-4d5e-86fc-a4c69110c7be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** much the BLM controls? Absolute and utter insanity.
Swamp-dwelling democrats and republicans think they can manage the leviathan better. I am of the belief they both are incapable, when it comes to land, the solution is simple and deeply constitutional: give the land back to the states.
In Nevada, **[85% of the land](https://substack.com/redirect/c276aed4-ae07-42ea-8ef4-9805133215df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is owned by the federal government. In Utah, it is **[about 60%.](https://substack.com/redirect/b8129aa2-ec54-4ec3-bc31-baa45940829d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **A landmass much larger than Texas **[inside of Alaska](https://substack.com/redirect/a0c37d77-45cc-4fe7-aea2-a1c8aef8820c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is under federal control. These are not states: they are vassals.
No one can do a better job managing the land and the water of a region than the people who live in that region. Utah decisions should be made in Utah, not DC. Even if a state were to mess up beyond compare, as Gavin Newsom has done with state parks in California which routinely burn down from poor management, the problem will be contained to the state. Right now, a problem in Utah BLM land is the burden of everyone, and that is unsustainable. And flatly stupid.
National Parks are great. No one wants to build condos at Yellowstone (though think about the revenue...just kidding) but hundreds of millions of acres under the purview of some bureaucrat in DC who took the day off to protest ICE is a failed system. Smaller DC, smaller government, more freedom for the people. Close the BLM. Give the land to the states.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KQpBoWnAIb5KHNFIsBvOrbgZTQplespsfLU4iGG_lWc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166472086)
## **Six: American Only Land Ownership**
We do not talk enough about property, not just as a physical place but as a foundational principle of rights. Remember, the original inalienable rights outlined by Locke were "life, liberty, and property" which Jefferson broadened to "pursuit of happiness".
Property rights are sacred. Unless we take over Canada and/or Greenland, the amount of land in America is fixed, and that determines the cost of everything from housing to lumber to food.
American land belongs to America and should only be owned by Americans.
The CCP owns **[nearly 400,000](https://substack.com/redirect/0286cc80-4c79-41a7-bb49-365ce243c838?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** acres in America. What are they doing? What are they building? We are not sure, because in America, property rights are sacred... and leave it to the communists to exploit our laws to advance their evil. One day it will be too late. "The drone attacks were launched from Chinese owned land..." the nightly news TV anchor will read behind a bleached smile. This is a Trojan horse - a Chinese horse- only larger.
It is absolute madness.
The inalienable rights to "life, liberty, and property" may transcend national citizenship, but it is the solemn duty of our government to protect those rights executively for Americans. Land ownership must be solely for Americans. Foreigners have no rights to our land, I don't care what the banks or the brokers claim will be the financial consequence. America for Americans. Period. Confiscate the land before it is too late.
That was four more winners. If I were in Congress (haven't ruled it out...) I would propose, if nothing else to get the losers on record so I know who my enemies are. I got four more to go. Thanks for the emails.
We keep fighting. Honor and courage.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/50015ed9-d7f9-4f40-9220-59176b183c35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**by David Shuster**
The eldest Trump sons are back in the spotlight, not in a courtroom or political rally but possibly in your pocket. Eric and Don junior, the tireless defenders of the MAGA brand, have announced the launch of a new business venture - "Trump mobile." It's a new cell phone service wrapped in stars, stripes, and controversy.
Recently Eric Trump appeared on his favorite grift promotion transmission belt, aka Fox Business. He told right-wing conspiracy theorist/host, Maria Bartiromo, "Trump mobile is going to revolutionize cell phones and mobile calling."
Don junior then noted in a gaudy press conference that users of Trump mobile, for $47.45 a month, will have "unlimited data and texting to 100 countries around the globe." **Of course --as it always does with anything "**_**Trump, "**_**the small print includes a catch.**
You get up to 20 gigabytes of data at high speed. Everything above will not be at high speed. Translation: Do you enjoy watching paint drying? That's what it will be like waiting for your data/texts to go through after you go past the relatively low threshold of 20 giga bytes.
Oh, and according to industry analysts including Nilay Patel, editor in chief of the Verge, the top three carriers already in business provide you with more unlimited high-speed data at a less expensive monthly cost. Because, of course they do, and of course if a Trump is breathing a Trump is grifting.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d54e76eb-5810-4870-af4b-01cdb31c0fff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So, more high-speed data is available for less money from non Trump mobile carriers. But what about America first? Surely Trump mobile will fulfill President Trump's promise to bring more manufacturing and more jobs to these United States? Not really.
Eric Trump on the Benny Johnson podcast said the call/help centers for Trump mobile will be based in St. Louis Missouri. But he admitted the Trump mobile phones will be made in the USA "eventually." Eventually?
That is the give away that this is another Trump grift. Because currently, and perhaps for years, all the Trump mobile phones will be built in China.
If you want to reach a call center to help with your new Chinese manufactured mobile phone or you want to transfer your existing phone to the Trump mobile phone service, you will get somebody in Missouri as opposed to Bangladesh or India. But the price point for a new Trump mobile phone, $499 bucks, guarantees that the company will not add new manufacturing in the United States.
`Independent Media For $1.32/Week!`
_**We 're running a special! *Full Access* to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_
_**Please support our work covering stories corporate media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful indy-media ecosystem**_
_**Amplify Good! Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.0AkTaW4Uo9hImAM57WrQ-RTMtWV-5SZVe-SLBLWXLuQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166489017)
Nilay Patel says the Trump mobile phone can not be manufactured in the U.S. for that price and will almost certainly be a rebranded Chinese Android phone but with a Trump sticker slapped over it.
So, the Trump organization is once again going to put the Trump name on an existing product and service and make a bunch of promises that will not come true in the long term. Sound familiar?
Remember Trump water? Trump University? Trump casinos? The Trump shuttle? Trump watches? Trump playing cards? Trump steaks?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/21a8d43f-11c4-4338-a18b-168536af7bb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In some cases, the Trump family made some money from their low-grade, grifty product and got out before the entire Trump business effort collapsed. In other cases, various Trump ventures ended up having to declare bankruptcy.
How does anybody lose money owning a casino? Where people literally hand you money for nothing of value in the outside world, to sit for hours in an oxygen-soaked, drink-filled, loud space lacking sunlight and clocks to disorient and convince you to continue giving away your money hand over fist?
Well, the Trump organization--always the innovators--found a way.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5aad15b6-4dbf-44c3-b6f2-f67248fc380f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What's different now of is that Donald Trump and his family have tens of millions of die-hard supporters. They have proven they will buy Trump merch, coins, and tacky products just as quickly as they buy and embrace Trump lies.
To be fair, there may be some Americans who are willing to pay more for a mobile phone and monthly service just so they can keep that close and special connection with the Trumps (who'd never lower themselves to to hang out with any of the consumers of their grift) in every notification and news alert.
But those people are, how shall we put it? Pathetic.
The Trump family, once again, is involved in exploitation. Trump mobile is not an actual tech venture. It's another grift and echo in a Trump media chamber already filled with endless noise.
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and our weekly show (every Thursday, 2pm et, only on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."_
