Support Indy Media! | | ---|---|--- by David Shuster The eldest Trump sons are back in the spotlight, not in a courtroom or political rally but possibly in your pocket. Eric and Don junior, the tireless defenders of the MAGA brand, have announced the launch of a new business venture - "Trump mobile." It's a new cell phone service wrapped in stars, stripes, and controversy. Recently Eric Trump appeared on his favorite grift promotion transmission belt, aka Fox Business. He told right-wing conspiracy theorist/host, Maria Bartiromo, "Trump mobile is going to revolutionize cell phones and mobile calling." Don junior then noted in a gaudy press conference that users of Trump mobile, for $47.45 a month, will have "unlimited data and texting to 100 countries around the globe." Of course --as it always does with anything "Trump, "the small print includes a catch. You get up to 20 gigabytes of data at high speed. Everything above will not be at high speed. Translation: Do you enjoy watching paint drying? That's what it will be like waiting for your data/texts to go through after you go past the relatively low threshold of 20 giga bytes. Oh, and according to industry analysts including Nilay Patel, editor in chief of the Verge, the top three carriers already in business provide you with more unlimited high-speed data at a less expensive monthly cost. Because, of course they do, and of course if a Trump is breathing a Trump is grifting. So, more high-speed data is available for less money from non Trump mobile carriers. But what about America first? Surely Trump mobile will fulfill President Trump's promise to bring more manufacturing and more jobs to these United States? Not really. Eric Trump on the Benny Johnson podcast said the call/help centers for Trump mobile will be based in St. Louis Missouri. But he admitted the Trump mobile phones will be made in the USA "eventually." Eventually? That is the give away that this is another Trump grift. Because currently, and perhaps for years, all the Trump mobile phones will be built in China. If you want to reach a call center to help with your new Chinese manufactured mobile phone or you want to transfer your existing phone to the Trump mobile phone service, you will get somebody in Missouri as opposed to Bangladesh or India. But the price point for a new Trump mobile phone, $499 bucks, guarantees that the company will not add new manufacturing in the United States. `Independent Media For $1.32/Week!` We 're running a special! Full Access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week! Please support our work covering stories corporate media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful indy-media ecosystem Amplify Good! Support Indy Media! Nilay Patel says the Trump mobile phone can not be manufactured in the U.S. for that price and will almost certainly be a rebranded Chinese Android phone but with a Trump sticker slapped over it. So, the Trump organization is once again going to put the Trump name on an existing product and service and make a bunch of promises that will not come true in the long term. Sound familiar? Remember Trump water? Trump University? Trump casinos? The Trump shuttle? Trump watches? Trump playing cards? Trump steaks? | | ---|---|--- In some cases, the Trump family made some money from their low-grade, grifty product and got out before the entire Trump business effort collapsed. In other cases, various Trump ventures ended up having to declare bankruptcy. How does anybody lose money owning a casino? Where people literally hand you money for nothing of value in the outside world, to sit for hours in an oxygen-soaked, drink-filled, loud space lacking sunlight and clocks to disorient and convince you to continue giving away your money hand over fist? Well, the Trump organization--always the innovators--found a way. | | ---|---|--- What's different now of is that Donald Trump and his family have tens of millions of die-hard supporters. They have proven they will buy Trump merch, coins, and tacky products just as quickly as they buy and embrace Trump lies. To be fair, there may be some Americans who are willing to pay more for a mobile phone and monthly service just so they can keep that close and special connection with the Trumps (who'd never lower themselves to to hang out with any of the consumers of their grift) in every notification and news alert. But those people are, how shall we put it? Pathetic. The Trump family, once again, is involved in exploitation. Trump mobile is not an actual tech venture. It's another grift and echo in a Trump media chamber already filled with endless noise. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and our weekly show (every Thursday, 2pm et, only on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter." Thank you for and efforts to amplify other independent media! Peter,
With the primary over, the lines are drawn, and Virginia's 2025 elections just became the most important in the country.
The entire statewide ticket is on the ballot: governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general – plus all 100 seats in the House of Delegates. That means the chance to flip Virginia blue is right in front of us, but we're going to have to fight for it.
Because the Republican ticket? It's extreme, and it's dangerous:
– Winsome Earle-Sears: MAGA loyalist, running for governor
– John Reid: Conspiracy-peddling radio host who wants to criminalize abortion
– Jason Miyares: Far-right attorney general who purged voters and created an "election integrity" unit to hunt down nonexistent fraud
They're running to finish what Youngkin started – gutting reproductive rights, banning books, and turning Virginia into a test lab for Trump's agenda.
But we've got a powerhouse slate ready to fight back:
– Abigail Spanberger: Former CIA officer and current Congresswoman, running for governor
– Ghazala Hashmi: The first Muslim woman in the VA Senate, now running for LG
– Jay Jones: Young, bold, and ready to take the AG office back for the people
GOTV PAC is going all in to support candidates up and down the ballot because this is about more than one office. It's about control of Virginia's future.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Did you catch me on CNN?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
CNN just gave me the mic — and I didn’t hold back.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2746%2E400544%2EfSXgTw)
Did you catch my interview on CNN?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250621_cnn?amount=5&refcode=em20250621-2746&refcode2=2746_400544_fSXgTw&akid=2746%2E400544%2EfSXgTw)
I just joined CNN to speak out against Donald Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” — a bill that slashes food assistance and Medicaid, guts protections for public lands, and hands billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.
Let me be clear: **There is absolutely nothing beautiful about this bill.**
If I were still serving in Congress, I would’ve voted _no_. But today, I’m running to be New Mexico’s next governor — because we need strong, compassionate leaders at the state level who will fight back.
Governors are the last line of defense against Trump’s extreme agenda. And if I’m elected, I’ll wake up every single day ready to fight for New Mexico’s working families, our land, and our future.
**[Will you chip in $5 — or whatever you can — to help us build the grassroots movement we need to take on Trump and win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250621_cnn?amount=5&refcode=em20250621-2746&refcode2=2746_400544_fSXgTw&akid=2746%2E400544%2EfSXgTw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250621_cnn?amount=5&refcode=em20250621-2746&refcode2=2746_400544_fSXgTw&akid=2746%2E400544%2EfSXgTw)**
I’m so grateful to have you on this team. Thank you for fighting with me.
Be fierce,
Deb

clean_body: CNN just gave me the mic — and I didn’t hold back. Did you catch my interview on CNN? I just joined CNN to speak out against Donald Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” — a bill that slashes food assistance and Medicaid, guts protections for public lands, and hands billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. Let me be clear: There is absolutely nothing beautiful about this bill. If I were still serving in Congress, I would’ve voted no. But today, I’m running to be New Mexico’s next governor — because we need strong, compassionate leaders at the state level who will fight back. Governors are the last line of defense against Trump’s extreme agenda. And if I’m elected, I’ll wake up every single day ready to fight for New Mexico’s working families, our land, and our future. I’m so grateful to have you on this team. Thank you for fighting with me. Be fierce, Deb

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: 500 Days to the Midterm Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
In 500 days the midterm elections will be over - races that will decide the leadership of the House, the balance of power in the Senate and with that, the checks, if any, on the unbridled abuse of power of the president for his last two years in office, not to mention the dozens of races for governor and hundreds of legislative seats.
That may seem like a lot of time but as we are hockey fans here in New England, let me put it to you this way, the first period of this game is over, it’s in the books, we only have two periods left to get our act together, make our case, organize and win in November of next year. That is not a ton of time and this is the plain truth.
Last week tens of thousands gathered across the country to say that we haven’t been a land of Kings for 250 years. It was an incredible display of determination and resistance. I celebrate that work and the energy it brought to people. It is important to make sure your voice is heard, but it must be followed up with action through organizing to win elections, because without that, protests risk becoming the Left’s version of “thoughts and prayers”.
We can spend all of our time worried about the Trump administration or even the internal machinations of the Democratic National Committee, but what the American people need us to worry about is simple, them.
They need to know what we will do for them, not just how terrible the other side is.
What does it mean to be a Democrat or to support a Democrat? It used to be said that if you asked 1,000 Democrats what it means to be a Democrat and you get 10,000 answers and the diversity of our party is our strength no doubt. But no matter how big the tent is, you need strong tent poles or it will all collapse.
I am a Democrat because my parents, both proud union members, taught my brother, sister and I from an early age about all that the party had done for organized labor and how much labor had done for us - to provide job security, wages to pay our mortgage and help with school, public education, safe streets and an opportunity to succeed. That is the party to which I have dedicated the majority of my life. That is the party the American people need us to be right now. We aren’t perfect, but we got your back.
But I understand that we can’t win elections telling people how to feel. People are frustrated, angry at times and hungry for results and not judgment.
When we tell folks if they elect Democrats it will be different, there has to be a plan.
We are a nation that, at its founding, had massive divisions. We were thirteen colonies with one common enemy and little else, but soon we found the import of uniting and its natural accompanying strength and security.
A lot has been said about the “cross roads” we are at as a party. How do we get our party “back on track”? We listen to the American people, give them a vision of how we will lead and a reason to feel secure in their choice to join us in this fight.
When we do that, we will win elections.
If we spend the next 500 days just shouting at the rain, playing into the other side’s playbook, we will fail and we will deserve to. How we use this time is more important than how the other side does, as hard as that is to believe. There are elected leaders empowered to push back and they should, and do, but those of us citizen activists have a critical role to play too and play it we must...and have.
In the last 228 days, Democrats have out performed in every election, flipping many seats red-to-blue. We can do so much more if we stay focused. My folks used to say that if you have an opportunity to make a difference, you have an obligation to try. Each of us has the opportunity, all of us need to try.
So if you believe in Democratic Party values, join us, don’t agonize, organize and let’s get to work. If you’re skeptical after November and the chaos of these past few months, I get it, we will earn your trust back. We are all in this together.
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Screenshot%202023-09-29%20at%204.02.22%20PM.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
Take Action: Phone Bank for VA & NJ
Join the Massachusetts Democratic Party as we make phone calls into both VA (for Abigail Spanberger) and NJ (for Mikie Sherrill)
We will phone bank on Thursday at 6 PM until November for both of these candidates. As soon as you sign up, you will get the Zoom link.
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/massdems/event/804092/]
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our Republican opponent, former Fox News commentator Steve Hilton, has raised $725,599 from just 43 donations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39822%2E3422442%2Ejt9W1k)
Hi Derek,
We’re only nine days from our June fundraising deadline, and here’s why it matters:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250621_2_ak?refcode=em20250621-39822&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39822_3422442_jt9W1k&akid=39822%2E3422442%2Ejt9W1k)
**Our Republican opponent, former Fox News commentator Steve Hilton, has raised $725,599 from just 43 donations. That's an average of over $16,500 per donation!**
**[Make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win>>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250621_2_ak?refcode=em20250621-39822&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39822_3422442_jt9W1k&akid=39822%2E3422442%2Ejt9W1k)**
Let’s be real: Most of us can’t afford to shell out thousands of dollars to our preferred candidate.
Katie is running a different kind of campaign. We’re counting on lots of people coming together and chipping in $5 or $10 at a time. Katie refuses money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks because _she’s never been for sale._
Winning in California takes serious resources, and who wins could come down to who has the money to knock more doors, hold more events, and run more ads. With nearly half of California voters saying they are open to voting for a GOP governor, we can’t afford to fall behind.
**[That’s why we’re asking you to chip in $5. Grassroots contributions from Porter Supporters like you are how we’ll win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250621_2_ak?refcode=em20250621-39822&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39822_3422442_jt9W1k&akid=39822%2E3422442%2Ejt9W1k)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250621_2_ak?refcode=em20250621-39822&refcode2=39822_3422442_jt9W1k&akid=39822%2E3422442%2Ejt9W1k)
Thank you so much for being part of this team,
– Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250621-39822&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39822_3422442_jt9W1k&akid=39822%2E3422442%2Ejt9W1k)**

name: Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I’m in a SERIOUS pinch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi there, it's Steve Scalise.
I took some time to jot down a few of my thoughts. I admit, it's a longer email but I hope you'll take a minute to read it over.
Why did I write so much? Well, my colleagues and I are in a serious pinch.
I'm not ashamed to admit June has been unusually slow in terms of fundraising. I don't know if it's because the Midterms seem so far away or the summer slump is taking its toll - either way, we're coming up DANGEROUSLY short in the final stretch of the quarter.
Unfortunately, the same is not true for the Democrats...
House Democrats just posted a 45 million dollar fundraising haul. And they're telling anyone who will listen that they're making massive inroads in Trump territory! That's a knockout punch, folks.
[Frankly, if we don’t get our act together before the MOST IMPORTANT deadline of the year, I’m afraid the consequences would be truly devastating.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/DM-hWOqaI8Wb79WIhUlO0nA_ldSV3RCXQax84UjMWwxMBH5bGavS0tfgy-zeNbVz-uVB9UQy0gIhBV2ulOY7YHL56Zedt_QxyQVoGt_WgFq9yvypg7X4T7m2IvvYVeyDUI8IU6xkvU0ukB0fZpF9F1rBE7NDx9kaReSsMydwqXLP-xK8fr7R6q5X9N7Qm7CceLnPEb_50ShkLbEm02BJoEUqrtjjDH1QSwRN6qZKu04r8Xas0SXXH6qcyFtCZyEjBL4iPWjxEk7U9llh2xRouUEtB9q76WBj7i3mZGxmRisSpOIGQ4ZzSX3GR3G978Mai9nGZwh68FO8YGFFx4rJvU_vVj54SaDxZeIgJ25pA_7ytZA322W26MHvPiC0kFJW4FifZgqctQhM9D-YZnVFRWw50EHZsn3-SR-Jsy-Y34MCX34dJspHaL7ZxxVDoTVCpRxPNbtPVcLN1AD3tYiUxVRSbYSouGYSQ-jWa1pZCu6sQ9ZQwMR3S_bXflG3lYBEHXpG5eRMdCbpIeIg-G8kv17D--O4Gor4hYKOGUelOOwrXGxs6kxPELO6ORrV3R0N2_R05UGVYT4a0MqZE2AXmZ605D36eD5xVNBaPpad5OjCDls98u23FHA6YW1JrTY944ZVREB_G7Gl-_yCWotLEMbSlMlvy9FSDOK4uiqIrA3VN1E4tTGBuCpN545op55zZ17NUfeJdJuE4Uo991CcaoZZoUb6kcq_SjnNk4I_w3jJOLEyU5cuDOq6EdWxhD1jP_ENdq-0F_xGqcuMg23vbAZwHp4QxsTK5qE5K4JDuGuq6XL56Tuhzd4V69nL06k/B4t9PVonuBeNg3D0suUtSiaXKH6Ku7Zy/10)
If we fall short, we'll be forced to 1) slash digital outreach efforts in swing districts, 2) gut recruiting efforts for volunteers, 3) shut down voter registration initiatives, 4) concede all three upcoming Special Elections, 5) and hand the Democrats a gift-wrapped victory.
They'd be OVER THE MOON if we had to pull back our block-and-tackle campaign operations.
That's why I set a goal of raising another 200,000 dollars before our all-important Mid Year Deadline. It's a long-shot but if that's what it takes to fully fund all the critical campaign infrastructure we need to win, I won't hesitate - NOT FOR ONE SECOND!
So what do you say? Can I count you in? | [YES >>

clean_body: Hi there, it's Steve Scalise. I took some time to jot down a few of my thoughts. I admit, it's a longer email but I hope you'll take a minute to read it over. Why did I write so much? Well, my colleagues and I are in a serious pinch. I'm not ashamed to admit June has been unusually slow in terms of fundraising. I don't know if it's because the Midterms seem so far away or the summer slump is taking its toll - either way, we're coming up DANGEROUSLY short in the final stretch of the quarter. Unfortunately, the same is not true for the Democrats... House Democrats just posted a 45 million dollar fundraising haul. And they're telling anyone who will listen that they're making massive inroads in Trump territory! That's a knockout punch, folks. If we fall short, we'll be forced to 1) slash digital outreach efforts in swing districts, 2) gut recruiting efforts for volunteers, 3) shut down voter registration initiatives, 4) concede all three upcoming Special Elections, 5) and hand the Democrats a gift-wrapped victory. They'd be OVER THE MOON if we had to pull back our block-and-tackle campaign operations. That's why I set a goal of raising another 200,000 dollars before our all-important Mid Year Deadline. It's a long-shot but if that's what it takes to fully fund all the critical campaign infrastructure we need to win, I won't hesitate - NOT FOR ONE SECOND! So what do you say? Can I count you in? | | ---|--- Look, this deadline was important before... But with THREE Special Elections barrelling towards us, nothing is more important than rallying a last-minute fundraising surge. I'm not asking for a miracle but I am asking for a lifeline. Can you spare just $5 or $10 to help us out? Every little bit counts. If you can pitch in more, that would be even better. Can I just ask you to pitch in something? | ---|--- On the other hand, if you can't afford a financial contribution right now, that's okay. We need prayers too. I would never ask you to pitch in more than you can afford. Thanks for all you do. For America, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! name: Mike Thompson
subject: Standing with you at No Kings
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
collage of pictures of no kings protestors, holding up various signs to protest [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP06/1/84449/images/Thompson%20no%20kings%201.png]At the Napa and Woodland No Kings protests this past weekend, I saw thousands of Californians turn up and rally against kings and extremists because , Peter, we are active builders of our democracy. Power lies with the American people.

image of the large crowd at the no kings protest [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP06/1/84449/images/Thompson%20no%20kings%202.jpg]When we showed up by the thousands across our state and country (and Trump’s military birthday parade was rather sparsely attended) , we sent a strong message. We demonstrated our support for our fellow Californians in L.A. and for the bravery and courage of Senator Padilla in asking questions to hold our government accountable.

When we showed up to No Kings protests this weekend, WE, the American people, were fighting for each other. I was honored to stand alongside you all, and I remain committed to fighting for you and your families every day in Washington.

This is our democracy. Protest is a constitutionally protected right. And this past weekend, Peter, we showed how important it is to us to protect and exercise our rights.

Fighting with you and for you every day,

Mike

subject: “Vote for me and you’ll never have to vote again.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|

Y’all, when Donald Trump was running for president, he said the following: _**“Vote for me and you’ll never have to vote again.”**_ We’re now just a few months into his second term, and it’s starting to become clear what he meant by that. → He’s unleashed an unelected, sociopathic billionaire to take a wrecking ball to our democracy and our government.
→ He’s pushed our institutions and democratic norms to their breaking point.
→ He’s attacked our most vulnerable communities nationwide.
→He's illegally deported people to a foreign prison camp. The bottom line is that Trump 2.0 is worse than we could have imagined — and when Trump said he wanted to be a dictator, _**he meant it.**_ [**But as long as I walk this earth and serve in the United States Congress, I will fight to stop that from happening if it’s the last thing I do. And at such a defining moment for our country, I need you with me. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Peter, I have a big announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

| Peter, I have a big announcement: _**Our campaign is hitting the road!**_

Today, we're kicking off the eight-day _Span Virginia Bus Tour_ to connect with voters, support small businesses, take in our Commonwealth's beautiful Main Streets and historic sites, and rally support for down-ballot Democrats.

From Newport News to Norfolk, Fairfax to Fredericksburg, I'm ready to take this show on the road.

[_**Click here to view our upcoming stops and find out how to register for an event near you:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110015596/552984898/1818015377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTBlMzAxYjItZjI0ZS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A10dfWDUSLXZRw6yn9JgKyVF85qEVi3e76tx-MEKHPc=&emci=87e301b2-f24e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=90e301b2-f24e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8470899)

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Xev0-mF_i2R8BNVB0zU3MRz46WhZSTD38hQ3c2iBYI8FcVA-VvmLMEz5wJ5C7fnqcuoUH_kWzgI7wW-X7zLtBzw4vROcfb0j5q7oBv3XdkgNfKS9kfl9fy42hBRIyvJ3QvNFfg-i9hp43j36mn8clC4XvXImtoKmnOTgR9ETPJBMmz-GM7sWHVdedOvg5kaQbKWzv9AMiQd9IYfIaxEWYkJK2ZNkdcozEmcPpUqzFfeSyK5vcKJNunjju-Px40rYFz6pSqf6CL5GqLXRMBUN3gsfuhSj7fZTvCPqReSEnr0f1zwc_EV2X5CnIaOJRYHRB1Fk4puq9atpmYsv_zZAqMr6S0UIIZEMU2XmPcXDHtEf9yChwfWuMaGkGjpMVPhihAOjF9pzoIh7or7ZsO0YO7rpUKnm4d5ZdlCTZwJD-V5BsgZLDb8jtibT3vcoR8pU-GUpFJbcBfmjxLWZAswoJKfTjiez9jwzy_AiMou8U55n_brmrJmVGGMSnXxkgW0CHTMqflmaHYdP-2m55rKeV2k7dCFJCwFY82fTcnG6M3tfDxY3koZY5QoHzH81dA4-YTyDgGsMboR-Unai53dFXZj0to4kOT8g2-u3WLnAM8T64vAYKSCBfWI8DLivWPEWlm17JeSVaERjooBNMe699sZP8fwJPph3joSo9--34Zk3wTWWfE1A636aUsNEjVt4tfPDqA6EM9UEZiJgid0gT0bL5_WG6qSsVw/4qaSsscQ6vbbk5hjiQrlYxnUPg39C-z2/10) [NO](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/UDvpFPhA3cPfz7n-mGrWBssbujs1rRgFkPECLI7re8SO4nn0tr2pbgqLngTeOzUpoPRXyQMAVtK2GvMO3P-fMPrcFiDlOhMujXl2ZV0uR42Eh9sQGv6IkYdyPdXa-sbdXGCVkyga8UvVZ47idpsGANvWcCeYoFTdLDzKW5FKLsZWKAeIRBn6vfbCr6jUkEkmWrEaPGrnQivpNvZZuhvsGB22f43tMI1Bc1tAZtwgf7HgVwhYxr_kZ8doVF_GSbv5uPAeqP9UxELO0FCzv6nFy4oj4axx8ZQWKyBN6GMUDo9LY4LUDYsV6QvvtanpBwB3oizzupUkPQo25ZXoma4D3_3kWvkUHWXU5MEPC3Nd7D9UmqlP3AhZH8NfIjN7oEQvZOAyE802UadWehkqamFS3qGnRQkdVwEUtt887OC39HRyXHuY_pPlkSK71s0fklVbaVbK-xQVlruCQEgnIc2gt-vxONm5z5Lbr7FurFgCpNhCBeIm4fQY5yMPuqgXVyvCJe0B4RpK7Wg_nQDtMZ8efAUCDCX7Qv3FB5GJFppXaF_eJIp4iP5dtyAhWqf3DFeUu5YYPVbtAGyoEES5JOLpd6tmPsoGTEdvAmw5x0-scpdABOg0oSAwf7tzn9LGsjL9T6cWfLJRlh4k4f_oMMyQUB7EAy_qz0ZRB8U_E0eQoXQQ2iWd_OFNWO4AYnxOdTcayb7s1CReXGUpe8plu0ycd3TNhqOPRR68Rw/1sMVzUDGfrLTT8sX6XBFTtSeqG4Wy3Nl/10) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/tnHVVV5mTCHNw1IgvK5ZpNwWS0YpypFOlwAtGE9zaFnNkOxP90npus0ozFzuILQ52sFq0nP4pY4f1vMG4qcvQdTdj7PmCFuCUIxO-kXXkFwpNReSXew4EzA0nfGQQ72ZkCb-l0Sqmetvy6VnJMnUdz06IomORgmYB0MLbZB39s_-o0GHDrylRbRGr8UnbXol6zy9P7saEWXm-i8QalYvvPNw9rHXexSvciVcvQj2o2W50ul5dcamrN1DDIeBrtqCWrbTuAMKiBVNkj9Ou3f_DHV3O1NsL2z_3Cabzq94Pv7nnrB3aUwicHeP8QjDHJwvCDPp-Mhnisjyeb-B68jTJt4auuzqDpmqwcrX_khiojI_pUW8J6hWdu5UIiJ0mlipkVcS76oTwQCax68Y10GewYPM1EEjmzNM1kfuAtSaPPBxLyBbnsrGztouVvXxMq0UKh16Y6GrZjRJUwMIzgQeKu5z6WqM5YPwuYuS6UXa5JmMOaNVkkyXY6BhUx9rwy4GlJ9ADjmfXP7rcPdQo9_aXpXQ7gPxgF97EE6964BSDC7wxN-mUtBXXHG0SRyQV3Mf9Xx-D7Ycq373OIaFrgiMO8Xk71m0ku85ZCwcQJQByx0jkkQDrtWO4zzVCr5WUO-OCQe1mKQ_aWD-xy8pNzbin-rYe5_NzhC1C4E5U_JV4dAJpzl4wr2MQzu81IDu94mLx3KqrhjHPQ4gsUkn1OYbuZz02xZFdptxqQ/HKiRLhrQ_w7CehyFQzvMqF_QF-3zlJM3/10)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

body:
We won’t be intimidated, and we won’t stop >>
| ⬇️ Folks, _THIS_ is what Democracy looks like ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-attend/?source=VPP_20250621_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O) **5 MILLION PEOPLE stood up to say “NO KINGS” belong in America.**

**We’re THRILLED — but Trump is _FURIOUS._ He’s lashing out at Democrats, attacking politicians, and throwing temper tantrums!**

But friend, our main objective at the Voter Protection Project is to protect voting — _and voters._

That’s why we _need to know_ if _YOU_ were among the 5 million brave Democrats who showed up in protest:

[**Did you attend a “No Kings” protest? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-attend/?source=VPP_20250621_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O) | [YES, I DID »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-attend/?source=VPP_20250621_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O)
---
[NO, I DID NOT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-attend/?source=VPP_20250621_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O)
[THERE WASN’T ONE NEAR ME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-attend/?source=VPP_20250621_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O)
Thank you for your quick response,

_The Voter Protection Project Polling Team_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20298%2E878179%2EbVbl_O)

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: This is straight out of the authoritarian playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Donald Trump’s power grabs are quickly escalating
#

**Donald Trump’s power grabs are quickly escalating, Peter.**
We already knew about his habit of using the presidency as a tool of revenge. But now he’s openly attacking public servants, everyday Americans, and even other elected officials — anyone he perceives to be his political enemy.
At the same time, he’s working furiously to expand his own executive power beyond anything our country’s founding fathers thought was possible.
**It’s straight out of the authoritarian playbook** — and we can’t afford to wait and see what he does next. We need to take action NOW before it’s too late.
**[Will you stand with us against Donald Trump’s escalating power grabs by rushing a donation of $5 or anything at all today? Together, we can organize + mobilize to elect leaders who will defend our democracy.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90093?refcode=em20250621-9032&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9032%2E614464%2E64LQ0K)**
